Name: Veracel Celulose S/A
Description:
A Veracel Celulose S/A, empresa situada no extremo sul do Estado da Bahia e fornecedora de celulose branqueada de eucalipto, tem na sustentabilidade das operações o fundamento de suas ações, que são baseadas nos elementos econômico, social e ambiental do empreendimento.
A Veracel é fruto da parceria de duas líderes internacionais no setor de celulose e papel, a brasileira Suzano e a sueco-finlandesa Stora Enso.
A Veracel quer ser uma referência mundial em sustentabilidade e destacar-se como uma empresa ambientalmente correta, socialmente justa e economicamente viável.

Name: Sylvamo Brasil
Description:
Acreditamos no compromisso do papel para educar, comunicar e entreter. O papel nos conecta uns aos outros, e é um vínculo duradouro com os recursos naturais renováveis. Nosso objetivo é produzir o papel que você precisa da maneira mais responsável e sustentável, inovando e criando valor para nossos clientes e investidores.

O futuro do papel merece uma empresa comprometida com o sucesso de todo o ecossistema. Desde as florestas que amamos até as comunidades onde vivemos, passando por quem confia em nosso papel: sabemos que o bem-estar de cada um depende do bem-estar de todos.

Sylvamo: a empresa de papel do mundo.

Name: Saica Group
Description: Saica is one of the largest European players in the development and production of recycled paper for corrugated cardboard, with a production of 3.3 million tonnes of paper. With more than 10,000 employees across Spain, France, Italy, Portugal, UK, Ireland, Turkey, Luxembourg and The Netherlands, Saica has four business areas: production of recycled paper for corrugated board (Saica Paper), waste management and environmental services (Saica Natur), production of corrugated board packaging (Saica Pack) and flexible packaging (Saica Flex).

Name: Masisa
Description:
Somos referente Latinoamericano en la producción y comercialización de tableros de madera y soluciones para muebles y revestimientos de interior, ofreciendo productos y servicios de calidad, innovadores y sustentables, que transforman espacios e inspiran a miles de clientes en los países donde operamos. 

Más de 4.000 personas directas e indirectas forman parte de los diferentes equipos que hay al interior de MASISA. Nuestros negocios industrial y comercial, se desarrollan en Estados Unidos, Chile, Colombia, Ecuador, México, Perú y Venezuela. Además de atender mercados en Norteamérica y Asia.

Creemos que el éxito se construye en equipo, porque un ambiente de trabajo amigable y de respeto, es el que propicia que las nuevas ideas prosperen. Es por esto que favorecemos el emprendimiento y estamos abiertos a propuestas de cambio.

Entendemos que la transformación y el cambio son el camino para conseguir nuestros sueños y continuar impactando positivamente en nuestros clientes, colaboradores y sus familias.
Location: Las Condes, Región Metropolitana de Santiago

Name: Corticeira Amorim
Description: Corticeira Amorim is the world’s largest player in the cork industry. A vertically integrated company that generates sales exceeding €1,000 billion to more than 100 countries through its own network of subsidiaries. Amorim’s responsible approach to raw materials and sustainable production illustrates the remarkable interdependence between industry and the vital cork ecosystem - one of the world’s most balanced examples of social, economic and environmental development. Fostered by innovation and research, the company supplies products and applications to some of the world’s most technological, disruptive and demanding activities, including the aerospace, automobile, construction, energy, design and wines and spirits sectors.

Name: PAPELERA NACIONAL S.A.
Description:
PAPELERA NACIONAL S.A. se constituyó legalmente el 28 de febrero de 1961 en Ecuador,  Cantón Marcelino Maridueña y tuvo como socios fundadores a las compañías norteamericanas W.R. Grace INC., International Paper CO., Sociedad Agrícola e Industrial San Carlos S.A. y a la Organización Noboa. 
El inicio de las operaciones arrancó en 1968, con una producción de papel kraft de 10.000 toneladas métricas por año y el montaje de una planta de pulpa de bagazo de caña de azúcar, para aprovechar las materias primas fibrosas generales del azúcar del Ingenio San Carlos, y utilizarlas en las fabricación de papel. A través de los años, se fueron realizando ampliaciones en la capacidad instalada de la fábrica; se adquirieron nuevos equipos, así como tecnología que se incorporó en procesos de control y preparación de fibras. 
Actualmente, la producción llega a 150.000 toneladas métricas de papel kraft por año.

Name: Billerud
Description:
We are a world leading company in high performance paper and packaging materials; passionately committed to sustainability, quality and customer value. 

The company has nine production units in Sweden, USA, and Finland with around 6000 employees in over 19 countries and customers in over 100 countries. We help reduce our customers’ climate impact by inspiring them to make the best packaging choices with confidence. 

We spare no effort to reduce our carbon footprint, and to make high performance products that help our customers do the same. Because at Billerud, we understand that the right packaging materials and solutions can be important toolsto help fight climate change. That's why we see it as our responsibility to enable sustainable choices, for a better tomorrow. Because it’s only when you have tomorrow in mind that you’ll do your very best today.

Name: Paracel
Description: Paracel nace con la visión de generar un impacto positivo en la sociedad y fomentar el aumento de la demanda de productos biodegradables.

Name: Kruger Inc.
Description:
A forward-looking and progressive company since its very foundation over a century ago, the Kruger organization is constantly evolving and looking for the best talent for its establishments located across Canada and the US. 

In addition to its traditional industry sectors where the Company built a solid reputation worldwide, namely pulp and paper, paperboard and packaging, Kruger Inc. is now active in such diverse sectors as green energy, tissue products, recycling and biomaterials. 

We put sustainable development and the responsible use of resources at the core of our success and several of our establishments and practices are certified under the strictest industry standards.

Name: Softys Professional Ecuador
Description:
NUESTRO PAPEL ES CUIDAR BIEN DE TI.

La División Institucional de PROTISA ECUADOR y su marca SOFTYS PROFESSIONAL está dirigida a atender empresas e instituciones con productos de papel Tissue que colaboran en la creación de ambientes limpios e higiénicos en sus instalaciones, permitiendo el sano desempeño de sus actividades.

La calidad de nuestros papeles higiénicos, toallas de papel en rollo, toallas de papel dobladas, faciales y sabanillas aseguran siempre los mejores resultados, ya que nuestro objetivo principal es satisfacer las altas exigencias y estándares de calidad e higiene del mercado, además de contar con procesos productivos amigables con el medio ambiente.

En la búsqueda de entregar facilidades a nuestros clientes, es que tenemos productos especiales para diferentes segmentos del mercado, como HORECA (Hoteles, Restaurantes y Catering), INDUSTRIAS, OFICINAS e instituciones de SALUD.

Name: Asia Pulp & Paper Indonesia
Description: Akun Tidak Resmi dari Asia Pulp & Paper Indonesia

Name: Modern Karton
Description:
Artan kapasitesiyle, Türkiye’nin en büyük oluklu mukavva kağıt üreticisi konumunda, Avrupa’nın ise en büyükleri arasında yer almaktadır.

Modern Karton Sanayi ve Tic. A.Ş.; 508.000 m² açık alan üzerine kurulu 181.000 m² kapalı alana sahip tesisindeki üretim teknolojisi ve otomasyon sistemiyle, kağıt sektöründe dünyanın en gelişmiş teknolojisine sahip şirketlerinden biri konumundadır. Türkiye’de sektörün lideri konumundaki Modern Karton, ülkemiz oluklu mukavva kağıt ihracatının neredeyse tamamını tek başına gerçekleştirmektedir.
Üretiminde % 100 atık kağıt kullanan tesis yılda 17 milyon yetişkin ağacın kesilmesini önlemektedir.

Kuruluş, bu özelliği ve 35 milyon $ değerindeki arıtma sistemiyle tam bir çevre dostudur.

Rekabetçi gücünü en üst seviyeye çıkaran ürünler ve stratejiler geliştirmeyi hedefleyen Modern Karton, bu vizyonuyla ürünlerinin dünya pazarındaki varlığını sağlamlaştırmıştır.

Name: PRODUCTORA CARTONERA S.A. - PROCARSA
Description:
Con más de 50 años de experiencia, PROCARSA está posicionada como la empresa líder de la industria cartonera, aportando soluciones innovadoras e integrales; dirigidas al mercado local y global. 

Productora Cartonera S.A. ha sido concebida desde sus inicios como una empresa orientada a satisfacer las necesidades y expectativas de los sectores agroexportadores del Ecuador en cuanto a la producción de empaques de cartón corrugado. El desarrollo de esta visión fue posible gracias al apoyo de un conglomerado humano que, comprometido con sus valores empresariales, trabaja día a día para generar confianza en la comunidad y en sus clientes, proveedores y accionistas.
-----------
PROCARSA has over 50 years of experience and it is recognized as the leading company in the cardboard manufacturing industry, providing innovative and complete solutions oriented to local and foreign markets.

Productora Cartonera S.A was conceived, since its beginnings, as a company oriented towards satisfying the needs and aspirations of agricultural exporting companies in Ecuador in regards to the manufacturing of corrugated cardboard packings. This vision was possible thanks to the support of a human conglomerate that, committed with their corporative values, works daily to generate trustworthiness for the community, their clients, providers and stockholders.

Name: Amorim Cork Solutions
Description:
At Amorim Cork Solutions, we develop solutions that incorporate high-performance cork composites, combining innovation and sustainability.
We reuse cork - a 100% natural, renewable and recyclable raw material - to develop ground-breaking solutions for various industries such as aerospace, maritime, mobility, sealing, energy, construction, flooring, sports surfaces, playgrounds, toys, home, office and leisure.
Each product we create represents a strategic response to current market needs and our commitment to sustainability.
At Amorim Cork Solutions, each innovation reinforces the promise of a future where nature and technology coexist in perfect harmony.

Name: Groupe Savoie
Description:
Founded in 1978, we have carved an enviable reputation as a leading producer of a wide range of top-quality hardwood products, including pallets and pallet components, cabinet and furniture components, hardwood lumber, tone wood components, ecological fuels, wood chips, and more. Our business is vertically integrated: we harvest and acquire wood, which is then optimally processed and transformed into top-quality hardwood products for a variety of applications.

Groupe Savoie’s vision is to be a company recognized for adding the maximum value to available forest resources. Our mission has always been to manufacture products of exceptional quality—all while ensuring sustainable forest practices and contributing to the development and quality of life of our employees and communities.

Today, we are shifting the way customers think about buying hardwood products. Indeed, we’re not “just” a supplier of hardwood products; we are an innovative manufacturer that provides end-to-end services for our customers to get the right type of product, the right level of quality, right when they need it. From our investments in cutting-edge technology and continuous improvement to product diversification to guaranteed delivery, Groupe Savoie is your one-stop-shop for all your hardwood product needs. This is what sets us truly apart and ahead of the pack.

Groupe Savoie’s industrial facilities include two sawmills, one pallet plant, one component plant, one pellet plant, and dry kilns in St-Quentin, N.B., one component plant and a dry kiln in Kedgwick, N.B., one pallet production and recycling plant in Moncton, N.B., and one sawmill in Westville, Nova-Scotia.

Name: Lwarcel Celulose
Description:
Bracell began operations in Brazil in 2003, with the acquisition of BSC (Bahia Specialty Cellulose) and Copener (Florestal) in Bahia. In August 2018, our operations expanded with the acquisition of Lwarcel Celulose in São Paulo. In addition to these production units, we have sales offices in Asia, Europe and the United States.

A global leader in the production of specialty cellulose, Bracell’s operations are supported by the sustainable cultivation of eucalyptus and state-of-the-art factories. We manage approximately 234,000 hectares of owned land, of which about 83,000 are environmental preservation areas. We have an installed annual production capacity of 750,000 tons of pulp, and employ almost 7,000 people in the two states where we operate.

Bracell continuously invests in research and technology to offer our customers high quality products, delivered on time and at competitive prices, while always respecting the environment and communities in every aspect of our operations.

Name: Alto Parana S.A.
Description:
Alto Paraná S.A. es la mayor empresa forestal de la Argentina.

Fue creada en 1976 y adquirida en diciembre de 1996 por ARAUCO (una de las mayores empresas forestales de América Latina). Se localiza en la Provincia de Misiones, donde se establece con una inversión del orden de los 800 millones de dólares, poniendo en marcha importantes unidades de negocios y favoreciendo el crecimiento y desarrollo de la economía de la región.

Actualmente, cuenta con un patrimonio de 233.700 hectáreas, de las cuales un 48% corresponde a Bosques Nativos y otros usos; otro 48% se comprende de plantaciones de Pino Taeda -en su mayor parte-, Araucarias y Eucaliptos; y el 4% restante son áreas forestables y reforestables. La gran participación porcentual de áreas naturales refleja, en el marco de los intereses de Alto Paraná, la protección del medio ambiente como materia fundamental de su Política de Responsabilidad Empresaria.

Entre las unidades activas de Producción e Industria cuenta con: dos viveros forestales, una planta de pasta celulósica, dos aserraderos, una planta de remanufactura y una fábrica de tableros de mediana densidad (MDF). 
Alto Paraná S.A opera según los estándares más altos del mundo en cuanto a calidad y protección del medio ambiente (Certificaciones Sistema de Gestión de Calidad ISO 9001, Sistema de Gestión Ambiental ISO 14001 y Sistema de Gestión de Seguridad y Salud Ocupacional ISO 18001). Es prioridad estratégica de la empresa la permanente investigación y puesta en marcha de tecnología y procedimientos destinados a maximizar la calidad, productividad y rendimiento en todas las instancias de sus procesos productivos e industriales, en equilibrio con el medio ambiente y cumpliendo en forma adecuada con la responsabilidad asumida con los trabajadores y la comunidad.

Name: United Carton Industries Company
Description:
United Carton Industries Company (UCIC) has been in the corrugated business since 1990 with a current annual capacity of 420,000 tonnes. UCIC focuses on high quality corrugated solutions for the customized packaging needs.

Five state of the art plants produce corrugated boxes, point of sale material, shelf ready and high graphic packaging. Strategically positioned in Jeddah and Riyadh, catering to the corrugated needs of FMCG, white goods, agricultural and packaging companies which includes the largest multi-national corporations and the best of domestic industry.

Name: United Pulp and Paper Co., Inc
Description:
United Pulp and Paper Co., Inc (UPPC) in SCG Packaging is the Philippines' leading manufacturer of high-quality and cost-efficient industrial grade paper used for corrugated packaging products. The company's philosophies and values are anchored to that of its mother company, Siam Cement Group (SCG).
 
UPPC's four main philosophies are:
Adherence to Fairness
Dedication to Excellence
Belief in the Value of the Individual and
Concern for Social Responsibility

Our Culture is Our Act

Inspire & Innovate
Customer & Consumer Centricity
Proactive & Agile
Seamless Collaboration

Name: Metsä Fibre
Description: Metsä Fibre is a leading producer of wood based bioproducts, such as pulp, sawn timber, biochemicals and bioenergy. Our products are known for their high quality, which is based on the unique characteristics of Nordic wood.

Name: KORINDO GROUP
Description:
Korindo is an international group of companies with multi-business in wide variety of products. The management is led by professional managers who are nationals from many countries. Having its headquarter in Indonesia, it has heavy industry production plants in Spain, France, Germany and many industrial plants in Indonesia ranging from wood chip, palm oil, newspaper to special-purpose vehicles and wind towers. Most of its products are exported to many countries worldwide with the support of sales offices in five major Buyer countries in Seoul, Tokyo, Hongkong, Los Angeles and Jeddah. 

Korindo has proven its constant and sustainable growth for over 50 years in the global business and is committed to constantly innovating its management structures and processes to continue its role as a truly global enterprise. 

Korindo steadily promotes the development of social infrastructures as well as its people and environment in Indonesia through its development programs and community building activities to emphasize its role as an environmentally friendly company.

Name: Mercer International Inc.
Description:
Transforming Biomass into Bioproducts for a Sustainable Future

Mercer International is a global forest products company creating renewable solutions from wood. With operations in Germany, Canada, and the United States, we produce responsibly sourced pulp, solid wood, mass timber, and bio-based products that support low-carbon, circular economies.

We believe wood—when managed responsibly—is one of the most effective materials for driving sustainable change. Our modern, high-efficiency mills and manufacturing sites turn forest fibre into essential products for construction, hygiene, packaging, logistics, and energy.

We produce:

Market pulp (NBSK and NBHK) for paper, tissue, and packaging

High-quality lumber for structural and industrial applications

Cross-laminated timber (CLT) for mass timber construction

Pallets and packaging for safe, sustainable transport

Renewable biofuels and green energy from residual fibre

Biochemicals and biomaterials to replace fossil-based inputs

Our operations are designed for efficiency and circularity. We use nearly every part of the tree, reduce emissions, and continuously invest in cleaner, smarter technologies. Our fibre is sourced from well-managed forests and backed by independent certification standards that reflect environmental, social, and economic best practices.

Sustainability is embedded in how we operate—from resource use to community engagement. We work closely with Indigenous communities, local partners, and industry to ensure our impact is measurable and long-term.

Our workplace culture is built on safety, respect, and continuous improvement. We believe that strong performance comes from collaboration and integrity, and we support our people with opportunities to grow and contribute globally.

Whether you’re building with wood, innovating in renewable products, or pursuing a career in a purpose-driven company, we invite you to explore Mercer International.

 Learn more at mercerint.com

Name: Bahia Specialty Cellulose (Subsidiary of Bracell Limited)
Description: Bahia Specialty Cellulose (BSC) is the biggest Latin American producer of specialty cellulose from eucalyptus wood. With an annual production capacity of 500,000 tons of specialty cellulose, BSC is part of Bracell Limited.

Name: Alas Doradas S.A. de C.V.
Description:
Alas Doradas es uno de los dos principales fabricantes de papel absorbentes en toda Centro América.
A su vez, es una empresa perteneciente al GRUPO COEN, quienes son uno de los principales conglomerados empresariales de Centroamérica y México.

Nos caracterizamos  por emplear tecnología de última generación y uso de materia prima reciclada, generando anualmente más de 30,000 toneladas de productos derivados del papel, siendo los principales, papel higiénico, papel toalla y servilletas.



Facebook: @AlasDoradasOfficial

Name: SWM do Brasil
Description:
Somos uma multinacional produtora de papéis para indústria do tabaco e soluções em papéis especiais.

Somos fabricantes especializados de uma variedade de materiais avançados, presentes no dia a dia das pessoas. Na verdade, você provavelmente já usou um produto SWM mesmo sem saber. 

Colaboramos com nossos clientes para fornecer soluções inovadoras e personalizadas para aumentar o valor de seus produtos. 

Nossa equipe global se esforça para superar as expectativas com recursos e tecnologias de fabricação de classe mundial, um portfólio de produtos expandido e nossa crescente presença internacional.

Name: TAPPI
Description: TAPPI is the leading association for the worldwide pulp, paper, packaging, and converting industries and publisher of Paper360º and TAPPI JOURNAL. Through information exchange, trusted content, and networking opportunities, TAPPI helps members elevate their performance by providing solutions that lead to better, faster, and more cost-effective ways of doing business. PIMA operates as the Management Division of TAPPI.

Name: Star Paper Mill Paper Industry LLC
Description:
Star Paper Mill, a new and modern tissue paper manufacturing mill spread over 27,000 sqm, is located in the growing Industrial City of Abu Dhabi (ICAD), UAE. Our machine has been manufactured by M/S Recard Spa, Italy. It is a crescent former tissue machine with the latest flexi-nip shoe press technology, enabling us to achieve higher bulk and softness. The machine deckle is 3.6 m having two rewinders with a capability of rewinding upto 4 ply. The annual production capacity is about 34,000 tonnes of world-class prime quality virgin tissue paper.  

We are striving to follow the best environmental practices and to source the pulp from responsibly managed forests including FSC certified. We will offer products that are manufactured to the highest standard of quality, together with the flexibility to meet the diverse needs of our valued customers locally & internationally.

Name: Western Forest Products
Description:
Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, with operations in the coastal region of B.C. and Washington State, Western makes beautiful, high-quality forest products that help build a better world.

We invest in manufacturing and pursue progressive approaches to safe and sustainable forestry practices to help support the health and prosperity of our business, forests and communities for generations to come.

Name: Kipaş Kağıt
Description:
Bir Kipaş Holding iştiraki olan Kipaş Kağıt Sanayi İşletmeleri A.Ş. 2014'ün başında tamamlanarak üretime geçmiştir.

 Yapılan bu yatırımla Avrupa standartlarında kağıt üretileceği için müşterilerimizin rekabet gücüne katkı sağlanacaktır. Hali hazırda desteklediğimiz geri dönüşüm çalışmaları daha da artırılarak bölgesel ve ülke genelinde geri dönüşüm oranının artırılması için gerekli projeler uygulamaya alınmıştır.

    Bir Kipaş Holding kuruluşu olan Kipaş Kağıt Sanayi İşletmeleri A.Ş. ve Teksan Ambalaj A.Ş. 2014 yılında güçlerini birleştirerek tek çatı altında Kipaş Kağıt İşletmeleri A.Ş. olarak faaliyetlerine devam etmektedir. Teksan Ambalaj şirketimiz, 1995 yılında tekstil sektöründe kullanılan ara mamulleri üretmek amacıyla kurulmuştur. Konik ve silindirik masura, Mifer Boru imalatı ile başlayan ürün skalası günün koşulları ve taleplere göre hızla geliştirilip, petek panel, petek seperatör, karton palet ve karton köşebent üretimiyle çeşitliliğini arttırmaya devam etmiştir.

Misyonumuz 

Doğayı gelecek nesillere miras bırakma bilinci ile müşterilerimizin ihtiyaç ve beklentilerine uygun ürünü ve hizmeti iş mükemmelliği çerçevesinde üretip Avrupa'nın ve dünyanın örnek kağıt şirketi olmak.

Name: Jari Celulose
Description:
Produtora de celulose para papel por mais de 40 anos, a Jari Celulose atua, a partir de 2014, no mercado de celulose solúvel, produto com possibilidades de aplicação em diversos segmentos. 
Com sede e operações industriais em Vila Munguba, município de Almeirim (PA), na região conhecida como Vale do Jari, a empresa possui 120 mil hectares certificados pelo FSC para manejo de florestas plantadas, bem como  certificação total de sua cadeia produtiva. Seu principal mercado é o asiático.

Name: Blendpaper
Description:
Pioneirismo e inovação são marcas da nossa história centenária.

Misturamos a tradição de mais de 130 anos com a inventividade de nossos especialistas, uma herança de conhecimento e experiências acumuladas, combinadas à inquietude que nos mantém sempre à frente.

Mesclamos nosso passado precursor com a inquietude que nos faz estar sempre à frente. Tudo isso, sem esquecer de um ingrediente especial que faz parte da nossa trajetória: a paixão em produzir um dos melhores papéis do mundo. 

Cada produto desenvolvido em nossa fábrica é resultado da mistura de fibras, elementos e cores e, sobretudo, inspiração, que se transformam em algo extraordinário.

Name: celulosaargentina
Description:
Celulosa Argentina S.A. is a leading company in the forest industry sector that integrates solid and sustainable forest development with the manufacture, marketing and distribution of successful high value-added products both in the domestic and global markets.

With activities in Argentina and Uruguay, Celulosa Argentina S.A. has consolidated as an integrated regional company with a high growth potential.

The Group operates within the following business units: Tissue Paper, Packaging Paper, Printing and Writing Paper, Cellulose Pulp, Forest, Wood and Distribution.

The forest area covers 11,464 hectares managed in accordance with the highest environmental guidelines under renowned international standards. Forest development is a strategic activity of our group, which invests in continuous improvement processes. Tree cloning in our nurseries allows us to achieve a high yield, keeping our commitment with the environment and the use of renewable resources.

The Group operates two major sawmills and a plywood mill, the Virasoro Industrial Center (Corrientes province, Argentina) and the San Charbel Industrial Center (Corrientes province, Argentina). These centers specialize in growing and processing eucalyptus and pine wood. The main products include plywood, floors, decks, tongue-and-groove boards, Plakimbres, beams, molding and construction wood. The GRANDIS brand is a quality benchmark of the products manufactured by the company.

Celulosa Argentina S.A. owns a pulp manufacturing plant and two paper manufacturing plants, located in Capitán Bermúdez (Santa Fe province, Argentina) and Zárate (Buenos Aires province, Argentina). The main products include printing and writing papers, tissue paper and packaging paper. Brands such as BOREAL, BOREALCEL, BOOKCEL, SPRING CEL , PAINTCEL, BOREAL GLOSS PLUS, BOREAL MATT PLUS, and PAMPA, among others, are top quality and excellent performance benchmarks in the different markets where we operate.

Name: Groupe SIAT
Description:
INFORMATIONS CLEFS : 

Date de création : 1818
Siège : Urmatt (67) > proche Strasbourg/Molsheim
Taille de l’entreprise : plus de 450 salariés
Secteurs d’activités : Industrie de 1ère et 2nde transformation du bois & Energie durable
Chiffre d’affaires : plus de 175 Millions d’euros
Moyenne d’âge (répartition Hommes/Femmes) : 43 ans / 41 ans
Ancienneté moyenne : 13 ans / 9 ans 
E-mail de candidature spontanée : recrutement@groupesiat.fr 
Site carrière : https://recrutement.groupesiat.fr/


LE GROUPE : 

Entreprise familiale indépendante de plus de 400 salariés, Groupe SIAT est une société industrielle basée à proximité de Strasbourg. Réalisant un chiffre d‘affaires de plus de 170 millions d’euros, le groupe s’est diversifié dans les métiers du bois et de l’énergie. Depuis 1818, l’amour du bois et de la forêt se sont transmis de génération en génération, sans jamais faiblir, pour devenir une véritable passion. 

Nous sommes profondément tournés vers l'avenir du fait de notre culture familiale et de notre activité éco-responsable. Nos valeurs : qualité, savoir-faire, outil de production à la pointe de la technologie et respect des Hommes. 

Nos 5 sites de production en Alsace et dans le Tarn regroupent notamment : 
- Une des scieries les plus importantes et modernes de France produisant 400.000 m³ de bois de charpente 
- Une Raboterie : la plus grosse unité française de bois blanc fabriquant tasseaux-moulures, bois de bardage, plinthes, etc.
- Une chaudière à biomasse fournissant de l’électricité (d’une puissance de 5,7 MW) 
- Une usine de production de pellets réalisant 120.000 tonnes/an de granulés de bois. 


REJOINDRE GROUPE SIAT : 

Pour nous, RH veut dire « Richesses Humaines » : ses hommes et ses femmes qui sont la force de notre Entreprise. C’est pourquoi nous investissons fortement dans la formation.
Aussi, notre volonté est de donner du sens et de faire que nos sites soient des lieux où l’on a plaisir à se retrouver.

Name: Essity
Description: A Leading Hygiene and Health Company

Name: PG Bison
Description:
We’ve made it our mission to inspire and help create the kind of beautiful living spaces in which people can thrive. Where they are happiest, where they work best and where they can connect more meaningfully.

We’re a proudly South African company, offering a comprehensive range of wood-panel based products for every application, from countertops to cabinets, built-in cupboards, shelving, and desking, for kitchen, living and working spaces.

Our designs are inspired by leading global trends and translated to be perfect here at home.  We prioritise excellence, focus on local manufacturing and are committed to only the most sustainable practices. 

Our trusted brands include MelaWood, MelaWood SupaGloss, MelaWood SupaMatt, MelaWood SupaTexture, SupaWood, Formica LifeSeal Worktops and BisonBord.

Name: PROTISA Perú
Description:
Somos PROTISA Perú, apasionados por ofrecer a los consumidores los mejores productos de higiene y limpieza personal, mejorando la calidad de vida con productos innovadores para cada etapa de su desarrollo. 

Buscamos construir un liderazgo sustentable a través de nuestras marcas y nuestra gente, con personas comprometidas y dispuestas a asumir nuevos retos dentro de una de las empresas líderes en el mercado de consumo masivo en el Perú.

Somos parte de CMPC, importante productor de papel tissue en Latinoamérica y a nivel mundial. Empresas CMPC cuenta con operaciones industriales en Chile, Argentina, Uruguay, México, Colombia, Ecuador y Brasil, además de Perú.

Si quieres conocer más sobre nuestra empresa y posiciones, te invitamos a revisar nuestras vacantes disponibles.

Name: HS Timber Group
Description:
As one of the leading companies in wood processing, we serve our commercial and industrial customers with more than 3,000 employees in 80 markets. Founded in Austria and managed from Vienna, we develop sophisticated solutions and high-tech products from the material of the future, wood, at seven production sites worldwide.

At HS Timber Group, everything revolves around one thing: the CO2-binding raw material wood. We procure it from sustainably managed forests, we process it in an energy-self-sufficient manner into products with high regional added value, for example for the living space of the future, and we research it in cooperation with scientists, e.g. at the Vienna University of Technology. Handshake quality and innovative spirit have been our success factors for centuries.

Name: ÇAMSAN ORDU A.Ş.
Description:
1984 yılında kurulan ve sektörde çeyrek yüzyılı geride bırakan Çamsan Ağaç Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş., 2011 yılından itibaren Çamsan Ordu dönüşümünü tamamlayarak MDF 'i Türkiye'ye tanıtmıştır. Türkiye ve Ortadoğu’da ilk, Avrupa'da dördüncü MDF fabrikası olarak kurulduğu yıldan itibaren ham madde alımlarından üretim hattına, piyasa sunduğu ürünlerden satışa kadar tüm birimlerde dünya kalite standartlarında üretim yapmayı ilke edinmiştir.

Türkiye'den ilk MDF ihracatını gerçekleştirerek Avrupa, Orta Doğu ve Afrika Ülkelerine ihracat yapmaya devam etmektedir.

Orman Sektöründe öncü olan Çamsan Ordu A.Ş, 2019 yılında MDF 3 tesisi için 70 milyon Euro yatırım yapmıştır. 2020 sonunda faaliyete başlayacak olan bu yeni tesis, Alman Dieffenbacher firmasının son teknoloji CPS+ pres sistemini kullanacaktır. Bu yatırım ile Çamsan Ordu pazar payını ve ürün çeşitliliğini artırarak MDF üretimini 2,5 katına, ihracat kapasitesini 3 katına çıkartmayı hedeflemektedir.

-

Çamsan Wood Industries and Trade was established in 1984 became one of the pioneering companies after experiencing a quarter-century. In 2011, Çamsan Ordu completed its transformation and was introduced MDF to Turkey.

Çamsan Ordu is proud to be Turkey's first, Europe's fifth Medium Density Fiberboard (MDF) (1984) and Melamine Faced MDF (1997) manufacturer. The company offers in all units is committed to making the production of world quality standards.

The first MDF exports from Turkey has accomplished by Çamsan Ordu and it continues to export to Europe, the Middle East, and African Countries.

Çamsan Ordu A.Ş., a pioneer in the Forestry Sector, invested 70 million Euros in 2019 for the MDF 3 facility. This new facility, which will start operating at the end of 2020, will use the latest technology CPS + press system of the German company Dieffenbacher. Thanks to the investment, Çamsan Ordu aims to increase its market share and product range, ascending its MDF production 2.5 times and it's export capacity 3 times.

Name: Pulp and Paper Technology
Description:
We are the largest publication in providing the latest information about Pulp & Paper Technology, with an operation more than decade. Pulp & Paper Technology has evolved itself to be the best on predicting the latest trends in the Pulp & Paper Sector. We advertise and market the most pioneer companies in this sector catering the needs. We proclaim much of pride in contributing significant analysis of the rapid developments by channelizing the right market strategies, minute to minute feeds and coupling dominant businesses. Most of the Suppliers that have engaged with us have a reputation in this Industry for more than 15 years. 

As a part of Ochre Media we are a dedicated online Business to Business [B2B] platform for Pulp & Paper which provides Businesses to Advertise, Market and Publish their Services; we have been in the industry globally for over 11years and going strong with a ubiquitous influence in web media. In Pulp & Paper Technology we deliver the clientele the required necessary support in-terms of marketing to build their Businesses by bringing the buyers closer to them.
 

Pulp & Paper Technology has involved itself to gain a unique reputation of building a Buyers/Suppliers/Subscribers base of 190,000+ and Daily page visitors of more than 15,000+.

In this Portal we offer various kinds of news, articles, newsletters, supplier profiles, research analysis etc. relating to the Pulp & Paper Technology.

Name: DIE PAPIERINDUSTRIE e. V.
Description: DIE PAPIERINDUSTRIE e. V. is the German paper manufacturers association based out of Gertraudenstrasse 20, 10178 Berlin, Germany.

Name: Forestry Innovation Investment
Description:
Established in 2003, Forestry Innovation Investment (FII) is B.C.’s market development agency for forest products. As a Crown agency of the B.C. government, FII supports the development and diversification of markets for B.C. forest products to ensure the forest sector remains a key contributor to the provincial economy. We work in collaboration with the forest industry, research institutions and other stakeholders to deliver innovative, forward-looking programming that responds to today’s domestic and international market dynamics while positioning B.C. for tomorrow’s challenges and opportunities. For more about FII, please visit www.bcfii.ca. 

FII also produces naturally:wood, an information resource showcasing British Columbia as a global leader in wood construction and a supplier of quality, environmentally responsible wood products from sustainably managed forests. Topics covered range from the latest research in wood performance, calculating carbon, code development, prefabrication, mass timber construction, B.C. forestry management practices, and much more. To access these resources or to learn more about naturally:wood, please visit www.naturallywood.com.

Name: Century Paper & Board Mills Ltd
Description:
Century Paper & Board Mills Limited (CPBM), established in 1984, is Flagship Company of the Lakson Group of Companies – Pakistan. The Company started commercial production in 1990 and established its name as major producer of quality Packaging boards in the country. It has attained a position of Market Leader in Packaging Boards in particular and is considered as most Preferred Supplier to Printing and Packaging Industry. The Company serves many of the prestigious clientele and maintaining Strategic Business Relationships with leading Packaging and Converting units as well as end users, which include national and multinational companies. The Company is also in export business and its Packaging Boards are successfully competing in the international market.
The company entered into Corrugated Cartons Manufacturing Business in 2003 by installing “Agnati” Italian corrugators, renowned name in the industry. The plant is capable to cater large continuous orders for different types of boxes to serve multifarious sectors including Soaps & Detergents, Home Appliances, Dairy Products, Ice Cream, Food and Beverages, Cigarettes and Tobacco and Lubricants etc. Being vertically integrated corrugation unit with companies own Liner and Fluting supplies the plant has an edge to ensure consistency in supplies and quality.
The company is managed by a competent team of professionals in all the relevant fields like Process, Paper Technology, Engineering, Finance, Business Management and Human Resource. The Company assigns great importance to its Human Capital Development and has been managing Trainings of its professionals by sending them to Foreign and Local Training Programs / Exhibitions / Courses.
The plant comprising of Seven Paper Machines (PMs), a Complete Corrugated Cartons Manufacturing Plant, Integrated Pulp Mills (Major Inputs Wheat Straw), in house Engineering Workshop, Captive Power Generation Plant, and Chemical House etc. is situated on 162 Acres close to major business city (Lahore) of the country.

Name: PaperOne
Description:
First launched on 6 May 1998 by APRIL Group, PaperOne offers a comprehensive range of Office Paper products, Printing & Publishing Paper, as well as Digital Paper for commercial printing and converting purposes.

Enhanced with our ProDigi HD Print Technology, our paper delivers professional print quality. PaperOne products are also made with 100% renewable fibers from sustainable sources and sold in more than 70 countries worldwide.

With sustainability being an utmost priority here at PaperOne, we employ a wide range of practices ranging from sustainable sourcing, sustainable forest management, recycling and more, that has garnered us the Programme for the Endorsement of Forest Certification (PEFC) and Global Eco-Label accreditions. As part of our commitment to deliver a positive impact on climate, nature and people while growing our business sustainably, APRIL Group's vision of APRIL2030 seeks to achieve net zero carbon emissions from our land use, positive measurable gains in nature, and zero extreme poverty in our communities.

Join us and be a part of our network and community as we journey to a more sustainable future together!

For enquiries, please write to customer_service@aprilasia.com.

Name: Sveaskog
Description: Sveaskog is Sweden's largest forest owner and leading supplier of timber, pulpwood and biofuel. The company works with land sales, caters for hunting and fishing and provides land for local entrepreneurs within eco-tourism. Forestry is our core business. The focus is on silviculture, the sale of forest products and the development of the forest's other values.

Name: York Timbers
Description:
York Timbers is a leading integrated forestry company, operating both plantations and processing plants. We specialize in converting forest resources into high-quality lumber and plywood products. Our plantations are managed in accordance with ecologically sound practices, adhering to the strict standards set by the Forestry Stewardship Council (FSC). This certification underscores York’s commitment to sustainability, benefiting not only our people but also the surrounding communities, the environment, and our valued customers.

As lumber demand in Southern Africa continues to outpace supply, York is strategically positioned for growth. By optimizing our plantations, enhancing processing efficiency, and leveraging market access through robust distribution channels, we are significantly boosting our revenue-generating capacity.

With York Timbers currently trading at a substantial discount to its tangible net asset value, we present an outstanding investment opportunity for those seeking both financial returns and a stake in a responsible, future-focused business.

Name: Hampton Lumber
Description:
Hampton Lumber is a fourth-generation, family-owned company headquartered in Portland, OR.  With over 1,700 employees, Hampton operates nine sawmills in Oregon, Washington, and British Columbia and markets wood products all over the world.  Hampton’s mills process logs from nearby private and public forests and from Hampton’s own timberlands. All of Hampton’s forestlands are certified by the Sustainable Forestry Initiative (SFI), an independent, non-profit organization that promotes sustainable forest management. SFI certified forests play an important role in water conservation, wildlife habitat, and climate solutions.

Our Mission
To grow, manufacture, and market renewable wood products and deliver innovative solutions for a more sustainable built environment.  

Our Vision
To be a thriving family-owned company and North America's preferred source for responsibly-sourced wood solutions. 
 
Our Values
Safety – Prioritize safety across all operations. 

Integrity & Authenticity – Operate honestly and ethically while preserving our distinctive family-owned brand. 

Responsible Stewardship – Endeavor to balance and maintain economic, social, and environmental values in everything we do. 

Tenacity – Embrace challenges with grit, determination, and a can-do spirit.  

Continuous Improvement – Strive to enhance our processes, products, and people. 

Customer Satisfaction – Be nimble, responsive, and solutions-oriented. 

Community Engagement – Be a responsive, supportive, and respected member of the community.

Name: PT Fajar Surya Wisesa,Tbk
Description: FajarPaper is a leading packaging paper manufacturer in Indonesia with an installed capacity of 1,300,000 metric tons per year and a range of products which include Kraft Liner Board and Corrugated Medium Paper for carton-box packaging and Coated Duplex Board for display packaging.

Name: Guaçu S/A de Papéis e Embalagens
Description:
MISSÃO
Nossa missão é oferecer soluções em embalagens que agreguem valor ao produto dos nossos clientes.
Através da dedicação à pesquisa e desenvolvimento de novas embalagens e do fornecimento fiel, seguro e flexível procuramos atender a todos os requisitos de nossos clientes, conferindo a necessária diferenciação que nos permita o crescimento contínuo e sustentável.

VALORES
• Ética, cordialidade, respeito e transparência no trato com todos os nossos colaboradores, clientes, fornecedores e parceiros de negócios.

• Incentivo a pesquisa de necessidades, desenvolvimento de soluções e inovação constantes.

• Valorização dos diferentes talentos individua

POLÍTICA DA QUALIDADE
• Pesquisar constante e pro ativamente as necessidades de nossos clientes buscando de forma criativa e econômica satisfazê-las de maneira completa, demonstrando comprometimento com a melhoria contínua.

• Incentivar nossos colaboradores, fornecedores e demais parceiros comerciais a conosco participarem do esforço contínuo para aumentar a satisfação de nossos clientes..

• Obter o justo retorno financeiro baseado na excelência do atendimento e o comprometimento em satisfazer os requisitos aplicáveis.

Name: EACOM Timber Corporation, a subsidiary of Interfor
Description:
EACOM Timber Corporation is a major Canadian wood products company formed in 2008. Its operations include the manufacturing, marketing and distribution of lumber and wood-based value-added products, and the management of forest resources. EACOM owns seven sawmills, a remanufacturing facility and an engineered I-joists plant for a total of 1 200 employees. Many of these mills have a long, rich history having been part of their communities for over 100 years. EACOM has a production capacity of approximately 960 million board feet of lumber and holds Crown logging rights of approximately 3.5 million cubic meters annually. 
The Company is committed to investing in strong assets, including healthy forests, advanced technology and talented people.

Name: Bignardi - Indústria e Comércio de Papéis e Artefatos
Description:
A trajetória do Grupo Bignardi começou em 1956 com uma pequena gráfica, localizada no centro da cidade de São Paulo, na rua Jandaia, que fabricava impressos gráficos, cadernos e listas telefônicas.


Em razão de seu crescimento, após anos de operação na cidade de São Paulo, a gráfica foi transferida para Caieiras, provendo deste modo, as condições necessárias para a evolução da empresa. Sempre atento às oportunidades de crescimento, José Bignardi Neto, fundador da companhia, sentia necessidade de realizar novas aquisições. Assim, em meados da década de 70, adquiriu a indústria de papel Gordinho Braune, localizada em Jundiaí.


Além do crescimento das indústrias, também foi aberta uma operação atacadista, o Atacado Jandaia, especializado em materiais escolares e de escritório, localizado na cidade de São Paulo. E assim formou-se o Grupo Bignardi, o qual atualmente é um dos grandes fabricantes de cadernos do Brasil e o maior fabricante brasileiro de papel reciclado para impressão e escrita.

Name: Navigator Tissue UK
Description: Navigator Tissue UK is a leading tissue converter producing toilet roll, kitchen roll, facial tissue and wet wipe products for most of the UK's major grocery retailers.

Name: Vinda Paper - Overseas Market
Description:
1- 4 Business Segments: Tissue, Incontinence Care, Feminine Care, Baby Care
2- 14 World-class Production Bases
3- Our Brand: Vinda, Tork, Tempo, TENA, Dr.P, Libresse, VIA, Libero, Drypers, OEM/ODM
T:  +86 7506880163 
E:  export@vinda.com
A:  No.65 Huicheng Donghou Road, Xinhui District, Jiangmen City,Guangdong,China

Name: Umka Board Mill
Description:
Umka Cardboard Mill has been manufacturing cardboard since 1939 (cardboard and pasteboard). Today, Cardboard Mill is producing recycled cardboard ("white-lined chipboard") in the following qualities GD2 – Umka Color (230-450gsm), GD3 – Umka Pak (230-450gsm), GT2 – Umka Special (280-450gsm), GD2 -Umka Liner (160-210gsm) and GD2 - Umka Brown Back (300-450gsm).  

Currently, the Mill operates with a capacity of approximately 220,000 t/year. 
Recycled cardboard has a wide range of applications in the food and beverage, confectionary, pharmaceutical, chemical, tobacco and spare parts industry. The board is also used for lamination in the production of transport packaging. 
Board is delivered in sheets and reels, depending on the customer’s request. The width of the cardboard machine is 320cm.

Name: Corex Holding
Description:
Corex is the cores, tubes and edge protectors division of VPK Packaging Group, a rapidly growing integrated industrial group. VPK Packaging Group operates in the cardboard packaging sector and has around 6 100 staff spread across 65 plants in 20 European countries.

Corex has approximately 1 300 employees. Our 29 manufacturing locations -  spread across 15 countries from Europe to Asia - produce coreboard for various applications, as well as a range of converted products: spiral and parallel wound cores and tubes, edge protectors and consumer packaging.

Name: Sondos
Description:
In the field of fast moving consumer goods, Sondos provides soft tissues made of 100% pure wood pulp. This guarantees its softness, strength and resistance to wetness with high absorption specifications. Sondos tissues do not contain any harmful chemical materials and is therefore safe and healthy for usage.

Commonly used in homes and offices, Sondos tissue boxes have become an icon that continuously proves Sondos’s superiority as a premium brand that takes care of the consumers daily life within the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia,while its identity reflects the strength and softness of world-class tissues available to everyone.

Name: Nordic Ventures Group
Description:
Nordic Ventures Group (NVG) is a trading company providing solutions, sales and service for Asian pulp and paper industry. We represent cutting edge technologies which enable our customers to improve efficiency, productivity and profitability. NVG has proven track record of being a reliable partner for both our customer and suppliers since 1991.

Let's get connected today !

Name: International Forest Business Confernece
Description: The International Forest Business Conference (IFBC) gathers global experts to discuss megatrends shaping responsible forest and wood industry investments. This two-day event will bring together forest investment managers, institutional investors, IT innovators, and sustainable wood industry leaders to exchange ideas and explore the future frontiers of the forest business.

Name: Tulsa S.A.
Description: Empresa chilena dedicada a la fabricación y comercialización de paneles para la construcción, somos lideres en la producción de Film Face, HDO y MDO

Name: ZELLCHEMING
Description:
Connecting. Innovative. Inspiring.

ZELLCHEMING is an independent, interdisciplinary, technical-scientifical platform in the field of bioeconomy with a focus on pulp, paper and fiber-based materials.

We see ourselves as a network partner who accompanies the transformation of the industry to the production of renewable products across industries.

We organize ourselves in 14 technical committees with the task of dealing with current and future-relevant topics in the technological and technical exchange of experience.

For network enhancement purposes we organize district group meetings and conferences on a regular basis and are host of the ZELLCHEMING-Expo.

Our association is a competent partner for the career management of the pulp and paper industry's young generation. We support the paper engineers' Aktivitas associations through free student memberships.

By granting scholarships we support abroad semesters and on occasion of our Annual General Meeting young talents are offered the possibility to present their master's theses and research studies.

Name: Manufacturas de Papel Manpa S.A.C.A
Description: Manufacturas de Papel, C.A. (MANPA) S.A.C.A, es una empresa dedicada a la producción, conversión, comercialización y distribución de papel para uso industrial, comercial, doméstico, escolar y de oficina.

Name: PT. Sopanusa Tissue & Packaging Saranasukses
Description:
PT. Sopanusa Tissue & Packaging Saranasukses commenced its operation in May 1995. Our company sites in a 20 hectares land, in the city of Mojokerto. We run a 3,5 meter Cresent Former, producing all types of quality tissue paper, such as Facial Tissue, from 11 to 45 gsm, one to three plies paper.

Today, we have exported more than 80% of our production capacity, serving customers in more than 60 countries all across the 5 continents. Our company certainly has grown steadily and will keep on progressing by quickly responding to the ever-changing market demand.

Our passion to quality tissue paper for comfort and hygiene purposes keeps us on developing products that are functional, comfortable and pleasant. With our integrated line, we are able to flexibly support your every detail of need and value.

We provide non brand and special packaging design product such as:
M Fold Towel
Jumbo Toilet Roll
Kitchen & Toilet Roll
Coreless and Toilet Toll
¼ Fold Napkin, 1/8 Fold Napkin
Compact / Tall Fold Napkin
Pocket Tissue

We are committed to further development and diversification of our product range, consolidating operations of companies, increasing the size and capacity of our production and joining our hands with our affiliates in the belief that these result in the realization to be a leading organization in its field. We are committed to use natural renewable plantation and certified resources fiber content materials for our greener planet.

Name: Forest Business Analytics
Description:
Forest Business Analytics (FBA) was established to address the worldwide demand for professional advisory services in international forest valuations (appraisals), due diligence, and consultancy services related to global timberland
investments, forest management options, forest inventory, timber sales, and estate management. Our multi-disciplinary team of experienced specialists helps in identifying and analyzing forest investment opportunities in the Asia-Pacific, Americas, Africa, and Europe, and also is assisting in raising capital for private-equity forest funds.

Name: Confederation of Paper Industries
Description:
The Confederation of Paper Industries (CPI) aims to unify the UK’s Paper-based Industries with a single purpose in promoting paper’s intrinsic value as a renewable and sustainable fibre-based material, enhancing its competitiveness through seeking to reduce legislative and regulatory impacts and in spreading best practice.

CPI represents the supply chain for paper, comprising recovered paper merchants, paper and board manufacturers and converters, corrugated packaging producers and makers of soft tissue papers.

CPI is working to promote:

•	a positive image for paper
•	secure energy supplies at competitive prices
•	resource efficiency within a coherent waste strategy
•	the benefits of packaging
•	a sustainable UK Paper Industry
•	manufacturing as a vital part of a balanced economy
•	a competitive, level playing field for the UK’s Paper-based Industries

CPI represents 67 Member companies from an industry with aggregate annual turnover of £13 billion, with 56,000 direct and a further 59,000 indirect employees.

Name: naturally:wood
Description:
naturally:wood is a community and go-to information source where you can learn about British Columbia’s forests and forest products. Here you’ll discoversome of the world’s healthiest forests, leading technology and world-class expertise. Discover the possibilities of this centuries-old building material from talltimber towers and expressive long-span structures to new biomass and wood fibre products that are better for ourplanet. 
 
Innovative wood architecture and engineering is on the rise here in British Columbia, Canada and around the world. Fuelled by new products, systems and buildings, advancements in technology and a growingvolume of practical research.

Name: Quanta Paper Corporation
Description:
Quanta Paper Corporation is a manufacturing company that is committed to producing and selling good quality and eco-friendly tissue and personal care products that meet regulatory and statutory standards and exceed customer expectations.

An ISO 9001: 2015 – certified company, Quanta promotes good manufacturing practices that ensure the reliability and responsibility to quality and safety at all times  

Quanta has invested in modern equipment that allows for the production of high-quality tissue paper and personal care products. This has allowed the company to cater to the day to day requirements of consumers in all parts of the Philippines.

Through its Sales and Distribution company, Quanta Paper Marketing, Incorporated, Distribution Centers and Distributor Partners are strategically located in Luzon, Visayas, and Mindanao, to make the company’s presence felt in every Filipino household.

Making all these possible, is the collection of talent, technical know-how, passion and dedication of its people who are considered to be, the most important resource of the company.

Quanta aims to develop its people to be the best version of themselves by providing individual development programs, functional and technical training, employee engagement activities and professional opportunities that will bring them a step closer to their aspirations.

Name: REVEAU MENUISERIE
Description:
Basés à Combrand dans les Deux-Sèvres, nous fabriquons des menuiseries en bois selon un savoir-faire traditionnel depuis plus de 150 ans. Entreprise familiale depuis 5 générations, le bien-être de nos salariés et la qualité de vie au travail sont pour nous de réelles priorités pour que nos collaborateurs puissent travailler dans de bonnes conditions. 
Rejoignez-nous !

Name: The Teal-Jones Group
Description:
Teal Jones is BC’s largest privately-owned coastal forestry company.

A family-owned value-added manufacturer, the company employs more than 1,000 people directly in woods and sawmill operations across B.C., plus numerous contractors and service providers – many in remote communities where few other employment options exist. The company’s Surrey mill site and headquarters supports more than 500 jobs across seven specialized milling operations, giving the company the flexibility to ensure every log arriving at the site is directed to its highest-value potential.

Teal Jones has invested and committed to investing $60-million in its primary Surrey site since 2019 to strengthen its value-added manufacturing in British Columbia. The company ensures 100 per cent of every log it mills is used, with sawdust and chips directed to partners in pulp, paper, and biofuel production.

Name: Pinara Reflorestamento
Description: Empresa de reflorestamento de pinus.

Name: Colisa Artefatos de Papel
Description:
Atuando no segmento de artefatos de papel desde 2010, a COLISA está localizada na rodovia BR 277, na cidade de Campo Largo – PR, a empresa conta com uma estrutura com mais de 4.000m². 

Sua localização estratégica proporciona uma maior eficiência na realização de suas operações, atendendo de forma competente e rápida clientes localizados no mercado nacional e também nos países do MERCOSUL. 

A empresa possui parcerias sólidas com empresas fabricantes de papel, garantindo o fornecimento além de aumentar a competitividade e eficiência dos artefatos produzidos pela COLISA. 

Através da qualidade adequada de seus produtos e atendimento exclusivo, a COLISA conquista constantemente novos clientes e parceiros. Com isso se consolida no mercado cada vez mais.

Name: Quebec Wood Export Bureau
Description:
The Quebec Wood Export Bureau (QWEB) is a non-profit organization, founded in 1996, and whose mission is to develop overseas markets for wood products from Québec, maintain market access for these products and promote the use of wood in all markets, be it regional, provincial or national. QWEB has around 125 member companies  exporting wood products, included in the following wood transformation groups : softwood lumber and value-added softwoods, hardwood lumber and value-added hardwoods, hardwood flooring, wood construction and wood pellets. 

In order to reach its objectives relative to market access and market development, in addition to the directors dedicated to each group, QWEB can also count on specialised directors working in overseas offices : United-Kingdom (Farnborough Hants), France (Toulouse), China (Shanghai) and Japan (Tokyo). 

Finally, for many years now QWEB has been actively engaged in several international negotiation forums within which the use of wood material is considered as a concrete means to fight climate change. One of these forums is the Sustainable Buildings and Climate Initiative of the United Nations Environment Programme (UNEP).

Name: LUQUET ET DURANTON
Description:
Luquet et Duranton est une entreprise avec plus de 125 ans d’expertise dans la fabrication et la distribution d’imprimés et de façonnés techniques. 
Elle agit principalement auprès du secteur médical, des administrations et de l’industrie.
La société est organisée sous forme de 3 pôles d’activités : pôle façonnés, pôle connexe et pôle correspondance. 

Pour toutes questions ou demande d'informations vous pouvez nous contacter par mail à pld@luquet-duranton.fr

Name: Mafcote, Inc
Description: Mafcote is one of the largest paper coating companies in the US, manufacturer of lace paper doilies, poster board C2S, foam board and inkjet photo paper for the retail market as well as other types of paper products for industrial use. Royal Consumer Products takes the Mafcote manufactured products out to market. RCP distributes products under four well known brands: Royal Lace paper doilies, Royal Brites Poster Board, Accessories & Photo paper, Geographics Designer Stationery & Photo Paper and Sonburn Scrapbooking. FC Meyer Packaging llc is our folding carton manufacturing plant in Jeannette, PA.  Miami Wabash Paper llc in Wabash, IN is our paper coating operation.  Check out your company's website for more details.  Email resume/CV to job@mafcote.com to be considered for open positions.

Name: Elite Professional
Description:
NUESTRO PAPEL ES CUIDAR BIEN DE TI.

Elite Professional es parte de CMPC, grupo chileno pionero en la fabricación de celulosa y papel. CMPC es una de las empresas líderes de Latinoamérica en la producción y comercialización de productos forestales, celulosa, papeles, productos tissue y productos de papel. Sus productos se comercializan en 55 países a más de 20 mil clientes.

Elite Professional, es un novedoso concepto de servicio que brinda respuesta a las necesidades específicas de los diferentes ámbitos profesionales. Brindamos soluciones higiénicas integrales para empresas de servicios, industrias, hoteles, restaurantes y proveedores de catering, así como también hospitales e instituciones dedicadas a la salud.

Nuestros productos son de primera calidad y tienen una excelente performance para mejorar la experiencia de los usuarios y sumar valor a sus ambientes. The global quality paper produced by the Company serves the needs of innumerable industries in printing, writing, publishing, stationary,notebooks and packaging sectors in India, in the process contributing to the development of the nation.

WCPM is committed to stay alert and sensitive to the environmental consequences of its endeavors while persisting on the efforts to better its profits and business interests. We are an environmentally compliant Company that rigorously follows an Eco friendly policy that works towards increasing the green cover of our land and maintaining a sustainable environment for the health and well-being of the current and future
generations, particularly of those living in the close vicinity of the Mills.

WCPM follows Total Quality Management System (TQMS) in order to provide best quality products at optimal price to our customers.The highly coveted awards conferred on us by the reputed agencies,including awards from the National Productivity Council,Government of India,speak for themselves about our constant pursuit of industrial excellence.

In this, sustainability and respect for people and the environment are paramount. We use certified, renewable raw materials and our products are completely recyclable.

Maastricht Mill, situated on the river Meuse, boasts the PM6 one of the world’s biggest machines for poly-coated board. On that machine we produce graphic board and folding box board (FBB) for both the graphic and the packaging industry. Our graphic products stand out because of their excellent surface and printability. We supply a range of products, varying from matt to glossy. Name: SODEFOR
Description:
La Société de Développement des Forêts (SODEFOR), à l’origine Société de Développement des Plantations Forestières, est une société d’Etat créée le 15 Septembre 1966 par décret N°66-422 en vue « d’étudier et de proposer au Gouvernement de la Côte d’Ivoire, toutes les mesures tendant à assurer l’exécution des plans de développement de la production forestière et des industries connexes, soit par intervention directe, soit en coordonnant, en dirigeant et en contrôlant l’action des différents organismes publics ou privés intéressés.»

Elle passe successivement du statut de Société d’État à celui établissement Public à caractère Administratif (EPA) en 1980, puis Établissement Public à caractère Industriel et Commercial (EPIC) en 1985. Et, suite à l’audit de gestion du secteur forestier, elle change de nom par décret N° 93-206 du 03 février 1993 et redevient une Société d’État.

Dès lors, Société de Développement des Forêts placée sous la tutelle technique et administrative du Ministère chargé des Eaux et Forêts et sous la tutelle Ministère d'État chargé du Budget et du portefeuille de l'État, elle reste le principal instrument de l’instauration de la politique forestière du gouvernement ivoirien.

La SODEFOR demeure l’unique gestionnaire des 234 forêts classées en Côte d’Ivoire et se présente aujourd’hui comme une société d’État avec un Conseil d'Administration, une Direction Générale qui en est à son dixième titulaire. Un comité consultatif et stratégique, 5 directions centrales, 9 centres de gestions et 57 unités de gestion forestière.

Description:
We are a British Columbia based wood products company that partners with First Nations and BC communities and that utilizes mainly deciduous trees, forest residuals and waste biomass, to make sustainable, renewable wood products that reduce the carbon footprint of today’s energy sources.

Our goal is to be an enterprise supplier of biomass products to the global renewable energy market at home and abroad.  Our cornerstone project will produce renewable energy in the form of industrial wood pellets for electricity generation for global utilities and large-scale power generators.  
Sustainably produced wood pellets are used as an alternative fuel, replacing fossil fuels like coal. Our wood pellets are used to supply renewable and reliable baseload power. 

In partnership with the Fort Nelson First Nation we are working together to build a commercial scale pellet plant in Fort Nelson, BC.  When commissioned in 2022, the Fort Nelson Pellet Plant will produce 600,000 tonnes per year for export to Asia and Europe. 

Peak Renewables' portfolio of projects feature sustainable biomass to energy products. We are committed to sustainably harvested biomass and carbon friendly production and embrace the ESG principles of Environment, Social and Governance.

The company is known as an innovator in collaborative product development and partnerships, and has diversified into several uncoated, specialty and technical product segments. Our customer-driven organization that offers accessibility and flexibility to meet the demands of today's market.

Our corporate headquarters and manufacturing facility are located in Combined Locks, Wisconsin. The facility has an annual production capacity of 400,000 tons on three paper machines, and an adjacent coating and finishing complex with processing capacity of 280,000 tons. The company employs about 570 workers, including approximately 400 employees represented by the USW Local 2-144.

Since 1889, Appleton Coated has manufactured paper in Combined Locks, Wisconsin.

Name: FORMABOIS
Description:
FORMABOIS

Le Comité sectoriel de main-d’œuvre du bois (FORMABOIS) est un organisme sans but lucratif reconnu par la Commission des partenaires du marché du travail.

Le Comité soutient et initie, des activités pour la qualification de la main-d'œuvre et la gestion des ressources humaines. Il favorise le développement de l’emploi et la concertation.

Notre action dans l'industrie

Le Comité réalise des analyses et études pour déterminer les besoins de formation du secteur, conçoit, en collaboration avec ses partenaires, des outils permettant à la main-d’œuvre du secteur de s’adapter contribuant ainsi au développement des compétences et de l’emploi.

Le Comité élabore chaque année un plan d’action conformément à l’entente-cadre convenue avec la Commission des partenaires du marché du travail. Une fois approuvé par le conseil d’administration, le plan d’action est mis en application.

Les actions du Comité couvrent différents volets, notamment :

Assurer la représentativité du secteur;
Développer le partenariat et la concertation entre les partenaires;
Contribuer au développement, à la reconnaissance et à la pleine utilisation des compétences de la main-d’œuvre;
Contribuer à l’enrichissement de la connaissance du marché du travail.

Name: QBIK AB
Description:
Qbik
VÅR HISTORIA

Brattby Sågverks AB och NK Lundströms Trävaror AB storsatsar i ett gemensamägt virkesköpande företag för långsiktig sågtimmerförsörjning till sina sågverk. I Qbik AB sammanför de båda sågverken sina egna virkesköpande organisationer. Under 90 år har Qbiks ägare NK Lundströms Trävaror AB och Brattby Sågverks AB förädlat de lokala västerbottniska skogarna. Det är nästan ett sekel av kunskap och kännedom om hur de västerbottniska skogarna bäst förädlas. Under hela den perioden, nästan lika lång som omloppstiden för en norrländsk fura, har företagen ständigt utvecklats skapat framgång och tillväxt. I det ligger också den utvecklade relationen till de skogsägare som brukar västerbottens skogar, att genuint förstå deras utmaningar och behov. Det är fantastiskt mycket värt i den satsning som nu kommer.

Nya utmaningar kommer hela tiden och ägarföretagens styrka är, och kommer alltid vara kvickhet från tanke till handling. Nu har det på kort tid skett stora förändringar i västerbottens virkesmarknad samtidigt som vi ser fantastiska möjligheter framåt för våra trävaror. Därför är tiden inne för för handling! En offensiv satsning på gemensam råvaruanskaffning –därför skapar vi tillsammans skogsföretaget Qbik.

Qbik är en satsning som ska säkra vår fortsatta utveckling mot över 100 år i branschen! Vi vill tydligt visa vår ambition och långsiktighet. Vi vill göra affärer direkt med människorna som delar vår passion för vår hållbara värdekedja från skog till produkter – vi ser er lokala skogsägare som nyckelpersoner för vår framgång! Med denna satsning får vi två finansiellt starka ägare, all vår gemensamma erfarenhet, alla våra skogliga medarbetare som redan idag jobbar med er skogsägare och våra duktiga samarbetspartners och entreprenörer, och framför allt, alla relationer med er skogsägare. Vi satsar bara större och siktar högre.

Description:

Name: Ateş Orman Ürünleri
Description:
Ateş Orman Ürünleri Nak. İnş. San. ve Tic. Ltd. Şti. 1979 yılında Ateş Kaplama adı altında Şevket Ataş tarafından kurulmuş ve ticaret hayatına İstanbul Beyoğlu’nda başlamıştır. Beyoğlu’nda ahşap kaplama ve kereste toptan perakende satışı ile başlayan hizmet ağı, 1995 yılından itibaren Ateş Orman Ürünleri Ltd. Şti. Ataşehir Fetih Mahallesi’nde merkez olarak 1000 m2 kapalı alanda faaliyetini genişletilerek, sunta, suntalam, mdf, mdflam, kontrplak, parke ve bunun gibi ürünlerin satış ve pazarlamasını yapmaya başlamıştır.

2004 yılında Ümraniye Dudullu’da açılan 2000 m2 kapalı alana sahip 2. şube ile satış ağı daha da genişletilerek, mobilya ve mobilya sanayi kapsamına giren her türlü ham ve yarı mamul orman ürünlerinin satış ve pazarlaması yapılırken; 2007 yılında son teknoloji makine mobilya üretimine de başlamış ve birçok projenin altına imza atmıştır.

2012 yılının Mayıs ayında müşterilerine daha iyi hizmet vermek amacı ile Ferhatpaşa’da 5000 m2 kapalı alana sahip 3. şubesi de açılmıştır. Bununla birlikte ürün yelpazesi genişleyerek, daha geniş depolama alanı ile sektördeki yerini almıştır.

Ateş Orman Ürünleri, benimsemiş olduğu prensiplerle birlikte, kalite, fiyat dengesi ve duyduğu hassasiyet, ayrıca gerçekleştirdiği işlerde göstermiş olduğu titizliğin bir sonucu olarak oluşan müşteri memnuniyeti, bir defalık değil sürekli birlikte çalışmayı beraberinde getirmektedir.

Name: Midvale Paper Box
Description:
The Midvale team goes well beyond our own men, women, and machinery. We also represent our board mills, ink suppliers, die makers glue suppliers, and trucking companies. So we not only choose them very carefully, for reliability and competitive pricing, we re-evaluate them on a regular basis. At Midvale, we never forget it's our team against our competitors. The bottom line for us is your satisfaction.

We make sure we run at optimal efficiency every day. Our machinery is 125' long, runs at 500' per minute and prints up to 4 colors, cuts and strips, all in one pass, on one machine. It's called "web feed" production. Others use the "sheet feed" process in which it's necessary to print on one piece of equipment, die cut the form on another, and strip with pneumatic hammers, by hand, as the last step of production. This is both labor intensive and costly. Our efficient manufacturing is what sets us up to be reliable across the board. Last year we had a perfect record, with 100% on-time delivery for both standard and custom orders.

Name: Soltronic
Description:
Bienvenidos a Soltronic: tu socio en soluciones en papel y plástico.

En Soltronic, estamos comprometidos con la excelencia, proporcionando productos en papel y plástico en distintos formatos (bobina, hoja y personalizado) para satisfacer las diversas necesidades de la industria. Nuestra amplia gama de materiales incluye una variedad de opciones respaldadas por años de experiencia en la industria.

Papeles Sostenibles y de Calidad 

Nos enorgullece ofrecer una selección de papeles respetuosos con el medio ambiente, como el papel kraft reciclado, kraft liner y cartulinas de alta calidad. Estos materiales son ideales para una variedad de aplicaciones, desde embalaje hasta impresión. Además, disponemos de papeles blancos especialmente diseñados para plotters de impresión, ideales para patronaje, arquitecturas y artes gráficas, garantizando resultados nítidos y precisos en cada proyecto. Papeles microperforados especiales para mesas de corte automático de tejidos y fibras.

Plásticos para Todas las Necesidades 

En Soltronic, entendemos que la industria demanda una amplia variedad de plásticos para diferentes aplicaciones. Ofrecemos plásticos de alta y baja densidad, diseñados para proporcionar resistencia y versatilidad en proyectos de protección, embalaje y corte automático. Nuestros plásticos cumplen con los estándares más exigentes en cuanto a calidad y durabilidad.

Nuestro Compromiso con la Calidad y el Servicio 

La calidad y la satisfacción del cliente son nuestros pilares fundamentales. Nos esforzamos constantemente por mantener altos estándares de calidad en nuestros productos y brindar un servicio excepcional a nuestros clientes. Nuestro equipo está siempre dispuesto a asesorarte y encontrar las soluciones ideales para tus necesidades específicas.

En Soltronic, nos enorgullece ser tu socio confiable, No cuesta nada contactarnos y podría marcar una diferencia positiva en tu empresa!

КПК виготовляє кольорову основу пастельних та глибоко тонованих кольорів (кремовий, грейпфрутовий, оранжевий, червоний, бордовий, темно-синій, темно-зелений, чорний).

Для потреб клієнтів підприємство виготовляє продукцію з целюлози під брендом замовника (Private Label Products).

Кутники та гільзи КПК пропонує у найширшому діапазоні розмірів та профілів. Підприємство виготовляє гільзи з абсолютно точними геометричними параметрами та гарантує виробництво продукту з необхідним параметром вологості. 

КПК  виготовляє кутники із клейкою стрічкою для фіксації, що зменшує час пакування.

За потребою клієнта можливий кольоровий надрук зовні і всередині картонних виробів.

Name: MGJ Sp. z o.o.
Description:
MGJ is a family-owned company that has been operating continuously since 1995. As a leading sawmill in Poland, we specialize in the production of unedged hardwood lumber in thicknesses of 26–70 mm, including beech, oak, ash, birch, maple, and alder. We also offer high-quality dried beech timber – both white and steamed.

We approach every stage of production with the utmost precision: from sourcing raw material, through sawing, to the drying process. Our modern machinery park – featuring 4 saw lines and 24 drying chambers – allows us to process 50,000 m³ annually, ensuring consistent quality and on-time delivery.

Our professionalism, commitment, and comprehensive customer service have earned us recognition among clients worldwide. As a socially responsible company, we take into account environmental, social, and organizational aspects, continuously improving our production, sales, marketing, and logistics processes.

We invite you to collaborate with us – contact MGJ today!

 MGJ to rodzinna firma, która działa nieprzerwanie od 1995 roku. Jako wiodący tartak w Polsce specjalizujemy się w produkcji nieobrzynanej tarcicy liściastej o grubościach 26–70 mm, w tym z buku, dębu, jesionu, brzozy, klonu i olchy. Oferujemy również wysokiej jakości suszoną tarcicę bukową – zarówno białą, jak i parzoną.

Każdy etap produkcji realizujemy z najwyższą starannością: od pozyskania surowca, przez proces przetarcia, aż po suszenie. Nasz nowoczesny park maszynowy – obejmujący 4 linie trakowe i 24 komory suszarnicze – umożliwia nam przerób 50 000 m³ rocznie, gwarantując powtarzalną jakość i terminowe dostawy.

Profesjonalizm, zaangażowanie oraz kompleksowa obsługa klienta zdobyły nam uznanie odbiorców na całym świecie. Jako firma społecznie odpowiedzialna bierzemy pod uwagę aspekty środowiskowe, społeczne i organizacyjne, nieustannie udoskonalając procesy produkcji, sprzedaży, marketingu i logistyki.

Zapraszamy do współpracy – skontaktuj się z MGJ już dziś!
