Name: Waldverband - Holzklopfen
Description:
Der #WaldverbandÖsterreich ist eine Fachorganisation der Landwirtschaftskammer Österreich und bietet den acht Landesverbänden eine Plattform für gemeinsame Aktivitäten. 

Hauptaufgaben sind die Koordination und Vertretung der Interessen der Landeswaldverbände auf Bundesebene. Durch die gemeinsamen Aktivitäten sollen insbesondere die Produktion und die gemeinschaftliche Vermarktung von Holz zum Wohle der gesamten Österreichischen Forstwirtschaft vorangetrieben werden. Ein besonderes Anliegen ist die nachhaltige Rohstoffversorgung aller Kunden, um den Standort Österreich für dieForstwirtschaft und Holz verarbeitende Industrie zu sichern. Die Tätigkeiten sind nicht auf Gewinn ausgerichtet.

Der Waldverband Österreich sieht seine Aufgaben in
- Der Zusammenfassung und Vertretung der auf Landesebene organisierten Waldverbände in Österreich
- Der Förderung der Österreichischen Forstwirtschaft – insbesondere Produktion und Absatz von Holz und Biomasse
- Der Umsetzung der PEFC-Zertifizierung im Rahmen der gemeinschaftlichen Holzvermarktung als Dienstleistung für die Holzkunden
- Aktivitäten zur Vermarktung heimischer Christbäume
- Der Umsetzung der gemeinschaftlichen Holzvermarktung

#waldverbandösterreich #holzvermarktung #forstwirtschaft #österreichischeforstwirtschaft #nachhaltigkeit #nachhaltigeforstbewirtschaftung #pefc

Edgewood was acquired by Dunkley Lumber in 2019.

Founded in 1998, LM's steadfast commitment and sheer perseverance in spite of innumerable setbacks finally culminated in the discovery of a unique papermaking technology – one which supersedes the traditional method of using wood pulp – to produce a truly unique and eco-friendly tree-free paper.

With characteristic ingenuity, LM's "stone-papermaking methods" differs from "wood pulp papermaking methods" via the exclusive employment of a blend of mineral powder and a small infusion of non-toxic resin. Indeed, our papers are manufactured without the need to fell trees, without water pollution and without harmful gaseous wastes. An environmentally sustainable solution, this revolutionary stone papermaking technology has been patented in over 40 countries including Australia, Byelorussia, China, Europe, USA, and South Africa.

We make active contributions to protect our environment, the breathtaking inventions of "LM Paper Products" which are 100% pulp-free are the hard evidences of this.

Selbst modernste, bildschirmgestützte Kommunikationslösungen und die passende Hard- und Software gehören heute zu unserem Portfolio. Grund für diese permanente Entwicklung ist unser Ehrgeiz, Ideen und Lösungen für unsere Kunden zu finden. Dadurch haben wir es geschafft an und mit unseren Kunden zu wachsen, ihnen neue Geschäftsfelder zu eröffnen und zu jeder Zeit genau das anbieten zu können, was im Bereich Medien und Kommunikation gefragt ist. Und weil wir diese Zusammenarbeit als Partnerschaft verstehen, unterstützen wir Sie, Ihr Unternehmen erfolgreich in die Zukunft zu führen.
Kurz gesagt: Sie bekommen bei uns alles aus einer Hand, damit Sie professionell arbeiten und Ihre Kunden mit Leistung auf höchstem Niveau überzeugen können. Ob Sie aus den Bereichen Marketing, Werbetechnik, Verpackungsverarbeitung, Druck, Architektur, oder vielen anderen Sparten kommen – wir sind für Sie da. Vom ersten Beratungsgespräch bis hin zu einer auf Ihre persönliche Situation zugeschnittenen Finanzierung. Profitieren Sie zusätzlich von unserem Know-how, unserer Leistungsfähigkeit durch unser riesiges Partnernetzwerk und unserer Logistik- Kompetenz. Dies und mehr macht es uns möglich, unsere Produkte für Sie täglich verfügbar zu machen.

Name: Green Hygiene
Description:
Unser Green Hygiene Papier ist 100% PLASTIKFREI. Das fängt bereits bei der Verpackung an: Sie schützt sicher auch ohne Plastik. Denn darauf verzichten wir zu 100%. Der braune Karton unserer Produkte ist von der Herstellung über den Transport bis zur Lagerung vorbildlich. Selbst Klebebänder sind aus Papier, Umreifungen oder Folien sind plastikfrei. Das Design der Verpackungen haben wir auf zwei Druckfarben reduziert.

Toiletten- und Handtuchpapier AUS 100% RECYCELTEM ALTPAPIER. Mit der Produktreihe Green Hygiene haben wir jetzt eine große Lösung für unsere Umwelt realisiert. Alle Green Hygiene Produkte bestehen zu 100% aus recyceltem Altpapier. Trotzdem machen unsere Papiere bei der guten gewohnten Qualität keine Abstriche. Und dabei sind alle Produkte – vom Falthandtuch bis zur Rollenware – ebenso funktional und komfortabel wie bisher eingesetztes weniger umweltfreundliches Hygienepapier.

Unsere Produktion ist 100% CO2-NEUTRAL. Bei der Papierproduktion entsteht CO2. Wir reduzieren es durch moderne Anlagen, effektive Transportwege und plastikfreie Verpackung. Zur Neutralisierung des unvermeidbaren CO2 unterstützen wir für jeden Verkaufskarton Projekte bei ClimatePartner. Dafür gucken wir uns jeden Meter unserer Lieferkette an und analysieren gemeinsam mit ClimatePartner den spezifischen CO2-Ausstoß eines jeden Artikel von der Produktion bis zum Fachhändler. Wir unterstützen bei ClimatePartner das Projekt „Waldschutz, Pará, Brasilien“ (#1056) und kompensieren dort exakt entsprechend unserer Verkaufsmenge. Im Durchschnitt beträgt die CO2-Emission unserer Verkaufskartons 9 kg, wenn sie beim Fachhandel ankommen. Natürlich scheren wir nicht alle Produkte über einen Kamm, sondern gucken uns das für jeden Artikel genau an. 

Wenn Ihr Lust habt, dazu noch mehr zu erfahren, freuen wir uns über Eure Nachricht. 

https://www.green-hygiene.de/impressum/
Über diesen Link erreicht Ihr unser Impressum.

Name: FM Cartiere Srl
Description:
FM Cartiere Spa è specializzata nella produzione di cartoncino patinato multistrato da imballaggio a base di fibre di recupero.

Nello stabilimento di Momo (Novara) su una superficie di circa 46.000 mq di cui 15.000 mq coperti, è installata una macchina continua da 262 cm di larghezza. La formazione è combinata tamburi–telino. Una patinatrice è predisposta per i trattamenti del retro del cartoncino. La copertina è trattata con doppia stazione di patinatura. La finitura superficiale finale è ottenuta con passaggio in due calandre.

La capacità produttiva annuale è di 80.000 ton nelle grammature da 270 gr/mq sino a 600gr/mq. La gamma delle qualità prodotte comprende retro grigio, retro manilla (anche alimentare), retro bianco patinato e retro kraft alimentare. La produzione, allestita in formati e bobina, è trasformata nei reparti di taglio e allestimento dello stabilimento dove sono installate una ribobina e due taglierine simplex. La distribuzione si avvale di un Deposito di proprietà contiguo allo stabilimento e di altri Centri Logistici sul territorio per garantire un efficiente servizio di evasione degli ordini.

La produzione di FM Cartiere S.P.A. assicura elevata qualità grafica e cartotecnica e si caratterizza per un personalizzato rapporto con la Clientela in tutte le fasi della commessa compresa l’assistenza post vendita.

Name: Natural AS
Description:
At Natural, we believe the way we build today shapes the world we live in tomorrow. 

That’s why we develop and manufacture sustainable construction solutions from high-quality Nordic timber — combining technical precision with long-term environmental thinking.

With more than 30 years of experience and customers across 30+ countries, we serve architects, developers, wholesalers, and project partners around the world.

What makes us unique is the full integration of our operations.

We are the only planing mill in the Baltics with in-house engineering, a truss factory, and finishing services all in one place.

This allows us to offer tailor-made solutions from concept to completion, including design, estimation, manufacturing, and delivery.

But we’re not just building with wood. We’re building with purpose and moving steadily toward a circular economy model that minimizes waste and maximizes lifetime value.

Our 200Seasons cladding solution, backed by a 50-year warranty, is one of the first of its kind in the region.

Our vision is clear:

-> Building a sustainable future TOGETHER.

Our growth reflects this vision in action, but for us, long-term relationships matter more than short-term wins.

We invest in meaningful innovation, responsible sourcing, and honest cooperation across the entire value chain.

Our values guide every step:

- Sustainability First
- Kindness & Integrity
- Family & Responsibility
- Innovation with Purpose
- Togetherness

Name: Breathing Color
Description:
Welcome!  We're Breathing Color, designer and supplier of inkjet canvas, fine art paper, photo paper, and print varnish for fine art and photographic reproduction.  

We've taken a unique approach in our industry by being a manufacturer who sells our products directly to the people who will be using them.   We do this because we want you to know us.  And, we want to know you! 

Our main goal is to help you produce the highest quality prints possible.  We will do this with both our products and our service.  It's all about the art, and it's why many of the most renowned and influential photographers and print studios have chosen Breathing Color as their primary source for inkjet media.   For every year, our customers win print and photography competitions with our products, and we hope to empower you to do the same.  

We also want to help you grow your printing business.  We offer our PrintCraft Blog with printmaking tips & tricks, a library of how-to videos, and much more right here on our website and its all free.  If you'd like to call us or email us, we have friendly staff who will be excited to hear from you.  


To us, its all about service and giving.  Not only with our customers, but also to the industry, our communities, and the world.  We contribute regularly to schools, hospitals, environmental programs, and other charitable organizations.

Name: Blueline/Rediform, Inc.
Description:
Blueline-Rediform is a North American manufacturer of planners, business notebooks, forms and accounting supplies. Blueline was founded in Canada in 1917 by National Blank Book from Holyoke, MA.  Today, Blueline-Rediform is led by Harolde Savoy, the fourth generation of the Savoy family to own and manage this business.
Brands in Blueline-Rediform’s portfolio include: Brownline (since 1846), acquired by Blueline in 1994 and National (from the original company that founded in Blueline), acquired by Rediform in 2006. In 2013, Harolde Savoy acquired the FLB Group, based in Edinburgh, Scotland. This group possesses the world-famous Filofax brand of organizers (founded in 1921) and the Letts of London brand of diaries (since 1796 – Charles Dickens was a user of Letts!). Blueline-Rediform is the exclusive North American distributor for FLB Group products. 
Blueline-Rediform is also the exclusive distributor in the US and Canada for Schneider writing instruments, a leading and award-winning German manufacturer of ballpoint pens, roller balls, highlighters and markers. Schneider manufactures all of their products to the highest of ecological standards in Germany.
Blueline-Rediform has always been a leader for instituting initiatives over the years to help minimize its impact on the environment. Among these initiatives: the first company to feature its products with post-consumer recycled paper, utilize acid-free paper and vegetable oil-based inks. Most of Blueline dated products are FSC Certified to promote conscious management of the world’s forests. The Net Zero Carbon, DuraGlobe, and EcoLogix lines promote environmental responsibility and conservation. 
Our goal to provide value-added quality products at exceptional service levels is part of our secret to longevity in a volatile marketplace. Blueline-Rediform continues to grow with optimism for the future with unique and on-trend products.

Name: Frank Madeiras
Description:
Somos uma empresa do setor madeireiro, atuando em mais de 10 países ao redor do globo. Desenvolvemos e produzimos soluções em madeira de alta qualidade, destinado principalmente aos setores da construção civil, indústrias de embalagens, moveleira e embarcações. 

Nossa missão é Estruturar Sonhos. Transformando recursos renováveis em soluções de madeira para construção das mais diversas estruturas.

Os produtos de madeira que produzimos contribuem para uma sociedade mais sustentável, através da redução das emissões de carbono. Consequentemente, temos em nossa organização como um valor central o profundo respeito pelas nossas florestas de onde vem nossa matéria-prima. Dessa forma, todos os nossos produtos são fabricados a partir de florestas plantadas, provenientes de um manejo florestal sustentável.

Localizados na cidade de Campo do Tenente no estado do Paraná, em uma área de 74.000 m², sendo 10.000 m² de área construída, atuamos com uma sólida estrutura de produção em duas plantas industriais, atendimento comercial, logístico e pós-vendas, através uma equipe comprometida com a excelência na entrega dos serviços e produtos.

- Transport routier: Sapin dispose de sa propre flotte ainsi que de partenaires fiables pour le transport de plaquettes de bois et de rondins  

- Sourcing international: Ce département actif à travers toute l'Europe (UK, Irlande, Scandinavie, Pays Baltes, Russie, ...) s'occupe de l'achat et vente de bois sous toutes formes et essences (billons, bois de papier, plaquettes, bioénergie, ...) au niveau international. 

- Transport maritime et fluvial: Le département gère la logistique de façon optimale pour toutes les transactions du Sourcing international. C'est au moins une centaine de transport maritime et fluvial que gère ce département.

SAPIN S.A. est certifié PEFC CoC - FSC CoC - ISO 9001:2015

Description:

Over decade company specializes in executing design and construction of state of art liner board manufacturing facility, Our unmatched resources will always ensure client targets are met - and often exceeded. Name: Augusta Select Tissue
Description:
Green Bay Converting and its partners acquired the Augusta Select Tissue mill in Augusta, Georgia in 2007 to provide paper to the converting operations of GBC and GBC’s allied operations of Hattiesburg Paper Company.

The Augusta Select Tissue mill (AST) is a 20 acre paper mill site in Augusta, Georgia that is comprised of a new Metso DCT 100 (105” dry-crepe crescent former tissue machine) and an established pulping and de-inking operation. GBC and GBC’s allied companies have invested heavily in the Augusta Select Tissue Mill (AST) to enhance the legacy pulping operation and further enhance the new tissue mill. These efforts have resulted in the consistent production of high-quality pulp made from recycled fiber and the production of bath tissue, napkin and toweling grades of sanitary tissue that meets or exceeds accepted industry standards for sheet formation, basis weight consistency and tensile strength.

Through the acquisition of the Augusta Select Tissue, GBC has ready access to the parent rolls of bath tissue, towel and napkin stock the company needs to serve its customers finished products needs. GBC’s customers can take comfort in the fact that GBC can source the paper its customers need to grow from its own operations and further that this source is known for its consistency and cost-effectiveness.

Name: ARA Timber
Description:
ARA TIMBER AB is a leading company in sales of sawn timber to the Middle East and North Africa. Our head office is located in Göteborg, Sweden and we have a local sales office in Dubai, UAE. Among our main products are Scandinavian pine and spruce. We also sell North American timber, hardwoods from Africa and Brazil as well as plywood and boards from Asia and Europe.

We have a long tradition of working with customers in the Middle East and North Africa and we are proud to have strong business relations in all these markets. Trading timber is in our view highly personal and we are therefore constantly in the market place together with our suppliers and customers.

We have strong alliances and partnerships with leading sawmills in Scandinavia, North America, Brazil and Africa. Being in daily contact with the mills makes it possible for us to supply our customers with large volumes of high quality timber as well as a variety of different brands.

ARA Timber is part of the Hans Andersson Group with solid financial resources and the highest credit rating. The HA group is a family owned business lead by the second generation and well known for being a long term sustainable partner who is always aiming to provide excellence in service, speed and flexibility.

Name: TBO - Tillaut Bois Ouvrés - scierie
Description:
Implanté depuis 1947 au milieu des forêts du nord de la Loire-Atlantique, TBO exerce les métiers d'exploitant forestier, de scieur industriel et de fabricant d'emballages bois.
TBO achète du bois sur pied dans les forêts bretonnes et ligériennes. Les principales essences transformées sont : l'épicéa de sitka, le pin maritime, le douglas, le peuplier et le chêne.
Nous conservons les 2/3 de nos sciages pour nos fabrications de palettes, caisses et divers emballages bois ; Nos clients sont principalement des industriels de Loire-Atlantique, Vendée, Maine et Loire, Mayenne et Ille et Vilaine.
Un tiers de nos sciages sont destinés aux artisans et entreprises de seconde transformation du bois : charpentes, traverses, plots, avivés ...
Nous accueillons aussi les particuliers pour toute demande de sciage spécifique.
Les produits connexes générés par notre activité (sciure, écorces et plaquettes) sont valorisés par la société Béma : www.bema-be.fr

A Empresa configura como um dos agentes que contribuiu decisivamente para o desenvolvimento do estado do Mato Grosso do Sul em sua área florestal, atraindo investimentos de porte e sendo um dos articuladores de todo o crescimento que hoje acontece no eixo entre Campo Grande e Três Lagoas, considerada a capital do papel e celulose e abrigando grandes industrias do setor.

A partir de 2014, passou a se chamar Ramires Reflortec S.A. recebendo como parceira e sócia a Forest Investiment Associates (FIA), fundo de investimento americano, que foi fundado em 1986 . Name: PRI Plus
Description:
Our constructions are AGGRESSIVE.
 
PRI Plus doesn’t mess around with feeble label stock. Our products are built to conquer any labeling challenge.
We don’t make label stock that “forms a bond”; we make label stock that BITES ahold and refuses to let go—long after the surface cries “Uncle!”
We make label constructions that stick to ANYthing!

PRI Plus starts off by selecting only the highest quality components available. Then the magic continues with our coating artistry. With our coaters handling jobs up to 30″ full gum, your stock will have uncanny uniformity on any size roll. Forget standard coat weights- ours are HEAVY!, offering superior sticking performance that really sets us apart. We don’t ignore the precision, either- we deliver accurate, even coat weights better than anyone. Our unrivaled 2-3% coat weight accuracy far surpasses the industry standard tolerance of 10%. And as we meticulously control temperature, pressure, and other variables across the web, we get an amazingly consistent thickness gauge band with no high and low edges, resulting in flawlessly finished rolls right off our coaters.

This isn’t just coating, this is a declaration of label stock mastery.

Name: COMINTER TISU
Description:
En COMINTER, grupo industrial creado en 1978 y ubicado en España, nos dedicamos a la fabricación y transformación de papel tisú para su posterior comercialización como papel higiénico, rollos de cocina, rollos multiusos, servilletas y pañuelos de papel. Acreditados con las certificaciones ISO 9001, ISO 14001, Ecolabel y FSC, revisamos y mejoramos periódicamente nuestros protocolos y procesos industriales para adaptarlos a una gestión productiva limpia, respetuosa con el medio ambiente y socialmente responsable.
Nuestras 3 unidades de negocio están especializadas en el servicio y atención a diferentes grupos de clientes, para los que desarrollamos los productos que mejor responden a sus necesidades:
•	Consumer (hipermercados, supermercados y discounts, entre otros)
•	Away from home (colectividades, servicios, hostelería, …)
•	Business to Business (venta de bobinas en España, Francia, Portugal, UK, USA, Norte de Africa, ...)
Además, comercializamos productos con marca del distribuidor y disponemos de marcas propias como GARBI, SIL y MILMO.
Contamos con una capacidad productiva de 90.000 toneladas/año y 245 empleados en nuestros 3 centros de actividad:
•	KARTOGROUP en Burriana (Castellón): fábrica con 3 máquinas de papel y una fábrica de transformación con 7 líneas de manipulado.
•	COMINTER TISÚ en Hernani (Gipuzkoa) fábrica con una máquina de papel
•	COMINTER PAPER (Barcelona), donde se encuentran nuestros Servicios Centrales.
En Cominter tenemos un gran compromiso en Responsabilidad Social Corporativa: nuestro objetivo prioritario es satisfacer las expectativas de nuestros empleados, de nuestros clientes, de la sociedad, los proveedores y accionistas para lo que desarrollamos diferentes políticas sociales y medioambientales basadas en nuestros principios éticos y de respeto a la comunidad.

Name: Paper Products Corp
Description:
Paper Products Corp - Crafted for Convenience, Committed to Sustainability.

At Paper Products Corp, we are passionate about bringing convenience and sustainability together. As a leading paper cup manufacturer, we take pride in crafting high-quality cups that enhance your beverage experience while minimizing environmental impact.

Our story begins with a dedication to delivering products that simplify your daily life. We understand the importance of convenience and reliability, which is why our cups are designed with user-friendly features. From the ergonomically shaped design to the snug lid fit, every detail is carefully considered to provide a hassle-free and enjoyable drinking experience.

But our commitment extends beyond convenience. We are deeply committed to sustainability and reducing waste. Our cups are made from responsibly sourced paperboard, ensuring that our manufacturing process supports the protection of our planet's precious resources. With our fully recyclable and compostable cups, you can enjoy your favorite drinks with peace of mind, knowing that you're making an eco-conscious choice.

At Paper Products Corp, we believe in the power of customization. We offer a range of options to showcase your unique brand or personal style. Our dedicated team works closely with you to bring your vision to life, ensuring that your cups reflect your identity and leave a lasting impression on your customers or guests.
We pride ourselves on exceptional customer service, prompt delivery, and a commitment to exceeding your expectations. Your satisfaction is our top priority, and we strive to build strong relationships with our clients, providing the support you need every step of the way.

Choose Paper Products Corp for your paper cup needs and experience the perfect blend of convenience and sustainability. Join us in making a positive impact on the environment while enjoying the convenience of our well-crafted cups.

Name: HP CADWALLADER
Description:
H.P. Cadwallader is a family-owned and operated company producing corrugated packaging to meet the needs of businesses large and small. We like to think of our customers as family, so you can expect to be treated with kindness and respect.

We’ve been helping customers like you with their packaging for nearly five decades from right here in suburban Philadelphia, offering friendly service, reliability, honesty, and integrity. Our customers trust us to provide quality products in a timely manner at a fair price – and we don’t let them down.
Recognizing the scarcity of suppliers in the space, and the lengthy production times involved, H.P. Cadwallader serves both small and large businesses who have a need for corrugated boxes. H.P. Cadwallader can fulfill any order quantity and special sized box requests.

For nearly 50 years, H.P. Cadwallader has been building boxes. But it’s not the double-headed Bahmueller stitcher/gluer that keeps our customers coming back. It’s our commitment to consistency and how we make their lives easier that keeps them coming back. The next time an unforeseen demand change occurs, our customers remember we work fast and don’t have a minimum quantity on orders. They’ll also remember they can trust us with the most important of jobs – and so can you.

Name: Hammond Paper Company
Description:
Hammond Paper Company is one of Canada’s leading chipboard distributors and converters.
We are a 100% Canadian owned and operated company.  Founded by paper industry veteran Kevin Hammond, since 1993 we have supplied our many customers across Canada and North America with quality Chipboard products. All chipboard we use is 100% recycled and 100% recyclable.

Within our 50,000 square foot facility in Vaughan, Ontario, we stock an extensive inventory of chipboard direct from the mills and look after your needs from start to finish, including doing in-house converting – gluing/pasting, rotary slitting, guillotining, grooving, round cornering and die cutting.

Our equipment and product lists are extensive which allow us to provide our customers with a diverse range of quality products. We produce items ranging from, but not limited to, pre-cut bundle tied padding board to die cut items including gaskets/flanges and heavy weight display/sample boards.

We pride ourselves on having what you need when you need it.  We have the capacity to custom manufacture the specific paperboard item you require. Whatever your board needs, please feel free to contact us with your inquiry.

Name: AceCo Precision Tools
Description:
AceCo Precision Tools 
Founded in 1958 with headquarters in Boise, Idaho USA, AceCo Precision Tools manufactures precision tools for the primary and secondary wood processing and building products industry. AceCo is the quality leader in finger joint knives and heads,  moulder heads, planer heads, hydraulic cartridges and custom tools.  AceCo also distributes a wide variety of accessories and parts for finger joint, moulding and planing operations.
Recently, AceCo has introduced new finger joint technology with their lines of Evolution Series finger joint knives and the Dual Edge finger joint system.  Evolution knives are engineered for specific applications emphasizing increased tool life, product quality, and wood fiber savings.  The Dual Edge finger joint system is designed to replace fixed wing cutters and is a cost effective solution in an advanced precision tool. 
AceCo Precision Tools are sold worldwide through a network of authorized distributors and original equipment manufacturers.

Name: Easy Note Stationery Pvt Ltd
Description:
Easy Note Stationery Private Limited (ENSPL), Kolkata, is one of the young dynamic key players in the B2B market. Incorporated on 19th November 2009, the Company currently supplies premium quality products to industries such as Health & Education, Aviation, Retail, Food & Beverages, and Hospitality. 

Over the span of 12+ years, ENSPL has left its footprints across West Bengal, Bihar, Jharkhand, Himachal Pradesh, Meghalaya, Odisha, Telangana, Karnataka and Tamil Nadu, and supplies personalised notebooks to 350+ schools. The Company has two brands – Klassnote and Star with diverse product portfolios for different Target Groups. The brand, Klassnote offers 200 products to the young Target Group. ENSPL is aiming to open retail outlets across locations in Kolkata, and will soon launch the first one in the central part of the city. 

ENSPL strongly focus on the three pillars of Sustainability – Economy, Society, and Environment. It believes in offering innovative and eco-friendly products to its customers, at competitive pricing. Its quality consciousness and customer-centric approach encourage the Company to undergo in-depth research, constant technological innovations and customisation of product portfolios as per requirements. 

ENSPL does a lot of CSR activities in the area of ‘Child & Women Welfare’. Through its quality products, Easy Note Stationery focuses on making learning fun, interesting and affordable for children across all strata of the society. The Company is also a strong advocator of the education of the girl child, and encourages the same by donating a percentage of its annual profits to the cause.

Name: TORİD
Description:
Hızla değişen dünyada doğal sürdürülebilir ve yenilenebilir kaynakların önemi her geçen gün artmaktadır. Dünya hayatının sürdürülebilrliği ancak doğal kaynakları verimli kullanabilmeye bağlıdır. Orman ve ağaç da insan ihtiyaçlarının bir çoğunu karşılayabilecek özellikte ürünler sunmaktadır. Doğal hayatın dengesini bozmadan bunlardan yararlanmak mümkündür. Kirlenen ve yaşamın tehdit altında bulunduğu dünyamızda ormanlarımızı koruyarak geliştirebiliriz ve yeni dikim/işletim sahaları oluşturarak ahşap vs ürünler elde edebiliriz. 
Ahşap ile konutlar, okullar, sosyal binalar, camiler, iş yerleri, spor tesisleri, köprüler, mobilyalar, kaplamalar, dekoratif eşya ve uygulamalar, endüstriyel kullanımlar, ambalaj, kağıt, kumaş, iplik, kimyasallar vs... yapmanız ve elde etmeniz mümkün.
Ulusal zenginlik kaynağımız olan ormanlarımızın korunması, geliştirilmesi, işletilmesi ve bu kaynağımızın en iyi şekilde değerlendirilmesi için orman ürünleri endüstrisi ile ilgili kamu ve özel kuruluşlarla iletişim halinde olmak,
Bu alanda faaliyet gösteren bütün kurum ve kuruluşlara rehberlik etmek, Üyelerinin ve diğer sektör mensuplarının mesleki ilkelere ve kamu yararına uygun, ahenkli ve verimli bir tarzda gelişmelerini ve çalışmalarını temin etmek,

Meslek kamuoyunda kabul gören düşüncelerin hayata geçirilmesine öncülük etmek,
Uluslararası alanda ülkemizi temsil etmek üzere çalışmalar yapmak ve çalışmaların kamuoyuna duyurulmasına öncülük etmek."  olarak özetlenebilir.

Vizyon: “Türkiye’de masif ahşap sektörünü küresel ölçekte rekabetçi, sürdürülebilir büyümeyi sağlayan stratejik bir sektör haline getirmek.”
Genel Amaç: “Küresel rekabeti ve istikrarlı büyümeyi hedefleyen, çevreye duyarlı ve sürdürülebilir kalkınma odaklı, dünya ticaretinden daha fazla pay alan, tasarıma dayalı, katma değerli, istihdamı artıran, nitelikli iş gücüne sahip bir yapıya ulaşmaktır.”

Name: Mallard Creek Inc
Description:
Our Story

Founded in 1982, Mallard Creek has remained proudly family-owned and operated for over four decades. What began as a small Northern California operation has grown into a trusted producer of premium wood products serving customers throughout the Western United States. From the beginning, our commitment has been simple: deliver quality products, on time, with integrity.

What We Do

We specialize in manufacturing high-quality softwood shavings, bedding pellets, fuel pellets, and industrial fiber. These are used for animal bedding, cat litter, home heating, and industrial production. Our products are available in both bagged and bulk formats. 

In the last 10 years, we have expanded our manufacturing capabilities with robotics, automated bagging equipment, and industrial controls to produce premium, consistently high-quality products. Every product we make reflects our focus on consistency, quality, and reliable delivery.

Who We Serve

Mallard Creek supplies feed stores, equestrian facilities, agricultural operations, distributors, retailers, and industrial manufacturers. With on-site manufacturing and strong supplier and logistics relationships, we offer a steady and dependable supply—even when other suppliers can’t.

Our Values

   •	Premium Quality – We hold our products to the highest standards to ensure consistency, load after load.
   •	Reliable Supply & Delivery – Customers trust us because we deliver—literally. Our stable supply chain and on-time logistics set us apart.
   •	Customer Commitment – We value long-term relationships and stand behind every product we ship.
   •	Animal Welfare – The comfort of animals is at the heart of what we do in the manufacture of our animal bedding products.
   •	Respect for Resources – We use sawdust and wood residuals responsibly and efficiently, which prevents these materials from ending up in landfills. We are continually improving how we operate with care for our customers and our communities.

Name: Foley Timber & Land Co.
Description:
Foley Timber and Land Company (Foley) is a private company that in 1994 acquired more than 600,000 acres from Procter & Gamble (P&G) in coastal North Central Florida. The company has subsequently purchased and sold various parcels proximate to these lands, including selling important conservation lands to the State of Florida. Foley’s primary business is managing its land holdings, including its sustainable timber operations, from which it annually harvests more than one million tons of timber. It also provides land for hunting and recreational purposes, as well as for limestone mining and various agricultural activities. 

Foley currently owns approximately 560,000 acres in five North Central Florida counties, including approximately 380,000 acres in Taylor County. The property is approximately 880 square miles and is roughly centered between Tallahassee and Gainesville within Florida’s Nature Coast region.

Our State- and County-approved master development plan totals more than 128,000 acres and includes multiple mixed-use residential planning areas and large-scale “mega” industrial sites covering approximately 45,000 acres. Each of the development areas is tied to a network of agricultural lands spanning roughly 83,000 acres.

Existing infrastructure, including a short line railroad serving two Class I carriers, a general aviation airport ripe for expansion, major gas and electric transmission, and abundant water resources, combined with our three “mega” industrial site properties of 2,900, 3,500, and 8,000 acres provide resources for manufacturers, developers, and investors alike.

Name: Green IS Timber
Description:
Greenis timber Sustainable Forestry
Growing Plantations
By growing sustainable plantation teak, we are helping to save existing rainforests from unsustainable forestry pracatices and restoring previously deforested land into something like its original and natural biome. This, in turn, benefits the environ-ment as teak has one of the highest sequestration rates. In conclusion, teak products are not only low risk and highly profitable, but also environmentally friendly as well as ethical.
01 Nursery
Seeds are collected between April and August, then germinated and planted in nurseries. After 4 to 6 weeks the seeds will have sprouted and grown to approximately 20cm high. At this point, they are ready to be moved to the cultivation beds.
02 Cultivation Beds
The cultivation beds are in the open air and in direct sunlight. This enables the young seedlings to harden, which produces a much stronger seedling. At this stage, the seedlings need to be watered 3 to 4 times a day. After 8 to 10 weeks they are ready to be moved to the plantation.
03 Plantation
The best time of year to plant the seedlings is during the rainy period -  November through to December. We will ensure that the seeds are correctly aligned to maximise the amount of sunlight that they receive.
04 Harvesting
Once the trees have reached 100-130cm‘s in circumference, they are cut down by our qualified team and transported to the mill.

Name: National Carton Factory (NCF)
Description:
National Carton Factory (NCF) is part of a group of companies based in Saudi Arabia, which includes Al Hoshani & Partner Plastic Factory (HPF) and Specialist Industrial Services Company (SISC). The total workforce of the group is approximately 500 staff including white and blue collar workers. The group generates revenue of approximately USD 40 million annually. Some of the known customers of the group are Almarai, PepsiCo Lays, Baskin Robins, Olayan, Arasco Chicken, Obeikan, Saadeddin and Herfy. As a diversified group each company specializes in the manufacturing of different industrial products.

National Carton Factory (NCF) is one of the oldest corrugated carton manufacturers in Saudi Arabia. The founders set up a small unit to manufacture corrugated cartons and paper tubes only to cater to the packing needs of HPF. The high demand of these paper products encouraged the partners to establish NCF in 1996. Over the years, NCF has grown steadily and is currently capable to reach volumes of 20,000 MTs annually.

In order to stay competitive our corporation is undergoing a dramatic change. A positive change that shall be beneficial throughout the supply chain. HPF, NCF and SISC are now ISO Certified. As part of being quality conscious, the group is investing heavily, not only on lab and quality equipment but also on human capital for all products to undergo strict quality measures. We have become socially responsible and are always finding ways to be more environment friendly. Our organization is also changing its strategy. Earlier, our primary role was packaging and product placement while the secondary role was branding and merchandising of customer goods. Now, we intend to make both primary and secondary role as equally important.

Name: Miro Forestry and Timber Products
Description:
Miro Forestry is a profit driven, commercial plantation timber business. The Company’s objective is to be a leading low-cost producer and supplier of sustainable timber operating to high management, social and environmental standards.

Miro Forestry will continue to operate to international forestry certification standards and to conserve natural forest and other valuable vegetation within its areas of operation. The Company will continue to reach out to local communities to establish social, economic and environmental development programs within the local community adhering to high standards of corporate social responsibility.

The Company aims to be the preferred partner for the local communities in which it operates and for international business partners and financial institutions.

The Company’s principal objective is to continue to acquire and build interests in timber and sustainable forestry businesses and assets that provide the Company with:

exposure to capital appreciation of, as well as the cash yields generated from, timber and forestry investments;
optimize long-term sustainable returns through best practice management;
ownership of timber and forestry businesses and assets, which are, or have the objective of, producing sustainable timber certified to FSC standards; and
revenue from the supply of timber and timber products worldwide.
The Boumfoum Plantation in Ghana consists of over 10,000 hectares of fertile land located in the Ashanti Region of Ghana. The Company’s land is located about 10 minutes drive from the town of Agogo and about one hour from Kumasi.
The Company’s Yoni Plantation in Sierra Leone consists of over 21,000 hectares of flat and fertile land located in the Tonkolili District of Sierra Leone, 90 miles from Freetown, the country’s capital, and adjacent to the country’s major highway into Freetown. The Company is growing short-rotation species including Eucalyptus and Acacia.

Name: Bignardi - Indústria e Comércio de Papéis e Artefatos
Description:
A trajetória do Grupo Bignardi começou em 1956 com uma pequena gráfica, localizada no centro da cidade de São Paulo, na rua Jandaia, que fabricava impressos gráficos, cadernos e listas telefônicas.


Em razão de seu crescimento, após anos de operação na cidade de São Paulo, a gráfica foi transferida para Caieiras, provendo deste modo, as condições necessárias para a evolução da empresa. Sempre atento às oportunidades de crescimento, José Bignardi Neto, fundador da companhia, sentia necessidade de realizar novas aquisições. Assim, em meados da década de 70, adquiriu a indústria de papel Gordinho Braune, localizada em Jundiaí.


Além do crescimento das indústrias, também foi aberta uma operação atacadista, o Atacado Jandaia, especializado em materiais escolares e de escritório, localizado na cidade de São Paulo. E assim formou-se o Grupo Bignardi, o qual atualmente é um dos grandes fabricantes de cadernos do Brasil e o maior fabricante brasileiro de papel reciclado para impressão e escrita.

Name: Flexi-Hex
Description:
Eco-friendly, protective packaging solutions for a range of market sectors including boardsports, drinks, cosmetics, electronics, homeware and commercial. 

Environmentally friendly

Where possible, we use material made from over 85% recycled paper pulp while all virgin paper is FSC certified. All our packaging is curbside recyclable, biodegradable and compostable in 6 weeks. To date, with the help from our customers, we have removed over 1641km of plastic from the packaging industry. 

Flexible & easy to assemble 

Designed to be user-friendly, all our packaging is intuitive to assemble and uses minimal material, making it easy to slot into the production process. With the sleeve expanding to 35 times its compact size, our packaging is adaptable and can be applied across a wide range of applications. 

Cost efficient

One pallet of Flexi-Hex is equivalent to five pallets of bubble wrap, reducing shipping and storage costs and ultimately the impact on our environment

Customisable 

In the growing world of e-commerce, packaging is often a consumer’s first interaction with a brand. That’s why our boxes and wraps can be fully customised with your company branding.

Name: Ekman Group
Description:
Every year, Ekman handles millions of tons of paper, pulp, recovered materials and bioenergy products for business partners in over one hundred countries. 

Around the globe, companies turn to Ekman for market guidance and knowledge. Since our incorporation in 1802, Ekman has earned a solid reputation for reliability, competence and service. Our highly competent and motivated staff, long history in the marketing, purchasing and sales of forest products, and experience in creating solutions for related financial and logistical matters, help us live up to this reputation.
 
We provide a complete range of services for the paper and pulp industries, covering market information and research, invoicing and documentation, logistics and warehouse administration, transportation and insurance, trade finance, credit risk coverage, payment administration, advance payments and financing, currency and interest rate hedging, and price risk hedging. 

Ekman has around 300 employees working at about 40 locations throughout the world. Operations are coordinated from our hubs in Gothenburg, Zurich, Wall, Miami and Hong Kong. Our own sales offices, in close cooperation with an international network of partners and representatives, ensure a strong presence throughout the world in all producing and consuming areas for the forest industry. We bring the world to your business!

Name: Grupo Familia
Description: Somos un grupo empresarial con presencia en Suramérica y El Caribe. Nuestro propósito es generar bienestar a través de soluciones de cuidado, higiene y aseo que construyen marcas líderes, creando valor para los grupos de interés y rentabilidad para los accionistas.

Name: Juthor Paper Manufacturing Co.
Description:
QUALITY THROUGH THE ROOTS

A leading company in the field of tissue paper (Jumbo roll) manufacturing, under MEPCO group. It operates with a production capacity of up to 60 thousand tons annually.
شركة رائدة في مجال صناعة المناديل الورقية (الجامبو رول) ومتجذرة من شركة مبكو.. تعمل بطاقة إنتاجية تصل إلى 60 ألف طن سنويًا..

Name: Atlanbois
Description:
L'association Atlanbois depuis 1990, assure l'animation, la promotion et la communication de la filière bois dans la région Pays de la Loire. Avec plus de 400 adhérents professionnels l'association représente la filière bois de la forêt en passant par le meuble, la scierie, la construction, le bois énergie, ... Véritable réseau pour les professionnels, Atlanbois organise de nombreux temps d'échanges : visites d'entreprises, de chantiers de construction, de chaufferie bois énergie, chantiers de replantation en forêt, réunions et conférences thématiques ... mais aussi deux événements plus conséquents : 
Habiter Bois à destination du grand public avec pendant un mois des animations autour de la maison individuelle
Le Carrefour International du Bois, salon professionnel qui se déroule tous les 2 ans à Nantes au parc des expositions de la Beaujoire
Atlanbois accueille également tous les publics (professionnels, prescripteurs, particuliers, jeunes en formation, scolaires, ...) au Bâtiment B basé sur l'Ile de Nantes. Véritable vitrine pour tous les professionnels, l'équipe qui assure la médiation au bâtiment B sensibilise à toutes les utilisations du Bois notamment grâce à une exposition permanente In Ze Bois.

Name: Proteak
Description: Proteak es la mayor empresa forestal-industrial de México, formada por un grupo de emprendedores apasionados cuya visión es crear oportunidades de negocio en donde nadie más se ha atrevido. Generamos valor sustentable a partir de nuestras plantaciones forestales y transformamos la madera en tableros de MDF en la planta mas moderna de América.

Name: Dominus Paper
Description: Dominus Impex is one of the leading Coated Duplex Board, Folding Box Board (FBB)  and Kraft Paper exporter from India. Based in the western part of the country, the company traces its roots to Gujarat. As a sustainable alternative to plastic, Coated Duplex Board, Folding Box Board (FBB)  and Kraft Paper are derived by processing and recycling waste paper. In doing so, Dominus Impex ensures eco-friendly and ethical procedures that bring no harm to the planet or compromise with its quality. Our dedication to our clients and quality maintenance has rendered us one of the fastest-growing players in the paper exporting companies.

Name: APP Timber
Description:
APP Timber's core business is the supply of imported logs, timber, veneers, and panel products for the Asian timber industry. With its HQ in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, APP Timber runs marketing operations and warehousing across the whole of Asia. 

We source from all around the world and carry a full range of temperate hardwood and softwood products. 

Our sales teams do not only have deep knowledge about timber and related products, they are experienced in manufacturing as well. This allows providing expertise on the selection of raw materials, machining, and finishing to our buyers. 
Furthermore, APP Timber offers profound market knowledge about trends and newest product developments to buyers and suppliers.

APP Timber, in addition, offers to export Asian-made products. Under APP Timber’s guidance, buyers and suppliers are brought together. Years of close cooperation of APP Timber with many high-quality Asian manufacturers allows for sourcing, manufacturing, and shipping of products corresponding with overseas buyers’ requirements.

APPTimber is FSC certified and a PEFC stakeholder.

In respect to the above, suppliers and buyers consider APPTimber not as timber agents but as partners and we aim to be known as “The Trusted Partner and Customers’ Ultimate Choice for Legally Sourced Timber Solutions"

Name: Kronospan España
Description:
En 1897 descubrimos que la madera puede cambiar el mundo si se transforma y perfecciona mientras respetamos el medio ambiente. Hoy lo hacemos de un modo plenamente sostenible. Protegemos el planeta desde el inicio del proceso de producción.

En 2012 Kronospan elige Burgos como sede española para continuar su expansión internacional y convierte una antigua fábrica en un centro de producción pionero a nivel mundial. Pionero en modernización y eficiencia del proceso de transformación de la madera y pionero en seguridad laboral y sostenibilidad. El centro de producción ubicado en Salas de los Infantes complementa una respuesta cada vez más especializada a un mercado en el que marca tendencia. En 2022 entra en funcionamiento la fábrica de Tortosa, una planta completamente nueva para satisfacer las demandas del mercado.

España se ha convertido en eje estratégico de la compañía para seguir ofreciendo al mundo soluciones innovadoras de un producto final que fabricamos en base a la excelencia y que permite hoy construir miles de hogares y diseñar muebles. Diseñamos tableros para inspirar: tableros de madera, tableros de partículas, tableros de fibra y tableros revestidos de melamina.

La excelencia comienza en el proceso de fabricación. Y en él, hemos alcanzado un modelo de producción basado en la economía circular. En Burgos y Tortosa trabajamos con madera reciclada en la práctica totalidad del proceso y aprovechamos al máximo el proceso de transformación de la madera y convertirlo en energía térmica. En Salas de los Infantes utilizamos madera sostenible procedente de montes certificados.

Nuestros logros son para la sociedad. Generamos valor en el territorio: creamos empleo y dinamismo económico y protegemos el medio ambiente.

Si quieres formar parte del equipo, envía tu CV a candidatos@kronospan.es o aplica directamente a nuestros empleos de LinkedIn.

Name: ArborGen
Description:
ArborGen is a leading global provider of conventional and next-generation tree seedling products for the forestry industry. With a long history of research and development, our advanced genetic technologies develop trees that offer forest landowners outstanding silvicultural performance and financial return. With these advanced genetics, ArborGen helps landowners ensure the maximum productivity of their forests – providing outstanding growth and yield to address the world’s growing need for wood, fiber, and fuel. 

ArborGen operates in many of the largest forestry markets in the world with research and production facilities in the United States and Brazil.  Our products include Loblolly Pine, Radiata Pine, Eucalyptus, and other Hardwood species used in plantation forestry.

Name: ASPAPEL
Description:
En ASPAPEL llevamos más de 45 años representando al sector que produce pasta, papel y cartón en España. Somos el punto de encuentro de una industria con una larga trayectoria, que se reinventa cada día para seguir siendo un referente en sostenibilidad e innovación.

Trabajamos para impulsar el desarrollo competitivo de nuestras empresas asociadas y fomentamos un diálogo constructivo y transparente con la sociedad. Además, trasladamos a la sociedad la importancia de apostar por productos de papel y cartón: esenciales, circulares y sostenibles.

Somos la voz de una industria estratégica para nuestro país. España es el tercer país más reciclador de papel y cartón de la Unión Europea, el quinto productor de celulosa y el sexto productor de papel y cartón. El sector genera empleo directo para 17.500 personas e indirecto para 87.000.

La industria papelera es el origen de toda una cadena de valor con un impacto económico equivalente al 4,3 % del PIB nacional.

Representamos una industria que camina hacia un futuro de crecimiento positivo para la sociedad y el entorno.

Name: ALIER
Description:
Alier is a paper manufacturer specializing in recycled and sustainable paper products, with a focus on innovation and environmental responsibility.

Alier started in 1833 in the paper world and has grown throughout the years on the international markets. Headquartered in Barcelona, Spain, it’s a manufacturer of specialty papers over more than century experience offering the best service and engineered products. That is why, in the here and now, we are continuing to offer solutions to every market sector and to every customer we do business with.

At Alier, environmental responsibility is a Core Value and a key element of sustainability philosophy following environment protection policies that apply to all company aspects, both internal and external. Consistent with its Core Values, Alier is committed to continuous improvement in all it does, to conserve resources, to prevent waste and foster environmental sustainability for the benefit of future generations.


Our paper is the result of our great passion for recycling.

Name: Oy Lunawood Ltd
Description:
Lunawood – Reconnecting Nature with People
 
Lunawood is a pioneer and global market leader of decorative wood solutions. Our mission is to reconnect nature with people in urban environments, by bringing the soothing effect of the forest available to all.

Our mills in Finland transform the very best Nordic pine and spruce into beautiful and long-lasting ThermoWood. It is the ideal foundation and the perfect material for an ecological and healthy way of designing, building, and living.

Lunawood was founded in 2001. Today, we employ 140 professionals, at our production units and head office in Finland, as well as in our main export markets.

Name: New-Indy Containerboard LLC
Description:
New-Indy Containerboard, LLC was formed in 2012 as a joint venture by the Kraft Group, LLC and the Schwarz Partners, LP. We are the NEWest, INDYpendent manufacturer and supplier of recycled containerboard to the corrugated box industry. However, the company is comprised of owners and leadership with decades of experience, and the paperboard mills have been serving the Southland for thirty plus years.

NICB uses 100% recycled fiber in our manufacturing process. The mills receive over 100 truckloads of Old Corrugated Containers (OCC) on a daily basis. This material is reduced to a slurry and then re-formed to create new brown paper. The recycled paper is then sent to box plants throughout our local markets.

Each of the two California locations has a co-generation power plant that not only provides 100% of the mill’s electrical power needs, but also supplies power to thousands of CA homes and businesses through our partnership with Southern California Edison. In addition, the mills purchase recycled water from the local utilities, and our processes conserve water by recycling it multiple times.

Over the years, our mills have undergone major improvements, including installation of advanced air emissions control equipment (which reduce emissions of nitrogen oxides), waste-water treatment plants (which clean and recycle waste-water) and numerous other upgrades. We have enjoyed multiple years of operation without any environmental Notices of Violation.

We believe our focus on environmentally conscious manufacturing processes and supply chain solutions will enable us to maintain a strong business presence in the markets we serve for many years to come.

Name: Monnet-Sève Sougy
Description:
Monnet-Sève Sougy is a French family-owned company, founded in 1929 in Outriaz, a small village in the heart of the Haut-Bugey region of Ain (01). The group, which employs 800 people, has 6 production sites in France, making it a major player in French softwood sawing. We are France's no. 1 softwood sawmill and Europe's no. 1 Douglas-fir sawmill.

Monnet-Sève Sougy is 100% French quality lumber with numerous labels such as: PEFC, CE, France Douglas, Bois de France , Sawn Timber, JAS, WCLB, ...

Our values drive us to constantly optimize and enhance the value of 100% French wood, so that we can offer you the very best and successfully develop all your projects. 

Our teams of passionate wood and forest enthusiasts are dedicated to ensuring that all our partners benefit from their talents. 

Together, built the future in wood !

Name: Wausau Paper
Description:
Wausau Paper offers a comprehensive line of premium and 100% recycled products and controlled-use dispensing systems for the away-from-home market.

In common with our industry as a whole, Wausau Paper Corp. has continued to evolve since our beginnings in 1899. Currently headquartered in Mosinee, Wisconsin, our legacy and our future are embedded in our mission to be the leading provider of environmentally sensitive paper-based brands and solutions to the markets we serve. We continue to draw upon many proud, successful and forward-looking initiatives to guide our future. Wausau Paper Corp. today reflects a concerted strategic review conducted in 2012 that resulted in our decision to focus future efforts and capital investments in the growth of our highly profitable towel and tissue business. The largest capital investment in our Company’s long history, completed in late 2012, anchors this new tack and sets the trajectory for significant growth. A history of innovation is the hallmark of Wausau Paper Corp. 

Wausau Paper Corp. manufactures and markets away-from-home towel and tissue products in the United States and internationally. Our Company produces and sells paper towel and tissue products for the industrial and commercial away-from-home market, including washroom roll and folded towels, tissues, soap dispensers, industrial wipes, dairy towels, household roll towels, and other premium towel and tissue products. We sell our products to paper and sanitary supply distributors under the Wausau Paper, DublNature, Artisan, EcoSoft, DublSoft, Bay West, OptiCore, Alliance, Revolution and Bay West brands.

Name: Greenpaper
Description:
We are a 100% sustainable company specializing in the development of products serving the packaging industry. We are one of the country's leading companies dedicated to the  production and distribution of paper for the manufacture of boxes and packaging .

We are an  innovative and constantly evolving company , committed to achieving sustainable leadership in the paper industry at both the national and international levels.
Location: SAN NICOLAS DE LOS GARZA, NUEVO LEON

Name: Varaka
Description: Varaka'nın sektörel, sosyal ve interaktif faaliyetlerinin tamamını takip edebileceğiniz resmi lınkedin sayfasıdır.

Name: JOUBERT Plywood
Description: JOUBERT Plywood is a French manufacturer of Okoumé and Poplar plywood. A family-owned group for 3 generations, it has two factories in France (in Charente and Charente-Maritime) and a primary wood processing site in Port-Gentil, Gabon. All its plywood is made in France, guaranteeing quality in terms of health and structure. The Group is PEFC and FSC eco-certified for its long-standing commitment to sustainable forest management. JOUBERT Plywood products meet the challenges of the RE2020 and low-carbon construction, helping to obtain the HQE, LEED and BREEAM eco-construction labels. Okoumé and Poplar plywood can be used in a wide range of applications, including exterior fittings, interior fittings, joinery, wood cladding, events (stands), construction, leisure and utility vehicles, furniture, partitions, flooring and marine construction. Thanks to its commitment to CSR, the Group is committed to the dynamism of the region and is working to decarbonise industry by controlling the energy used in its production process (biomass boiler, photovoltaic panels, 100% recycling of wood used in the manufacture of plywood). JOUBERT Plywood is a benchmark brand in the timber industry and a player recognised for the quality of its products and services.

Name: Canadian Kraft Paper Industries Ltd
Description:
Canadian Kraft Paper is a world-class global supplier of A-Grade high performance paper, located in The Pas, Manitoba.  

Vision Statement
To be a sustainable world-class global supplier of A-grade high performance unbleached kraft paper.

Mission Statement
We will be a sustainable and proﬁtable company by investing in our people and operations.  We have a strong commitment to safe production, quality, and customer service through continuous improvement and teamwork.

Values Statement

SAFETY					It is in everything we do.

RESPECT FOR PEOPLE	We value our people and diversities; encourage their development and recognize their performance.

CUSTOMER COMMITMENT	We measure our success through customer satisfaction and loyalty.

SUSTAINABILITY	We are responsible in our decisions and actions ensuring environmental, economic and social well-being for the beneﬁt of present and future generations.

TEAM WORK	We work together across boundaries and toward the same goals to meet the needs of customers.

INTEGRITY	We hold ourselves and each other to the highest standard of ethical, trustworthy and accountable behavior.

CONTINUOUS IMPROVEMENT	We have an on-going commitment to improve products, services and processes.

Name: Gulf Ply Company for Paper Manufacturing
Description: Gulf Ply is a leading company in the field of plasterboard paper manufacturing in the Middle East and North Africa. With a systematic vision as it seeks to be the most reliable company by providing high-quality products and contributing to preserving the environment, as it takes into account the highest international quality standards when presenting its products and covers the market needs with high efficiency.

Name: Monnet-Sève Sougy
Description:
Monnet-Sève Sougy is a French family-owned company, founded in 1929 in Outriaz, a small village in the heart of the Haut-Bugey region of Ain (01). The group, which employs 800 people, has 6 production sites in France, making it a major player in French softwood sawing. We are France's no. 1 softwood sawmill and Europe's no. 1 Douglas-fir sawmill.

Monnet-Sève Sougy is 100% French quality lumber with numerous labels such as: PEFC, CE, France Douglas, Bois de France , Sawn Timber, JAS, WCLB, ...

Our values drive us to constantly optimize and enhance the value of 100% French wood, so that we can offer you the very best and successfully develop all your projects. 

Our teams of passionate wood and forest enthusiasts are dedicated to ensuring that all our partners benefit from their talents. 

Together, built the future in wood !

Name: Papeteries De Clairefontaine
Description:
Les Papeteries de Clairefontaine, implantées au cœur de l'Europe, filiale du groupe Exacompta-Clairefontaine, ont reçu en héritage un savoir-faire unique dans la fabrication et la transformation du papier. Clairefontaine est constamment en recherche de perfection ; la rigueur et l’efficacité des procédés mis en place garantissent une qualité irréprochable à ses papiers, justifiant sa notoriété. 
Au fil des années, Clairefontaine a su gagner la confiance des consommateurs, grâce à sa capacité à s’adapter aux nouvelles technologies et à l’évolution de la demande de ses clients. 
Aujourd'hui les Papeteries de Clairefontaine proposent des gammes de papier liées à l'univers bureautique, graphique et plus récemment à la création d'étiquettes.

Name: Union Paper Mills
Description:
At Union Paper Mills, we have a true concern towards the environment, aligned with UAE’s vision to lead as an environment friendly and sustainable country. We are committed towards reduction in carbon foot prints in this region and thus contribute in mitigating the risk of global warming. We consider this as our obligation for the betterment of our society.

Our journey began in 1987 in Dubai with Union Paper Mills as one of the pioneers who introduced recycling industry to the GCC. Our products are manufactured out of 100% recycled waste paper using advanced technologies which adhere to strict environmental regulations. We thus convert waste into productive use. In line with our company’s philosophy of continuous growth, Al Dhafra Paper Manufacturing Company was set up in the Emirate of Abu Dhabi to cater to the growing global demand for recycled containerboard. The new facility is equipped with the state of art technology to manufacture recycled containerboard conforming to international standards.

Name: Wausau Coated Products, Inc
Description:
As a leading manufacturer of pressure sensitive roll and sheet products, Wausau Coated Products specializes in developing custom-engineered solutions designed to meet customer-specific applications and end-user needs. With hundreds of paper and film facestocks and liners and in-house adhesive and silicone blending, Wausau Coated has the ability to create thousands of pressure sensitive constructions. Whether your needs include high volume ready-made materials or small quantities for a custom order, Wausau Coated is your source for pressure sensitive labelstock.  

Our product offerings include a broad selection of pressure sensitive items with end use applications including products engineered for HP Indigo presses, Wine & Spirits, Health & Beauty, UV Inkjet, Traditional Inkjet, and a variety of products custom engineered for emerging digital technologies as well as traditional flexo technologies.  To ensure our products print flawlessly, we work closely with OEMs to obtain product certification.  In addition, our technical staff has years of experience coating a variety of substrates to make them compatible for Indigo Presses.  

Flexibility, responsiveness, and technical know-how combine to make Wausau Coated the trusted source for pressure sensitive solutions.

Name: Forest Resources Association
Description:
Forest Resources Association will proactively lead a world-class wood supply chain.

We will:

Provide an effective member voice in Washington, DC: defend against threatening legislation and regulation; advance public policies that support industry sustainability.

Communicate relevant and timely information to create opportunities for company and employee success: promote safety; improve skills; elevate technical and operational expertise; identify workforce issues and define proactive solutions, establish leadership development programs.

Maintain a thriving regional structure: address regional policy and operational issues; identify regional research priorities; build and grow a strong grassroots advocacy network.

Name: G.A. Paper International
Description: Since 1986, G.A. Paper International has been a leader in international pulp, paper and board sales and distribution. With offices across the globe, G.A. Paper International continues to deliver exceptional services and results through a unique understanding of the specific needs of producers, suppliers, and customers. G.A. Paper offers a complete ensemble of services, including sales and marketing, trade finance, logistics and risk management.

Name: ZIEGLER GROUP GLOBAL
Description:
Wir sind die ZIEGLER GROUP. Ob Holz, Logistik, Hausbau, Technik, Dekoration oder Gastronomie – wir sind in vielen Bereichen zu Hause. Als inhabergeführtes Unternehmen haben wir unsere Wurzeln im Herzen der nördlichen Oberpfalz. Neben unserem Hauptsitz in Plößberg sind wir an 28 Standorten in ganz Deutschland aktiv. Von dort agieren wir global. Die familiäre Atmosphäre gibt mehr als 2800 Mitarbeitern eine Heimat. Doch auch unsere Geschäfts- und Privatkunden schätzen die vertraute Zusammenarbeit. Die meisten davon seit mehreren Jahrzehnten.
Mit Blick auf die Zukunft legen wir Wert auf eine nachhaltige Welt, damit kommende Generationen mindestens genauso gut leben können wie wir in der Gegenwart. Deshalb handeln wir heimatverbunden und verantwortungsvoll: ökonomisch, ökologisch und sozial. Schon heute investieren wir in verschiedene Großprojekte und sichern langfristig Arbeitsplätze. Wir schonen Ressourcen und sorgen dafür, dass der Wald grün bleibt. Regionale Vereine in der Oberpfalz kennen uns als Partner, auf den man sich verlassen kann.

Name: SOTEFI Groupe -Fabrication de cahiers & distribution de fournitures scolaires, bureau et beaux-arts
Description: Founded in 1953, Sotefi is the most ancient manufacturer specialized in school and work stationery in Tunisia

Name: Grupo Sovel
Description:
Atraídos pelos incentivos e facilidades proporcionados pelo modelo Zona Franca de Manaus, o Grupo Sovel instalou em 1974 sua primeira empresa no coração do Pólo Industrial da cidade, a fábrica de papelão Sovel da Amazônia Ltda. Pioneira no ramo e com 37.348 m2 de área, sendo 7.850 m2 construídos importava a matéria-prima necessária na produção de papelão ondulado da grande São Paulo e de outras regiões do Brasil. 

Com o crescimento da produção de papelão e a preocupação com o padrão de qualidade de seus produtos, em 16 de Dezembro de 1990 o grupo fundou a Indústria de Papel Sovel da Amazônia LTDA, construída em 10.200 m2 de uma área 550.000 m2, sua principal atividade é a reciclagem de aparas de papelão para a fabricação de bobinas de papel. 

Essa iniciativa proporcionou a região mais de 200 empregos diretos e à Sovel da Amazônia sua total independência aumentando assim a confiabilidade de seus produtos.

Hoje o Grupo Sovel LTDA garante a produção de 4.000 toneladas mensais de papel inteiramente reciclado, para se ter uma ideia do que representa esse valor, são praticamente preservados algo em torno 88.000 árvores que deixam de ser derrubadas, isso demonstra o nosso apoio na preservação das nossas matas, já que a empresa se encontra no coração da Amazônia. 

Geramos 270 empregos diretos e mais de 2.000 indiretos, dispomos da melhor tecnologia em processo de fabricação de papel no Amazonas, possuímos a melhor tecnologia em Tratamento de Efluentes e pessoal qualificado. 

Por tudo isso nós do Grupo Sovel nos orgulhamos de sermos originalmente amazonenses.

Name: Wood From Finland
Description: Wood From Finland promotes Finnish timber and further processed goods.

Name: Steinbeis Papier GmbH
Description:
Steinbeis Papier is the European market leader in graphic recycled paper made from 100% recovered paper. The company based in Glückstadt has one of the most advanced and ecologically integrated factories in the recycled paper industry.
Steinbeis Papier stands for sustainable office papers and magazine papers – certified with the Blue Angel label.

Long before corporate social responsibility, environmental and climate protection became the watch words of 21st century business, the management of Steinbeis had already opted to model its production facilities after ecological principles. Away from resource intensive production, towards a value chain whose foundations are sustainability and closed loop recycling. Through the sustainability of its products, Steinbeis enables consumers in the worlds of business, industry and in the public sector to use copy and printing paper in large volumes whilst still acting responsibly and in the interests of sustainability. Compared to the rest of the sector, Steinbeis’ production processes are subject to the highest environmental standards for CO2 emissions, raw-material consumption and energy and water usage. All paper is made from 100% recycled paper. 

This medium-sized family business was founded in 1911 and employs around 300 people. The company’s factory in Glückstadt, near Hamburg, produces more than 300,000 tonnes of office papers, magazine papers and digital printing papers every year. 
Steinbeis Papier is a subsidiary of Steinbeis Holding, which operates in the new lead markets of environmental engineering and energy management.

Legal Notice: https://www.steinbeis-papier.de/en/#legal-notice

You can also find us on the following channels:

https://www.facebook.com/SteinbeisPapier/
https://www.xing.com/companies/steinbeispapiergmbh

Name: Folia Materials
Description:
Folis is making a safer, cleaner, and healthier world. Our patent-pending silver coating for paper adds anti-viral, anti-microbial, or other advanced functionality to products for pennies. That’s possible because our patented process mass produces advanced paper at the lowest cost possible by using commodity inputs and standard machinery requiring no CapEx.

Product lines:
1. Folia PPE’s anti-viral paper coating makes face masks anti-viral
Anti-viral face masks using our anti-viral coating to make a paper outer layer for face masks. FDA approval is pending for our anti-viral 3-ply face masks at $1 MSRP.

2. Folia Packaging: the future of packaging: paper, not plastic, in stealth development with a Fortune 200 food company.

3. Folia Water: the world's first water filter for pennies, not dollars, a mass market grocery staple for South Asia
Mission: universal access to clean drinking water
The Folia Water Filter is a 20 cent - 20 liter antimicrobial paper water purifier that is the world's first-ever water filter with grocery store pricing. We are creating a new $10B sub-category. Our Unilever-sponsored Bangladesh sales pilot had a 48% repeat purchase rate.

Name: Finnish Forest Industries Federation
Description:
The Finnish Forest Industries Federation promotes the development of Finland as a forerunner of sustainable development and the bioeconomy. 

The Finnish Forest Industries Federation members cover the pulp, paper and paperboard manufacturers of Finland as well as about 80% of all wood products companies, such as sawmills and plywood mills as well as makers of joinery products and other wood-based articles.

Name: OYKA Kağıt Ambalaj
Description:
Türkiye’nin tek entegre kraft kağıt üretim tesisi olan OYKA Kağıt Ambalaj, kraft kağıt ve torba üretimini entegre yapısıyla tek çatı altında gerçekleştirerek sektöre yön vermektedir.

2003 yılında SEKA’dan devralınan tesis, OYAK bünyesinde üretim faaliyetlerine devam etmektedir. Tesis, yıllık 100.000 ton kraft kağıt ve 220 milyon adet kraft torba üretim kapasitesine sahiptir.

Kraftliner, klupak, yaş mukavemetli ve standart kraft kağıt çeşitlerinden oluşan kağıt ürün grubuyla birlikte; gıda, çimento, maden, yapı kimyasalları, kimya ve tohum gibi birçok sektöre yönelik yüksek mukavemetli, çevreye duyarlı kraft torba çözümleri sunmaktadır.

Name: Trevipapel
Description:
Trevipapel, S.A
Fundada em 1999 com o objetivo de transformar parte dos produtos comercializados pela empresa associada Socigene, a Trevipapel, S.A evoluiu desde uma pequena empresa, consolidando a sua atividade e tornando-se um dos principais fabricantes de produtos de higiene profissional (AfH) em Portugal.

Com sede na Lousã, distrito de Coimbra, Portugal, a Trevipapel S.A. possui 2 unidades fabris estrategicamente localizadas no centro do país, onde são transformados anualmente cerca de 20.000 ton de papel, produzindo para o mercado interno e exportando os seus produtos marca Joker para Espanha, Europa Central, África e América do Sul.
Location: Zona Industrial Alto do Padrão, Lousã

Name: Segezha Group
Description:
Segezha Group is an international forest industry holding (since September 2014 – Sistema JFSC’s wholly owned subsidiary) that performs a full cycle of timber harvesting and advanced wood processing operations. 

Segezha Group’s production assets are located in 13 countries (Russia, Ireland, Sweden, Germany, Denmark, Italy, Romania, Netherlands, Turkey, Czech Republic, Finland, France and Poland) and include more than 50 plants: 

15 - Timber harvesting 
15 - Paper Sacks 
4  -  Sawn wood 
4  -  Heat energy 
3  -  Plywood and wood boards 
2  -  Pulp and Paper  
1  -  House-building 
________________________________________________________________________________ 

Segezha Group – международный вертикально интегрированный лесопромышленный холдинг, с сентября 2014 года объединяющий лесозаготовительные и лесоперерабатывающие активы АФК «Система». 

Активы Segezha Group расположены в 13 странах (Россия, Ирландия, Швеция, Германия, Дания, Италия, Румыния, Нидерланды, Турция, Чехия, Финляндия, Франция и Польша) и включают более 50 предприятий, в том числе:
