Name: Cenveo Envelope Group
Description: Cenveo’s Envelope Group is one of the world's largest envelope manufacturers, producing one out of every four envelopes in the United States with a wide variety of types and seals. Our Commercial Envelope Group stands out in the industry for creativity in direct mail and the ability to convert various paper weights and styles. Our facilities meet an assortment of customer demands, from short runs to long, simple graphics to sophisticated. Innovation in envelope design is Cenveo's specialty.

Name: PT Kertas Nusantara
Description: A single line pulp mill that produces high quality Bleached Hardwood Kraft Pulp with Design Capacity 525,000 admt per year. Its product is widely accepted across the globe as raw material for high end paper products such as coated paper and ivory board, as well as uncoated paper and tissue products.

Name: Papelera del Sur
Description:
Somos Papelera del Sur , junto con H. Koch, empresa distribuidora de cartulina, e Index, formamos parte de la  Unidad de Negocios de Cartulina del Grupo HZ, una de las organizaciones más importantes en la Industria del Packaging en América Latina.

Nuestra compañía fue fundada en 1960 en Tornquist, al sudoeste de la provincia de Buenos Aires, y fue adquirida por el Grupo HZ en 1973, con el objetivo de integrar sus operaciones como fuente de materia prima para la producción de envases.

Con un crecimiento sostenido a través de los años, nos consolidamos como único fabricante de cartulina encapada reciclada en Argentina, ofreciendo en la actualidad cartulinas reciclables y biodegradables de alta calidad desarrolladas en su mayor parte por materiales post consumo reciclados.

Con oficinas comerciales en Caseros, provincia de Buenos Aires y nuestra planta productiva en Tornquist, desarrollamos y fabricamos productos de fibras celulósicas priorizando la recuperación de materiales post-consumo, fomentando en la sociedad la economía circular y el cuidado del medio ambiente.

Estamos orgullosos de ser Industria Nacional y contribuir con nuestros procesos y productos al crecimiento de la Industria Papelera y al cambio sustentable!

Name: PUSTERLA 1880 - S.P.A.
Description: Pusterla 1880 stands for boxes and cases in any shape, materials and with any degree of complexity, conceived and produced thanks to constant research about innovative materials and original technical solutions. The group operates with endless imagination and countless finishing possibilities. It has cutting-edge machinery and production plants and is able to automatically perform even the most complex processes.

Name: Indo Global
Description:
Indo Global Commercials (IGC) is an international paper trading house with a sharp understanding and expertise in paper trade for 30 years, dealing in all grades of paper including Newsprint, Packaging Paper, Writing-Printing Paper and Waste Paper, with annual sales now crossing 200,000 MT.

Authorised dealers of a number of suppliers in India, Russia, Europe, North America and Asia-Pacific, and are serving customers in countries across Africa, Middle East and South Asia. Newsprint and packaging grades form the backbone of our business, having a large customer network of publishers and corrugators, and are the trusted channels of many mills.

Headquartered in Nagpur, India and an overseas office in Dubai, we aspire to continue adding new geographies to our portfolio.

Our associate company M/S Jain Coal Services has been in coal business for almost 4 decades. We believe in maintaining the toughest standards of integrity and developing a win-win relationship with all our valued associates.

Find out more about us at - www.indoglobal.asia

Name: Beaver Paper
Description:
Beaver Paper, a member of Koehler Group, is a globally recognized producer of TexPrint sublimation paper, ProTex tissue, and TexStyles graphic fabrics for the dye-sub and digital print industry.

 With 40 years of experience, Beaver Paper offers the most comprehensive portfolio of sublimation media. Our products can be found in 51 countries worldwide and are carried by distributors and direct sales out of our Georgia headquarters or its sales and distribution facilities in Los Angeles, Calif., Willstätt, DE and Zaandam, NL. 

Our worldwide distribution partners possess the knowledge and expertise to ensure superior results. Beaver Paper customers have our commitment to providing innovative, quality products. 

For more information, visit www.beaverpaper.com.

Name: Bio pappel
Description: Bio-pappel

Name: rettenmeier
Description: With a total of 1,600 employees and 70 apprentices at six locations in Germany, Latvia and Slovakia, we are one of Europe's leading manufacturers of solid wood products. Responsibility, quality and sustainability are our top priorities – especially in our collaboration as #teamrettenmeier.

Name: Case Paper
Description:
As one of the largest paper merchants and converters backed by mills in the U.S., we’ve got what you need. With 5 locations across the nation, we offer a massive, high-quality inventory with virtually any paper stock you could need, the equipment and know-how to cut them to custom sizes, and the distribution infrastructure to get your order to you ASAP!

So, whether you’re a commercial printer, folding carton company, potential employee, paper aficionado, or just bored, give us a call at 1-888-CASE-1ST. We’re always happy to talk, plus we have lots of opinions on various subjects: How Boston sports teams are too good, how Game of Thrones should have ended, our idea for a Fyre Festival that’s not a scam… What were we talking about? Oh, right. Paper (and paperboard).

Name: Dadaşlar Palet
Description:
Ahşap Palet Sektöründe Türkiye’nin Öncüsü.

1993 yılında İzmir/ Pınarbaşı’da kurulan Dadaşlar Palet, 2010 Haziran ayından itibaren Torbalı İlçesi Ayrancılar Beldesinde, 6,000 m2 kapalı alana sahip toplam 55,000 m2 lik arazide yaklaşık 500 kişilik tecrübeli, eğitimli personeli ile teknolojinin en son imkanlarını kullanarak palet ve kasakat imalatını, satışını ve ikinci el palet satışını devam ettirmektedir.

Name: LGPL Paper Industries Pvt. Ltd.
Description: Lotus Global Pvt. Ltd. was founded in 2007, and steady growth since then has led us to become one of India’s leading exporters of paper stationary products. We take pride in our focus on cost effectiveness and our ability to produce a wide range of high-quality paper stationary products. This has led us to become the manufacturing partner of choice for several multinational retailers in countries like USA, UK, Germany, and more.

Name: Promasa SpA
Description: Promasa SpA is a company based out of Chile.

Name: Finch Paper
Description:
Having begun as a family-owned sawmill, lumberyard and quarry business more than 150 years ago, Finch is a premier, vertically integrated paper manufacturer specializing in high-bright, uncoated papers for North American printing and converting markets. Using advanced manufacturing systems, Finch produces a broad portfolio of opaque, text and cover and digital papers for multi-press environments.

Finch also operates French Paper, which has manufactured premium custom paper since 1871. French’s products are used in graphic arts, printing, packaging, writing, text, cover, specialty, and gift applications. French is known for its unique ability to produce custom colors.

Name: Kronospan Germany
Description:
Kronospan is one of the world's leading manufacturers of wood-based panels and value-added products for the interior design, furniture, and construction industries. 

Since our operations commenced with a single sawmill in 1897, Kronospan has developed a unique supply chain with over 35 production sites and 21 distribution centers in 28 countries and more than 14,000 co-workers around the world. 

As the leader in technical development in our industry, we have pioneered many key advances and will continue to lead product development and innovation into the future. For over a century Kronospan has been meeting its customers’ needs with an unbeatable combination of great design, quality products, value for money, respect for the environment, and outstanding service. 

We are driven by a passion for our business and strive for excellence in everything we do.  

Get more detailed product information on www.kronospan-express.com 
Corporate website: www.kronospan-worldwide.com
Kronospan Foundation: www.kronospanfoundation.org

Name: Indo Global
Description:
Indo Global Commercials (IGC) is an international paper trading house with a sharp understanding and expertise in paper trade for 30 years, dealing in all grades of paper including Newsprint, Packaging Paper, Writing-Printing Paper and Waste Paper, with annual sales now crossing 200,000 MT.

Authorised dealers of a number of suppliers in India, Russia, Europe, North America and Asia-Pacific, and are serving customers in countries across Africa, Middle East and South Asia. Newsprint and packaging grades form the backbone of our business, having a large customer network of publishers and corrugators, and are the trusted channels of many mills.

Headquartered in Nagpur, India and an overseas office in Dubai, we aspire to continue adding new geographies to our portfolio.

Our associate company M/S Jain Coal Services has been in coal business for almost 4 decades. We believe in maintaining the toughest standards of integrity and developing a win-win relationship with all our valued associates.

Name: Lipy Paper Mills Limited
Description:
A leading PAPER MANUFACTURER in Bangladesh with a production capacity of 44,000 Tonnes. Per annum. 

PRODUCTION FACILITIES: It operates Paper Mills in Sonargaon, Narayanganj, Bangladesh 

PRODUCTS: We strive to be ahead of the competition by constantly moving up the value chain. Today our branded and value added products constitute almost the entire production. We are market leaders in office paper. 

GLOBAL FOOT PRINT: The Company has an export footprint for high value branded A4, A3 products in the Middle East, South East Asia, SAARC and various African countries..

Name: Larsil - Servicos Florestais
Description: Empresa especializada na prestação de serviços florestais

Name: Australian Forest Products Association
Description:
AFPA is the peak national industry body representing the resources, processing, and pulp, paper and bioproduct industries covering the forest products value chain.

AFPA represents all elements of the value chain from the sustainable harvesting of plantations and multiple use natural forest resource including forest establishment and management, harvesting and haulage, processing of timber resources and manufacture of pulp, paper and bioproducts.

AFPA’s membership falls under four chambers (Growers, Hardwood Processing, Softwood Manufacturing, and Pulp, Paper and Bioproducts) representing the core business of organisations at different points in the value chain.

Name: MPBS
Description: MPBS est spécialisée dans l’anoblissement des panneaux en bois et la fabrication des composants de meubles.

Name: Irving Pulp & Paper
Description:
Irving Pulp & Paper produces softwood and hardwood grades of kraft pulp. We specialize in fibre for premium tissue products in global markets, producing exceptional tissue quality NBSK pulp.

Irving Pulp & Paper operates in highly technical, fast-paced, competitive businesses and is part of J.D. Irving’s highly integrated forest products value chain. Our goal is to play an integrated role in sustainably transforming our renewable forest resources into value-added products for today’s consumer markets.

Name: Anin Papéis Especiais
Description:
Somos a Anin Indústria de Papéis e atuamos há mais de 15 anos no mercado brasileiro, produzindo e distribuindo produtos de alta qualidade. Possuímos duas fábricas na região metropolitana de São Paulo, contamos com amplo espaço e excelente sistema logístico. 
Com mais de 400 colaboradores, produzimos mais de 35 mil toneladas de papel por ano. Com uma linha de produção diversificada, atuamos em três divisões: Papéis descartáveis, Sacolas de Papel personalizadas e Papéis especiais produzidos de acordo com as necessidades dos clientes. Todos os nossos produtos passam por diversos testes em laboratório e rigoroso controle para garantir que estejam dentro dos nossos padrões de qualidade. Trabalhamos empenhados com a segurança no trabalho e o desenvolvimento humano, sempre prezando pela qualidade de vida daqueles que estão ao nosso lado, comprometidos para manter a qualidade de nossos produtos. 
A Anin e seus produtos estão presentes no dia a dia dos brasileiros, seja na educação, na saúde, no comércio. O Papel tem uma grande demanda na nossa sociedade e por isso deve ser produzido com responsabilidade, pensando nisso, nós da Anin seguimos os mais altos padrões de qualidade e respeitando as melhores práticas de gestão socioambiental. Somos uma empresa que dedica todos os seus esforços para satisfazer seus clientes e alcançar resultados. 
Posicionada entre as maiores fabricantes de papéis do Brasil, garantimos a produção e entrega de produtos de qualidade dentro das necessidades dos consumidores. Nós oferecemos praticidade, inovação, tecnologia, conforto e valor aos nossos clientes. Nós somos a Anin Papéis Especiais. Superar expectativas é o nosso papel.

Name: Universidade do Papel
Description:
Somos um espaço artístico especializado na criação de troféus e presentes corporativos sustentáveis, feitos com design autoral em papel.
Atuamos também com experiências de team building para empresas, eventos criativos e ações que conectam arte, sustentabilidade e a indústria do papel.
Promovemos vivências artísticas abertas ao público e desenvolvemos projetos sociais que utilizam o papel como ferramenta de expressão, formação e geração de renda.

Name: Southern Forest Products Association
Description:
The Southern Forest Products Association (SFPA) represents Southern Pine products and services around the globe, managing a comprehensive product promotion program. Driven by the simple motto of "Service", SFPA advances the industry by promoting the use of member products in domestic and international markets and facilitating the exchange of information and ideas.

Click here for your primary Southern Pine resources: linktr.ee/southern_pine1915

Name: Mitsubishi HiTec Paper Europe
Description:
Mitsubishi HiTec Paper Europe GmbH is a German subsidiary of Mitsubishi Paper Mills Ltd., Japan, one of the world's leading manufacturers of specialty paper. The roughly 450 employees at Mitsubishi HiTec Paper produce high-quality thermal and inkjet papers at a tradition-rich location in Bielefeld. 

The factory stands out for own base paper production, state-of-the-art production machinery and innovative coating technologies. Through its dense global sales network, Mitsubishi HiTec Paper supplies a full range of specialty papers for many applications – and is a highly capable partner whenever customized coated speciality paper solutions are required.

As a responsible manufacturer, Mitsubishi HiTec Paper has been paying particular attention to the eco-friendly and high-quality production and converting of its coated specialty papers for many years.

What Mitsubishi HiTec Paper stands for:
>	Many years of experience and expertise in paper making
>	State-of-the-art coating technologies & coatings
>	German-Japanese R&D of the highest level
>	High innovative power
>	Made in Germany
>	Wide range and depth of grades
>	Worldwide sales network
>	Excellent technical service

We take the protection of your data seriously. To find out about how and to what extent we use your personal data at our company go to: https://www.mitsubishi-paper.com/en/papers/privacy-policy-mpe/

Imprint:
https://www.mitsubishi-paper.com/en/hitec-paper/imprint/

Name: Xylofutur
Description:
Depuis sa création en 2005, Xylofutur est le seul Pôle de Compétitivité dédié à la filière forêt-bois-chimie énergie. Son objectif est de développer la compétitivité de la filière nationale par l’innovation et la R&D. Xylofutur rassemble aujourd’hui environ 250 adhérents et a labellisé plus de 280 projets.

Xylofutur accompagne les porteurs de projets et leurs partenaires dans l’accès : 
aux marchés actuels et futurs
aux financements publics et privés
à l’internationalisation
et à l’anticipation des besoins en compétences via 

3 domaines d’activités stratégiques :
 Arbre et la forêt
 Bois
 Chimie-énergie

Xylofutur héberge le réseau des start-up de la filière forêt-bois : La WoodTech

Name: MIP Florestal
Description:
Somos especialistas na área de manejo fitossanitário no mercado florestal, contribuindo significativamente em inovações metodológicas na área de Manejo Integrado de Pragas.

Com um banco de dados único de pragas, doenças e manejo assertivo, a MIP Florestal auxilia o investidor nas tomadas de decisões do início ao fim do ciclo da cultura – do viveiro ao campo, tornando o investimento mais seguro e lucrativo. 

Entendemos que, a escolha da região, condição edafoclimática, material genético e manejo silvicultural, influenciam diretamente na ocorrência de enfermidades. Tais motivos, fizeram com que a MIP Florestal se destacasse em solucionar esses problemas de forma economicamente viável e ambientalmente correto.

Name: Abu Dhabi National Industrial Projects Co.
Description:
Founded in 1997 and incorporated as a private shareholding company, Abu Dhabi
National Industrial Projects (ADNIP), is a pioneer in regional industrial investment
and owner of a diversified investment portfolio. ADNIP is a world class industrial
group in the UAE capital that sets regional standards for entrepreneurial foresight
and managerial excellence.
ADNIP plays a leading role in implementing projects in the United Arab Emirates
by forming strategic partnerships with multinational corporations. The group
promotes and undertakes sound industrial projects with substantial investment
opportunities that cater to current and future growth markets.
Adapting to challenging opportunities in regional and international markets,
ADNIP has established some of the region’s most successful companies backed
with cutting edge technology in fields as diverse as medical devices, tissue
paper production, carpet tufting and weaving, technology transfer and business
consulting.
As owners of subsidiaries functioning as independent organisations in their own
right, ADNIP adds unique value in strategic goal setting, business development
and shared quality management practices across the group.

Name: Roosevelt Paper Company
Description:
A family owned business since 1932, Roosevelt Paper Company is a major distributor of printing paper and packaging grades with an extensive inventory of both coated and uncoated rolls and sheets from leading North American mills.  In house converting facilities in New Jersey, Illinois, and Kentucky enable us to offer custom sizes and quick deliveries to customers nationwide and abroad. 

Save money.  Call Roosevelt.

Name: Asia Honour Paper
Description:
Established in 1999 as Malaysian Newsprint Industries Sdn Bhd, Asia Honour’s early years were focused on building a solid track record as a reputable provider of newsprint for Malaysia and across Southeast Asia. Today, with a 250,000tpa design capacity with plans for expansion, we produce a range of high quality recycled paper products for key Asian markets such as China, India and Indonesia, and are increasingly serving global markets as our product categories continue to expand.

Our state-of-the-art technologies include a paper machine optimised to produce lower grammage paper and has capacity to produce recycled printing and writing paper. This is to meet regional demand for low grammage recycled uncoated woodfree paper (UWF). With a dedication to sustainable and circularity-embedded operations, we also have an effluent treatment plant, a de-ink plant, a sludge incinerator and biomass steam plant. Our operations are also certified by Malaysia MyHijau, FSC and bear the Eco-Label Mark. We continuously drive product innovation with recovered fibre content to provide our customers with more environmentally friendly options.

Name: CARTONES DE GUATEMALA, S.A.
Description: SOMOS EMPRESA LIDER A NIVEL CENTROAMERICANO, PRODUCIMOS Y COMERCIALIZAMOS CAJAS DE CARTON CORRUGADO, Y CONTAMOS CON EL MEJOR TIEMPO DE ENTREGA.

Name: Advanced International Industries Company
Description: Corrugated carton factory

Name: Scierie Raboterie LEMAIRE
Description:
Au cœur du massif forestier Vosgien, la Scierie Raboterie LEMAIRE exploite de manière durable des bois résineux de grande qualité. Du sciage à la construction, la Scierie Raboterie LEMAIRE conjugue tradition et innovation au service de ses clients.

Savoir-faire et technologie

La Scierie Raboterie LEMAIRE bénéficie des ressources naturelles exceptionnelles de la forêt vosgienne. Pour les valoriser, l’entreprise mobilise richesses humaines et moyens techniques industriels performants.

Une technologie à la pointe : 100 000 m3 de résineux sciés avec une ligne canter circulaire, une raboterie performante, 60 000 m3 de capacité de séchage, le traitement par trempage ou autoclave, dans tous les secteurs d’activités, la Scierie Raboterie LEMAIRE est dotée des outils les plus modernes pour satisfaire au mieux ses clients. 

TRAVAILLER LE VIVANT EST UN PLAISIR,
ET AUSSI UNE GRANDE RESPONSABILITÉ

Tous les bois exploités sont issus de forêts entretenues, gérées durablement et labélisées PEFC.

« Plus on agit, moins on subit »

1 CAMION acheté chez SRL = 10 ARBRES REPLANTES sur nos massifs

Construire une ressource forestière pour l’avenir, fait partie de nos préoccupations depuis de nombreuses années. Le bon sens guide notre stratégie future avec pour mission principale d’exercer notre métier en prenant soin de notre planète. C’est pourquoi, nous sommes engagés à la reconstitution des peuplement résineux sur le massif vosgien. L’enjeu est d’assurer la préservation de la ressource et ainsi la pérennité de l’approvisionnement et des emplois dans notre scierie.

Zéro déchet, valorisation de 100% de nos bois dans nos process...

Histoire d’une entreprise familiale forte et animée par la passion de notre produit, le bois, nous sommes à même de répondre à toutes les exigences actuelles du marché et de ses évolutions. Nos salariés oeuvrent avec passion pour la réussite et la durabilité de notre entreprise et la satisfaction de nos clients...

Name: Novelteak Ltd.
Description:
As one of the largest FSC Certified Teak producers and product manufacturers in the world and a fully integrated company "from seed to product” we are trusted by leading architects, designers, manufacturers, and DIY centers worldwide. With a comprehensive product portfolio, NOVELTEAK brings sustainable, durable and the natural beauty of teak to enhance projects and homes. 

Started in 1989 in Costa Rica, NOVELTEAK operates 20.000 hectares of forest operation including FSC Certified Teak plantations and protected areas. The forest operation is fully integrated to a manufacturing plant producing an extensive portfolio of value-added products, including: profiles, panels, laminated beams and columns, and ready to sell table tops, cutting boards and shower mats, ideal for any home or commercial application including hospitality, corporate and retail spaces.

Name: Groupe Archimbaud
Description:
Entreprise familiale créée en 1932, le Groupe Archimbaud est un acteur de premier plan dans la filière bois : sciage de planches à palettes, fabrication de palettes et valorisation de ses produits connexes à travers ses usines de granulés et de cogénération. 
De la forêt à la valorisation des déchets, l'économie circulaire prend tout sens au sein du Groupe Archimbaud.
L’entreprise dispose, outre son siège de Secondigné-sur-Belle (79), de sept sites de production et de stockage en France, à Secondigné-sur-Belle (79), Secondigny (79), Labouheyre (40), Saverdun (09), Mauzé-sur-le-Mignon (79), Tournon (73) et Bussac-Forêt (17), et deux sites de production à l'étranger (Italie et Emirats Arabes Unis).

Name: Modellfabrik Papier gGmbH
Description:
With the Modellfabrik Papier, the paper industry is taking the initiative today to achieve the climate goals of tomorrow. Our primary goal is to defossilise paper production in order to make the entire industry climate-neutral and fit for the future.

The core processes concern paper production, energy provision, resource management and their innovative linkage. We demonstrate solutions that reduce resource consumption, improve yields and further close raw material cycles.

Name: Athens Paper
Description:
About Athens

At Athens, handshakes count and hard work matters. We opened our doors in 1952. In 1968, Donald Jenkins, Jr. and Bud Chamberlain purchased the company. Together, these two entrepreneurs built one of the largest privately-owned distributors in the Southeast, growing from one office in Nashville to twelve locations serving sixteen states.

Athens has three divisions: Paper, Packaging, and Wide Format. In all divisions, we have strategic partnerships with the right suppliers for you.  Our Paper Division offers offset and digital papers, as well as envelopes and solutions for publishers. Along with providing everyday supplies, our Packaging Division can perform a comprehensive facility review for you to identify opportunities to increase productivity and lower total costs. As an authorized dealer for HP latex role printers and Scitex flat-bed UV printers, our Wide Format Division provides equipment, supplies and technical support. 

Athens works to preserve and sustain our planet’s natural resources. All divisions are:
•	Chain of Custody Certified by the Forest Stewardship Council (FSC)
•	Sustainable Forestry Initiative (SFI)  Certified
•	Programme for the Endorsement of Forest Certification (PEFC)

With well-stocked warehouses, online ordering, and over 10,000 products, you get what you need when you need it. Everyone on our team believes great service is good business. We’re friendly, responsive and respectful, working hard every day to earn your trust on every order. Call us today.

Name: Papeteries du Léman
Description:
Nous sommes spécialisés dans la production des papiers minces et ultra-minces à destination des marchés de l’impression, de l’édition et de la cigarette. Depuis 2016, nous diversifions notre activité avec la production de papier cuisson et travaillons sur de nouvelles innovations.
Le service production est composé de 3 machines et dispose d’une capacité de 45.000 tonnes par an. Le grammage de nos papiers se situe entre 10 et 70 g/m².
Nous exportons 70% de notre production dans plus de 50 pays, sur chaque continent, et ce de la manière la plus respectueuse en terme environnemental au travers notamment des certifications PEFC, FSC, et ISO.

Les Papeteries du Léman sont situées à Publier, au nord du département de la Haute-Savoie, à 3 km d’Evian. Publier fait face à la Suisse (Lausanne à 13 km par le lac).
Nichée entre lac et montagnes, Publier bénéficie d'un environnement naturel véritablement exceptionnel, qui permet d’allier plage et station de ski (à 12km), vous offrant une multitude d’activités en toutes saisons.

Name: PAPETERIES DE VIZILLE
Description: In the heart of Europe, with decades of know-how and continuous investments, Vizille paper mill is 100% part of the family-owned VICAT group. Vizille paper mill has 2 distinct activities: the manufacturing of paper sacks and the production of a wide range of specialty papers and boards converted by our customers for various markets: barrier substrates for food packaging, wood-free bulkybook papers for printing, high end materials for luxury markets, and security papers against forgery and counterfeiting. Our strategy is to develop ecofriendly papers, boards, and sacks for our customers worldwide.

Name: JEMA Reflorestamento
Description:
A JEMA Reflorestamento atua com excelência no setor florestal desde 18 de janeiro de 2008.

Somos especializados no preparo do solo, implantação e manutenção de florestas, com foco em plantios de mudas de eucalipto com alto padrão genético.

Contamos com uma equipe de profissionais experientes, comprometidos com a entrega de soluções sustentáveis e de alta qualidade para nossos clientes. Trabalhamos com responsabilidade social, viabilidade econômica e respeito ao meio ambiente, buscando gerar valor para colaboradores, parceiros e para a sociedade como um todo.

Com estrutura e expertise para assumir projetos de diferentes portes, seguimos as mais rigorosas exigências técnicas do setor, sendo reconhecidos pela segurança, qualidade e pontualidade na execução dos serviços.

Acreditamos no potencial transformador da silvicultura e temos orgulho de contribuir ativamente para o fortalecimento dessa cadeia no cenário nacional.

Name: Peli Parke
Description: Kağıt ve orman ürünleri sektöründe yeniliklerin öncüsü Peli Parke olarak; yarım yüzyılı aşkın bir süredir doğanın renklerini, desenlerini ve konforunu yaşam mekanlarına taşıyoruz. Kendini işine adamış binlerce çalışanımız, uzmanlığı tutkuyla birleştiren deneyimli kadromuzla hem uluslararası pazarda öncü hem de Türkiye’nin en büyük entegre orman ürünleri üreticilerinden biriyiz. Başarının sürdürülebilir olduğu zaman değerli olduğuna inanıyor ve bu bakış açısıyla doğaya saygı mottosuyla tüm faaliyetlerimizi gerçekleştiriyoruz. Türkiye’nin en geniş ürün çeşitliliğine sahip yeniliklerin ve şıklığın parke markası olarak tüketicilerimizin hayatına üst düzey kalitede ürünlerle; toplumsal hayata ise sosyal sorumluluk projelerimizle dokunuyoruz. Yaşamın Geçtiği Her Yerde sloganıyla Türkiye’de beş bölge müdürlüğü ve yurt içi-yurt dışı 1.000’den fazla bayimiz ile hizmet veriyoruz ve yaptığımız yatırımlarla, her geçen gün daha fazla talep edilen bir marka olmanın mutluluğunu yaşıyoruz. As a trailblazer in the paper and forestry products industry, Peli Parke has been introducing the colors, patterns and comfort of nature to spaces for more than half a century. With thousands of dedicated employees and an experienced staff that blends expertisewith passion, we are both a pioneer in the international market and one of the biggest integrated manufacturers of forestry products in Turkey. We believe that success is valuable only when it is sustainable and maintain all our operations in line with this perspective under the motto of “respect for nature.” As the parquet brand of innovation and elegance and with the largest product range in Turkey, we touchthe lives of our consumers with our top of the line products as well as our social responsibility projects. Under the slogan “Wherever There is Life”, we serve across Turkey with five regional directorates and over 1,000 dealers in Turkey and abroad, proudly becoming a brand of choice with each passing day due to our investments.

Name: PaperAge
Description: PaperAge is a business-to-business magazine offered in print and digital versions with a focus on pulp, paper, and containerboard industry and paper converting. Originally founded in 1884 as a paper industry news magazine, PaperAge today has evolved into the premier publication for paper industry professionals around the world. Our editorial encompasses: pulp and paper manufacturing, paper converting operations, technological developments, company profiles and exclusive interviews with key industry leaders.

Name: ISONAT
Description:
Isonat, PME innovante située à Mably (42) dans la région Auvergne-Rhônes-Alpes est spécialisée dans l’isolation biosourcée en fibres de bois.
Elle est le seul acteur de la filière à concevoir, s’approvisionner et produire en France l’ensemble de ses gammes de panneaux isolants pour l’intérieur et l’extérieur. Isonat participe ainsi à la vitalité économique de tout un territoire à travers une gestion durable des forêts et la création d’emplois.

Une démarche environnementale cohérente pour des produits toujours plus performants :
Aujourd’hui, pour la fabrication de ses panneaux isolants, en fibres de bois, flexibles et rigides, Isonat utilise près de 90 % de matières premières recyclées: des plaquettes de bois issues des déchets des scieries environnantes ainsi que des plaquettes de bois de rémanents de forêts majoritairement certifiées PEFC*.
Cette matière première locale et abondante est la clé de voûte d’une démarche environnementale responsable et de la recherche d’une performance et d’une excellence toujours plus importantes des produits Isonat.

Ses gammes de panneaux flexibles (isolation par l’intérieur) et de panneaux rigides (isolation par l’extérieur), offrent ainsi des réponses performantes pour l’isolation:  

- des murs par l’intérieur 
- des cloisons
- des combles aménagés et perdus
- des murs à ossature bois, ou isolation répartie
- des murs maçonnés par l’extérieur
- de la toiture par l’extérieur  

Des isolants adaptés aux démarches de labellisation HQE, E+C-, RT2020 (Bepos) :
A travers des plans d’actions visant à limiter les besoins en ressources naturelles (eau et énergie), nécessaires à leur fabrication, les panneaux isolants Isonat participent à la réduction de l’impact environnemental des bâtiments, tout au long de leur cycle de vie. 
Les résultats de ces actions sont communiqués aux clients et partenaires d’Isonat sous la forme de Fiches de Déclarations Environnementales et Sanitaires (FDES).

Name: Celulosa y Corrugados de Sonora SA de CV
Description:
Somos una empresa líder en la fabricación de papel y cajas de cartón corrugadas, que mantiene una trayectoria de excelencia gracias a cumplir y superar las expectativas de calidad y servicio de nuestros clientes.

Nuestro objetivo es cautivar de todos nuestros clientes y lograr un crecimiento sostenido día a día y con ello, consolidar nuestra presencia en el mercado del papel y cajas corrugadas.

Esto es el resultado de un eficiente trabajo de equipo, en el que accionistas, cuerpo directivo y colaboradores, persiguen una meta en común.

Nuestra empresa concentra una fuerza de ventas experimentada y dinámica, que genera una sinergia de conocimiento en la industria donde las iniciativas son atendidas con liderazgo.

Name: BURGER & CIE
Description: A family enterprise, founded in 1847 and still run by the 6th generation, Burger et Co. has written an exceptional French industrial saga from its Alsatian cradle in the "Val d'Argent", halfway between Strasbourg and Mulhouse. Today, the company asserts a unique know-how in the art of woodworking while cultivating its difference as an independent company focused on innovation, with an integrated R&D department. A major European name in wooden structures for interior and exterior design, the company that dreamed up and created booa archi-design houses has always been able to adapt, seize opportunities and negotiate the turns to be taken. This ability to constantly take up new challenges is the strength and identity of Burger. Burger 2019: 210 employees in France and 140 employees abroad - €79 million in turnover

Name: BLUE PAPER
Description: BLUE PAPER est un site de production basé au port du Rhin à Strasbourg, spécialisé dans la fabrication de papier pour ondulé (PPO) à base de 100% de papiers et cartons récupérés. Le site emploie 170 salariés et produit 440.000 tonnes de papier pour un chiffre d'affaires de 180 M€ (en moyenne). Les groupes VPK (B) et Klingele Paper & Packaging Group (D), actionnaires de BLUE PAPER, ont investi 100 M€ en 2013 pour convertir l'usine construite en 1990 à la production de papier d'emballage. BLUE PAPER s'engage au plus haut niveau dans le management de la Qualité, l'Hygiène, la Santé & Sécurité, l'Environnement et l'Energie et a obtenu les certificats ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 50001, FSC et GMP, sans oublier le contact alimentaire.

Name: The Truck Loggers Association
Description:
The Truck Loggers Association (TLA) is the official voice of independent forest contractors located throughout British Columbia. The TLA advocates on behalf of independent forest contractors about the changes taking place in society and the forest industry, and shares information about new forestry machines, methods and technology.

The TLA was formed in 1943 to give independent timber harvesting contractors a collective voice in the changes taking place in society and the forest industry. 

The TLA now represents independent harvesting contractors, independent sawmills, small tenure holders and industry suppliers located across BC. With more than 480 member companies, the TLA continues to be an influential voice in the province.

Name: Forico Pty Limited
Description:
Sustainability is the foundation of our business. Forests - both plantations and natural vegetation - form part of the solution in the battle against climate change.

Forico was established in September 2014 to manage a forest estate and forestry business purchased by a New Forests’ Investment Fund. Forico manages in excess of 173,000 hectares of land in Tasmania consisting of approximately 90,000 hectares of plantation grown for wood fibre production, and 77,000 hectares of natural vegetation maintained or enhanced for their conservation and biodiversity values.

We are future fibre!

       - Converting in Montoro (AV)

Description:
Avec plus de 4000 collaborateurs en Europe, aux Etats-Unis et en Asie et un CA dépassant 600 Millions d’Euros, le Groupe Autajon est l’un des principaux acteurs sur le marché du packaging et des étiquettes.

Nous produisons des étuis pliants, des coffrets, des étiquettes et de la PLV pour de nombreux secteurs d’activité dont la pharmacie, la cosmétique, le luxe,  les vins et spiritueux, la confiserie et l’industrie.

Autajon connaît une croissance dynamique et continue depuis son origine en 1964.

Cette réussite vient de l'engagement de ses collaborateurs qui associent la passion de leur métier et leurs compétences avec les ambitions du Groupe. 
 
Nos principes (la performance et l'innovation, l'esprit d'équipe, l'intégrité et la responsabilité sociale) guident les actions de chacun mais aussi notre politique en matière sociale. Description:

Name: The Veneer Source
Description:
INTEGRITY | EXPERTISE |  QUALITY

The Veneer Source was formed with one goal, operating our business with integrity using our expertise to provide our customers with well-produced quality veneer and good value. We supply the plywood, millwork, furniture and design community with architectural grade wood veneer offering a full range of domestic and imported veneer.

The Veneer Source prides itself on quick, reliable service and stands behind everything we offer. Maintaining a modest overhead allows us to focus on the quality of our products and service level. Our commitment to our vendors who, like our customers, we feel are partners in our business has allowed us to build a global network to source material from throughout the world.

We place tremendous value on the people in our organization, striving to employ team members that are educated, empowered and dedicated to servicing our customers. With 70+ years of cumulative experience in procurement, manufacturing and marketing wood veneer from around the world it is our teams desire to use our expertise to understand how we can help your business prosper.

Name: Continental Paper Grading Company
Description:
Continental strives to meet your industrial scrap paper recycling needs. Our team of experienced professionals will assist in servicing nearly any demand you have for scrap paper processing and/or brokerage, field rejected lots, or job lot and prime roll stock recycling. We specialize in program audit & management for manufacturer's in printing, envelope production, general conversion, and paper production. We strive to maximize the value of your scrap, and we pride ourselves on our long-standing mill relationships, which we foster in nearly every corner of the country and around the globe.

Trading in over 100,000 short tons every month, we are constantly evolving to meet the changing demands of today's global paper industry. We operate a number of offices throughout the United States and Canada and two facilities in Chicago & York, Pennsylvania, and we are ready to bring our expertise in recycling and sustainability to your business.

Name: AJ Timber Products

We have a lean and agile organization model, this enables ourselves to deliver an affordable and good service to our partners. Our products consist of raw materials from Europe, South and North America and (semi) finished items from the Asia continent.

Name: Roll Paper S.R.L.
Description:
Somos una empresa argentina dedicada a la conversión e impresión de papeles destinados al registro de información en impresoras térmicas, laser, inkjet y matriciales. 
Los rollos de papeles térmicos, químicos y obra han dado origen a la empresa y hoy siguen ocupando un lugar destacado dentro de los diferentes productos que fabrica y comercializa la empresa. 
A través de una alianza estratégica con los principales fabricantes de papel a nivel mundial sumado a un continuo incremento de la capacidad productiva
mediante inversión en tecnología, nos encontramos posicionados como proveedor líder de rollos de papel para POS, Bancos, Juegos de Azar, Autopistas, medios de transporte público y comercios en general.

Name: Skeena Sawmills Ltd.
Description:
Skeena Sawmills Ltd. (“Skeena”) is a Canadian corporation headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia. Skeena’s sawmill and its forestry and woodlands operations are located in Terrace, British Columbia. The sawmill has a capacity of approximately 200 million board feet (471,947 m3) of lumber production annually. The mill is located 135km from Prince Rupert Container Port. Skeena is one of the major sawmills in British Columbia producing Hemlock and Balsam products for the Pacific Rim and the North American markets. In addition, the mill produces Western Red Cedar (WRC) products for the North American market.

With Customer Satisfaction being the primary focus, the Company has established a strong following in the international market place. We pride in producing high quality products in variety of sizes at competitive prices to meet our customer needs.

Name: Strathmore Artist Papers
Description:
About
For lasting works of art, Strathmore is the artist's choice.  and TM used under license from Mohawk Fine Papers Inc.

Company Overview
Leader in fine art papers-
Choice of paper is one of the most important decisions an artist makes in determining the outcome of their work. Whether your choice of medium is watercolor, charcoal, pastel, pencil or pen and ink, you can be confident Strathmore Paper will enhance your artistic efforts!

Description
The history of Strathmore Paper Company began on St. Patrick's Day in 1892 when its founder, Horace Moses, opened the Mittineague paper mill in West Springfield, MA. Soon after opening the first mill, Mr. Moses visited the Valley of Strathmore in Scotland. The thistle was in full bloom and the beauty of the site impressed Horace Moses so much that he started using the name and the thistle as a symbol of high quality art and printing papers. 

The Strathmore brand name began to appear on our fine art papers in 1899, first with Charcoal and soon after with Bristol. The Strathmore brand quickly became known as one of the highest quality art papers used by many leading artists around the world. Strathmore has kept this reputation as a supplier of fine art paper for over a century. Today, we continue to provide artists of all levels with the ideal surface for producing beautiful works of art.

Name: Fresh - Arab Paper & Industry Company
Description:
Arab Paper and Industry Company – Fresh is one of the leading companies in the field of operating, manufacturing and packing all kinds of hygienic tissue paper that meets all the needs of hygienic tissue paper products for the consumer sector – the tourism sector – the medical sector and the industrial sector.
Arab Paper Company was established in 1997 at the 10th of Ramadan City industrial zone B3 area No. 98.
In 2005, The company acquired area No. 99 and expanded it’s factory premises at 10th of Ramadan city and was re-established under the name “Arab Paper and Industry company – Fresh”.
Arab Paper and Industry Company – Fresh is one of the most reputable and modern factories in the Arab Republic of Egypt, sustaining top quality and strict commitment to international standards & specifications, while providing broad diversity in hygienic paper products.
The large production capabilities allowed us to conduct contract manufacturing for other companies own brand and private labels products.

Name: Silvere
Description: Silvere is a precision forestry startup based in Helsinki, Finland. Current methods for valuing forests can be extremely inaccurate – leading to poor decision making and financial losses for forest owners and forestry companies worldwide. At Silvere, we combine forestry expertise with leading-edge AI, big data, robotics, and remote sensing to provide the most accurate forest information on the planet.

Name: BADRUKA EXIM PVT LTD
Description:
BADRUKA EXIM PVT LTD is a company based out of HYDERABAD, Telangana, India.

The company has experience in the paper and paper products industry for over 25 years, with strong relationship ties with paper product suppliers from all over the world and a loyal customer base.

We deal in all the verticals the paper product industry has to offer such as;
1. Wood free Paper
2. Bleached / Unbleached Kraft
3. C2S Paper  
4. C1S Paper for flexible packaging needs
5. Paper board for packaging [Duplex boards, Folding box boards / SBS Boards]
6. Copier / Office printing Paper
...and much more.

The only stop for anyone looking for all kinds of Paper related solutions in any quantity they desire as we overcome the logistical nightmare for our customers.

We as a company believe and promote ethical business practices and maximum value creation for our esteemed stakeholders.

Name: Strathcona Paper
Description:
Today, we are North America’s only paper board company dedicated exclusively to the manufacture and supply of medium to heavy weight paper board.

If you have paper-based packaging applications requiring high levels of stiffness and strength, our 100% recycled, clay coated paper board products deliver. That is why many of America’s largest consumer brands specify Strathcona as their box board of choice.

From its humble start in 1873 as the Napanee Paper Company, Strathcona has built a business on the strong foundations of continuous upgrades, modernization, research and capital investment.  More than a century of experience, a single-minded product focus and a work force dedicated to exceeding quality expectations are three compelling reasons to consider Strathcona.

Name: Harry Freeman & Son Limited (Freeman Lumber)
Description: Founded in 1832 Harry Freeman & Son Limited has evolved from a small water-powered sawmill to one of the most modern and flexible sawmills in Eastern Canada.

Name: MICELI Pisos
Description:
La firma se inicia hacia 1921, cuando Ciro Miceli, joven inmigrante proveniente de Italia, instala una pequeña carbonería llamada “La Favorita”. El carbón comienza siendo repartido por un pequeño carro de tracción a sangre, el que mas tarde es reemplazado por un camión.

Hacia 1937, su joven hijo, decide la ampliación de la gama de productos incorporando diversos productos forestales, tales como: postes, leña y varillas, materiales fundamentalmente utilizados en el campo.

Mas tarde, hacia 1958, respondiendo a los nuevos requerimientos del mercado y a las nuevas formas de producción, se incorpora la venta de maderas para la carpintería y la construcción. Fundamentalmente rollos aserrados provenientes de Paraguay y Argentina, los que ingresaban por barcazas y/o ferrocarril.

En los años 70, la firma comienza a realizar las primeras importaciones directas de madera provenientes de Chile y Paraguay. Finalmente en 1985 la empresa se consolida como Miceli Maderas SRL. Actualmente es habitual compradora de maderas de Paraguay, Brasil y Bolivia, y en las provincias de Salta, Misiones y Entre Ríos de nuestro País.

Ubicada desde sus inicios en la cuidad de Rosario, Santa Fe, Argentina, centro neurálgico del MERCOSUR. Esto facilita el rápido y directo acceso a las vías de comunicación y con ello a los mercados productores de madera.

Actualmente cuenta con un amplio depósito de 33.600 m2, lo que permite el adecuado y cuidadoso almacenamiento, clasificación y secado de las distintas especies. La firma se carectiza por su comercializacion en productos de óptima calidad (buena pasta, corte y medidas), constituyéndose esto en un importante activo distintivo.

En 2007 ha comenzado a importar Pisos Flotantes provenientes de la Comunidad Económica Europea.

En enero de 2009 abrió un exclusivo showroom en calle Córdoba (casi esquina Callao), dedicado a la venta de pisos macizos y flotantes, techos y decks de madera.

Name: TANN PHILIPPINES
Description:
TANN PHILIPPINES, Inc. (TPI) is a member of the TANN Group of Companies based in Austria. TANN is a global leader in the conversion and supply of tipping paper to the tobacco industry.

TANN PHILIPPINES is the largest affiliate outside of the Headquarters. It exports mainly to markets in Asia Pacific, Middle East and Africa. For over 20 years, TPI continues to be the competence center in Asia and the most productive facility of its kind globally.

Name: Cellulose Group FZC
Description:
In 1982, Cellulose Group Ltd was incorporated as a trading and foreign manufacturer’s representative firm in Pakistan. During its initial stages, the company dealt with the import and sales of paper and board catering to the printing and packaging industry. Subsequently, it expanded its product line to imported wood pulp, unbleached kraft, bleached kraft and dissolving pulp. These products were sold to industries manufacturing kraft liner, sack kraft paper, writing & printing paper, paper board, tissue paper, plastic molding compounds (urea & formaldehyde), cellulose ethers and excipients, filtration and hygiene products.

In 2003, the company Cellulose Group FZC was also incorporated in the United Arab Emirates and expanded its market in UAE, India, Egypt, Bangladesh and Turkey into similar industries.

In 2005, it grew its focus to include the import and sale of cotton and man-made textile fibers such as viscose, staple fiber, viscose filament, polyester staple fiber to Pakistan’s textile industry.

In 2010, the company started to sell construction chemicals, furnishing textile and interior finishing products, non-wovens, advance material, technical textiles, medical textiles and hygiene products.

Today, Cellulose Group continues to deliver the products and services that have been a part of company’s product range over the years, focusing on markets where the company developed its historical strengths.

Name: Fortress Specialty Cellulose Inc.
Description:
The Fortress Specialty Cellulose Mill is located in Thurso Québec, 150 kilometers west of Montréal and is situated on approximately 800 acres of land.  The mill employs over 300 workers and has a production capacity of ~ 173,500 tonnes (ADMT) of specialty cellulose, also known as dissolving pulp. Fortress Specialty Cellulose pulp sales are primarily to the rayon/viscose industry with a geographic focus on markets in Asia. 

The mill operates a 24 MW cogeneration facility that produces sustainable green energy from biomass, supplying power to Hydro Quebec.

The Fortress Specialty Cellulose Mill is subsidiary of Canadian based, Fortress Global Enterprises Inc. (TSX:FGE) www.fortressge.com

In 2018 Fortress Global Enterprises launched a strategic plan to become one of the world leaders in demonstrating and commercializing leading technologies for conversion of hemicellulose to advanced sustainable bioproducts.  In March 2018 Fortress Global Enterprises acquired S2G Biochemicals Inc., a Vancouver-based developer of C5 sugar conversion technologies developed jointly with Mondelēz, one of the world’s largest snack food companies. Fortress is in the process of commissioning the construction of a demonstration plant to produce xylitol and other bioproducts at its Fortress Specialty Cellulose Mill.

Name: Miceli Maderas SRL
Description:
La firma se inicia hacia 1921, cuando Ciro Miceli, joven inmigrante proveniente de Italia, instala una pequeña carbonería llamada “La Favorita”. El carbón comienza siendo repartido por un pequeño carro de tracción a sangre, el que mas tarde es reemplazado por un camión.

Hacia 1937, su joven hijo, decide la ampliación de la gama de productos incorporando diversos productos forestales, tales como: postes, leña y varillas, materiales fundamentalmente utilizados en el campo.

Mas tarde, hacia 1958, respondiendo a los nuevos requerimientos del mercado y a las nuevas formas de producción, se incorpora la venta de maderas para la carpintería y la construcción. Fundamentalmente rollos aserrados provenientes de Paraguay y Argentina, los que ingresaban por barcazas y/o ferrocarril.

En los años 70, la firma comienza a realizar las primeras importaciones directas de madera provenientes de Chile y Paraguay. Finalmente en 1985 la empresa se consolida como Miceli Maderas SRL. Actualmente es habitual compradora de maderas de Paraguay, Brasil y Bolivia, y en las provincias de Salta, Misiones y Entre Ríos de nuestro País.

Ubicada desde sus inicios en la cuidad de Rosario, Santa Fe, Argentina, centro neurálgico del MERCOSUR. Esto facilita el rápido y directo acceso a las vías de comunicación y con ello a los mercados productores de madera.

Actualmente cuenta con un amplio depósito de 33.600 m2, lo que permite el adecuado y cuidadoso almacenamiento, clasificación y secado de las distintas especies. La firma se carectiza por su comercializacion en productos de óptima calidad (buena pasta, corte y medidas), constituyéndose esto en un importante activo distintivo.

En 2007 ha comenzado a importar Pisos Flotantes provenientes de la Comunidad Económica Europea.

En enero de 2009 abrió un exclusivo showroom en calle Córdoba (casi esquina Callao), dedicado a la venta de pisos macizos y flotantes, techos y decks de madera.

CONTINUOUS BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT With its core in papermaking Komotini Paper Mill implements business plans that enhance the sustainability of the group and create springboards of development and improvement.

Komotini Paper Mill places the customer at the center of the organisation and its processes. The basic parameters of this approach are:

SERVICE
All processes have the customer at the center and improve constantly. Each department is designed to handle customer requirements in the best available manner.

FLEXIBILITY
The company prides itself in responding to urgent requests and custom specifications. The company aspires to make its customers feel as if the production and storage were part of their infrastructure.

IMMEDIACY
With roots in a family business, management is always aware of customers' demands and keeps channels of communication and personal contact always open.

Name: MDV Papier- und Kunststoffveredelung GmbH
Description:
Located in Karlstein, close to Frankfurt,  Germany, MDV is one of Europe’s leading paper and films coating and converting companies. 

We are equipped with two 2.2 metre-wide aqueous state-of the art coating machines, and a comprehensive conversion department, a triple shift system employing ca. 85 people.

Conversion includes embossing, supercalendering, lacquering and printing reel substrates made of paper and board (40 - 500 gsm) or films (36 - 400 µm).

Combining extensive experience in coating chemistry with processing know-how, we offer not only branded films like Robuskin, and fluorescent papers, like Fluolux and Jetprint, but we also specialise in providing custom solutions to your substrate problems.

Robuskin is our registered trademark for synthetic paper, including PE, PP, PET and PVC substrates. Coated, one- or double-sided, all of these different plastic substrates can be printed like paper. Thicknesses range from 36 - 400 µm.

Uncoated (ECO) types are printable using film or UV inks, and may also be thermal transfer printed. 

Robuskin is water and sea water, as well as saliva and sweat resistant. It also withstands most solvents and chemicals.

Robuskin is versatile, as different base substrates are combined with white coatings. High opacity, dimensional stability, and excellent printability distinguish us from our competitors' materials. Certain Robuskin types are certified for direct food contact with wet and dry foods, in conformance with the BGA/FDA regulations.

As the leading fluorescent paper manufacturer and supplier, we set the industry standard. Our coated products have been optimised for use in different fields, e.g. self-adhesive labels, price-marking systems, post-it notes, and poster papers (also for digital imaging).

One- and double-side coated materials, printable as any other paper, Fluolux products are an eye-catcher, and are remarkable in attracting attention when used for promotions or other applications.

Name: Kompetensväxel inom skog och trä - KVIST
Description:
I projektet Kompetensväxel inom skog och trä - KVIST, arbetar vi med att sammanföra små- och medelstora företag inom skogs- och träbranschen i Småland med studenter/lärare/forskare från Jönköping University och Linnéuniversitetet. Målet med projektet är en struktur för ökad samverkan, som i sin tur kan bidra till fler kunskapsintensiva företag i regionen samt ökad innovation.

En bärande tanke är att hållbart brukande av skog och skogens produkter kräver kompetenser från en rad olika områden. Därför arbetar vi aktivt med att matcha företag och behov med rätt kunskapsområde vid lärosätena. Vi arbetar mot utbildning och forskning inom till exempel ekonomi, data/IT, matematik, teknik samt skog och träteknik.

KVIST är ett samverkansprojekt (2020-2022) mellan Träcentrum, Jönköpings universitet och Linnéuniversitetet. Projektet medfinansieras av ERUF, Region Jönköpings län, Region Kalmar län och Region Kronoberg.

Kompetensväxel och samverkan – vill du delta?
Vill du dela dina erfarenheter kring företagande i en gästföreläsning? Kan du tänka dig att ta emot ett studiebesök eller en praktikant? Finns det någon process i ditt företag som vore intressant att undersöka lite extra i ett projekt- eller examensarbete? Kanske är du intresserad av att ingå i ett forskningsprojekt?

Det finns många sätt att samverka med akademin. Som företagare kan du delta på ett sätt som passar dig. I utbyte får du tillgång till ny kunskap och idéer. Du får också möjlighet att knyta nya kontakter med såväl studenter på väg ut i arbetslivet, som lärare och forskare som är nyfikna på din bransch.

Kontakt
Vill du komma i kontakt med KVIST-projektet? Kontakta Malin Löfving på Träcentrum eller någon av våra kontaktpersoner vid lärosätena nedan.

Träcentrum
Kontakt: Malin Löfving, projektledare KVIST

Tekniska högskolan vid Jönköping University
Kontakt: Jenny Bäckstrand, biträdande projektledare KVIST

Our sourcings from the best forests in the neighbourhood areas offer a large volume in quality such as veneer, staves, sawing, building materials, lumbers like boules, strips and beams.
Our stock, our 3 traditional kilns and our 2 steaming rooms located in a 80 000m2 warehouse allow us to respond to your demand.
PEFC certification, Bois de France, CE and UE labels ensure the origin of our production.

Name: Silvicontrol
Description:
A SILVICONTROL é uma empresa composta por um corpo técnico altamente especializado, cuja missão é promover o manejo integrado de pragas e doenças e o uso adequado dos recursos naturais, com responsabilidade ambiental e social, para atender as necessidades dos produtores e empresas do setor florestal. 

Localizada no município de Botucatu – SP, na sede da PROSPECTA - Incubadora Tecnológica de Botucatu. Tem como parceiros a Faculdade de Ciências Agronômicas/UNESP, o SEBRAE, a Fundação de Estudos e Pesquisas Agrícolas e Florestais – FEPAF, Prefeitura Municipal de Botucatu e Fundação de Amparo à Pesquisa do Estado de São Paulo (FAPESP).

As ações da empresa tem como foco principal auxiliar na avaliação de riscos ocasionados por pragas e doenças, de forma monitorada, de modo que o produtor florestal e especialistas das empresas do setor, possam adotar as medidas necessárias e eficientes no Manejo Integrado de Pragas (MIP) e Manejo Integrado de Doenças (MID). Além do planejamento de todas as atividades florestais, desde a formação de mudas, implantação, manejo e colheita.

Name: KB BOARD MILLS (LLP)
Description:
KB Board Mills LLP is the leading manufacturer and exporter of Paper Products such as Kraft Paper Board, Paper Cones, Spiral Paper Tubes and Core Pipe and Paper Cheese. 

We have the annual capacity of manufacturing 36500 Ton Paper Board of GSM ranging from 200 to 600. Raw Material used in the process is procured locally as well as imported from Europe, UAE, and USA. Further, there are different quality parameters such as Bursting Factor, Cobb, Ply Bond, Moisture etc., which can be altered as per customers’ demand. Also, we have fully quipped laboratory to test the above parameters and also the machine is fully automated to keep a check on the GSM as well as Moisture in the process itself to avoid variations. Quality Control System is also set up to maintain the desired quality. 

Adding to the above, we also manufacture paper cones, spiral paper tubes & Cheese and paper core pipes in fully automatic German as well as Chinese technology machines using high strength raw material. Current production capacity of Paper Cones is of 13crore Cones Per Year and Paper Tubes with the production capacity of converting 8400 Tons Kraft Board Per Year.
 
All the above-given products are passed through various quality checks to ensure that only the desired quality product is forwarded to the customer. Our main motto is customer satisfaction and we make sure that the right quality is delivered as per the schedule.

Name: Alter Eco Disposable srl

Start-up innovativa attiva nel campo della ricerca e sviluppo di imballaggi in fibre vegetali, alternativi a quelli tradizionali in plastica.

Il packaging è disegnato e realizzato in relazione al target del cliente e all'utilizzo che lo stesso ne vorrà fare.
Siamo stati i primi a credere in questa tecnologia in Italia, oggi conduciamo il più grande impianto italiano in termini di capacità produttiva. Abbiamo sviluppato un'invidiabile know-how e molteplici progetti per il futuro.
La nostra mission è creare nuovi imballaggi in sostituzione di quelli poco eco-friendly cercando di soddisfare il cliente e preservando gli equilibri del nostro ecosistema per le generazioni future.
Innovazione, tecnologia, know-how e forte propensione alla ricerca ed allo sviluppo di nuove soluzioni tecniche sono i punti di forza della nostra attività.

Name: Cartiera del Vignaletto Srl
Description:
L'AZIENDA
La Cartiera del Vignaletto nasce come s.n.c. nel 1966 e si trasforma in S.p.a. nel 1976. Lo stabilimento, sito in Loc. Tre Ponti a S. Maria di Zevio (VR), consta di un'area di circa 30.000 mq di cui 9.600 coperti. Comincia la sua attività con una macchina in tondo per la produzione di carte crespate esclusivamente per uso igienico e dal 1983, grazie all'installazione di nuovi macchinari, arriva a produrre tutta la gamma di carte tissue.
Fin dagli esordi ha saputo distinguersi per l'affidabilità dei suoi prodotti per cui è cresciuta negli anni passando dalle iniziali 6 t/giorno alle attuali 130 t/giorno di carta prodotta.
Nel 2000 avvia un nuovo stabilimento in provincia di Matera per la produzione di carta a secco AIR-LAID, destinata al settore tovaglie, tovaglioli, pannolini, assorbenti igienici femminili ecc.

UNA CULTURA ECOLOGICA
Una cartiera è consapevole che la sua esistenza dipende dalla crescita degli alberi e dalle strategie colturali di rigenerazione, senza le quali la sua attività sarebbe problematica.
La Cartiera del Vignaletto vive grazie ad essi, per cui predilige la cellulosa proveniente dalle migliori fabbriche che adottano politiche di rimboschimento. La stessa sensibilità ambientale l'ha trasferita nella lavorazione, adottando sistemi di depurazione e di recupero delle acque reflue e gestendo un moderno impianto di cogenerazione per la produzione di energia elettrica, vapore e aria calda, utilizzando come combustibile gas naturale, così da ridurre al minimo le emissioni in atmosfera dei gas serra.

Description:

In March 2013 Summit purchased the former Juken New Zealand Limited Forest Estate (36,000 ha) within Northland. All local staff and contracts transferred across to the new company, bringing with them 24 years’ experience managing these forests.

In order to ensure the full value of our products is captured, Summit developed a dedicated log exporting department which links into the already well-established Sumitomo Corporation trading business. The log exporting department is directly linked into Sumitomo Corporation’s extensive international business networks and allows Summit to fully realise the value of the estate in addition to the existing domestic supply.

Summit, in close partnership with Sumitomo Corporation, has a well-established and very successful Export Department with access to reliable markets throughout Asia. The log exporting department is directly linked into Sumitomo Corporation’s extensive international business networks. Sumitomo Corporation has well-established log marketing teams based in all its major export markets. This close proximity to our customers allows Sumitomo, and in turn Summit to build and maintain solid relationships with all our customers.

Not only does Summit export volume from our own estate and managed forests, but we provide complete logistic and marketing options for your logs with the aim of maximising your profit.

Name: M.P. Veneers Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
M. P. Veneers - ISO9001:2015 & FSC-Certified Teak Veneer Manufacturer & Exporter | Sustainable Sourcing | Global Reach

M.P. Veneers is one of the leading manufacturers and exporters of teak veneer from Indian Teak logs. We are an ISO9001:2015 and FSC-certified company - a testament to our commitment to superior quality products.

Our valued customers include prominent plywood, panel board, luxury yacht, and furniture manufacturers in the United States, Canada, Australia, the United Kingdom, Belgium, Sweden, Italy, Finland, France, the Netherlands, Bangladesh, Nepal, and Dubai.

At M. P. Veneers, we prioritise sustainability and environmental balance. We source timber exclusively from legal and sustainable Indian forests, contributing to the preservation of our natural resources.

Key Highlights:
- Teak's durability and water resistance make it highly desirable.
- It possesses high oil content, tensile strength, and tight grain, making it perfect for doors, window frames, furniture, and structural elements in homes.
- Teak's resistance to termites and other insects ensures long-lasting performance.
- Luxury yacht, cruiser, and boat manufacturers prefer teak for its beauty and functionality.
- Teak is widely used in furniture, flooring, panelling, and trim, offering a regal and aged appearance.
- It has exceptional resistance to rot, fungi, and mildew making it suitable for applications experiencing periodic changes.

Experience the perfect blend of beauty, durability, and sustainability of teak veneer manufactured at M.P Veneers. 

Contact us today to elevate your projects with our premium products.

Name: TFS Corporation
Description:
From the first planting in 1999, we have dedicated nearly 20 years to mastering the art of hosting and cultivation of Sandalwood Album. Each sandalwood tree requires at least four host trees and continuous care over a 15-year lifespan to ensure a healthy and potent amount of the rich, fragrant, oil-bearing heartwood.

By harvesting and replanting each year, we have created the world's first and only sustainable supply of this endangered species, with 5.4 million Sandalwood Album trees covering 12,182 hectares.

Creating a sustainable supply of an endangered species with a history spanning over 2000 years, we have discovered new, truly unique potential across pharmaceutical, skincare, and wellbeing applications, and we have begun reawakening global markets to the power of this rare and ancient species.

In doing so, we recognised that we had become more than just the forestry management company known as TFS. We had become the trusted guardian and provider of nature’s wellbeing super-ingredient, Sandalwood Album and on March 22, 2017 completed our transision to our new brand, Quintis.

On March 22, 2017 we became Quintis.

Name: Barro & Cie SA
Description: Depuis 1884, six générations de la même famille perpétuent la passion du bois à Carouge. L’atelier artisanal est devenu une entreprise industrielle, mais la matière noble continue à incarner les plus belles idées et les plus hautes exigences. Génération après génération, Barro & Cie SA a su adapter le bois aux attentes de l’architecture moderne et à l’évolution du marché, dans le respect du savoir-faire et des traditions. Cet héritage dynamise notre quotidien autour de deux axes principaux : la charpente et la menuiserie. Nous proposons une très large déclinaison de possibilités et de réalisations, qui répondent aux exigences contemporaines en matière de normes, de formes ou de tendances. De par sa taille humaine, notre entreprise est en mesure de vous garantir des prestations de qualité. Service, efficacité, optimisation et performance technique sont nos maîtres-mots.

Name: Cascade Pacific Pulp, LLC
Description:
Cascade Pacific Pulp, LLC is a market pulp manufacturing and sales company near Halsey, Oregon approximately 120 miles south of Portland.

The company acquired the Kraft market pulp mill in 2008 and currently produces 200,000 tons of high grade pulp for use in fine paper, tissue and cement fiber board.

CPP has the flexibility to utilize various fiber sources to produce both commodity and specialty pulp grades used in paper and board grades from cardboard boxes to tissue; our pulp is sold to paper makers around the world.

The mill is a modern highly efficient facility utilizing advanced pollution control devices and systems to prevent and minimize environmental effects. We conduct thousands of tests annually to ensure our complete compliance with all of our discharge permit levels. Our on-site highly trained technicians use state of the art testing equipment and advanced scientific methods.

Que vous souhaitiez un chalet traditionnel authentique ou une maison contemporaine aux lignes épurées, notre équipe met à votre disposition son savoir-faire et son écoute attentive pour créer l'habitat de vos rêves.

Personnalisation Totale
Chaque projet est unique. Nous vous offrons la possibilité de personnaliser entièrement votre chalet, que ce soit à partir de l'un de nos modèles ou d'une création originale.

Une Expertise de Confiance
Forts de notre expérience de plus de 100 ans, nous vous assurons un suivi rigoureux et un accompagnement à chaque étape de la réalisation de votre projet. Notre bureau d’études conçoit des plans personnalisés en 3D et vous accompagne dans toutes les démarches administratives.

Réactivité et Suivi de Projet
La réactivité est notre priorité pour vous garantir la livraison rapide de votre habitat bois. Nous travaillons main dans la main avec des artisans partenaires de confiance, garantissant ainsi la qualité et la cohésion nécessaires à la réussite de votre projet.

Nous mettons tout en œuvre pour que votre chalet soit plus qu'une simple construction : une véritable œuvre à la hauteur de vos attentes.

Name: FinnsoBois
Description:
Finnso Bois accompagne durablement les entreprises françaises de l'industrie du bois dans leur développement.

Notre objectif est de lier la technologie innovante, robuste et fiable des équipementiers finlandais à la flexibilité et au dynamisme des industriels du bois français.

Complice depuis plus de 20 ans avec les sociétés Veisto et Raute pour les projets réalisés en France et dans les pays francophones d'Afrique, Christian Lallia a créé depuis de nombreux autres partenariats afin d'être présent à toutes les échelles de la transformation du bois. A ces deux partenaires historiques, s'ajoutent des fournisseurs tels que Valon Kone pour les ecorceuses, Hekotek pour le traitement avant sciage des grumes ou billons, Pinomatic pour les mécanisations nécessaires dans l'industrie de la 2ème transformation du bois, RP conception pour la création de ligne d'aboutage, Dynalyse pour la classification des bois ou encore Prologic pour la scannerisation des bois, Jartek et Wiesloch.

Finnso Bois est à votre écoute pour bâtir ensemble votre projet qu'il soit capacitif ou stratégique, en assurer la maîtrise d'ouvrage, la mise en route, former vos utilisateurs, transférer notre savoir technique à votre service de maintenance, en un mot accompagner vos projets durablement.

Description:
Herun bamboo was founded in 2021, located in Changde city, Hunan province. As we all know that Hunan is rich in bamboo resources, and the area of bamboo forest ranks second in China. Herun bamboo is specialized in producing high-end disposable bamboo cutlery (knife, fork and spoon), a young, innovative and future oriented enterprise who is closely following the development of science and technology. Our factory covers an area of 3,500 square meters, the production concept is one bamboo into the plant, all parts are 100% comprehensive utilized to achieve the maximum value. We are committed to creating natural, beautiful and functional products. 

Under the global trend of banning single-use plastic, bamboo has a long list of positive environmental attributes that makes it a superior alternative to single-use plastics. Bamboo knife, fork and spoon have been highly appreciated by customers relying on their natural beauty, high hardness, natural bamboo texture, no chemical addition and comfortable for use. As a versatile replacement of solid wood, bamboo is outstanding in protecting the precious forest resources. In fact, bamboo grows back after harvest without the need for replanting，which is a rare& significant advantage by its own natural characteristics. Due to the economic and social benefits of bamboo, and its rapid growth, high material hardness, super toughness, 100% biodegradable and compostable, bamboo has been used in an increasingly wide range of products.

China Bamboo Industry Association advocates: Chinese bamboo industry should walk the way to the Green & Recyclable & Low Carbon , and finally to achieve the sustainable development. 

We care about each one of you and our entire planet.

Let's do it together!

PROTĒAN series offers a truly green and clean technology that is versatile, cost-effective, and sustainable.  Best of all, our technology provides the only chemistry in the industry that strengthens the base paper while remaining biodegradable and compostable.

PROTĒAN
Innovative coating chemistry that offers a drop-in technology that is adaptable by the current coating processes offered at most paper mills.  

PROTĒAN Water Barrier
Ideal for products and packaging solutions that require high water-resistance with moderate oil and grease resistance. It is versatile and durable allowing us to apply it to almost all cellulose surfaces to create a water-resistant barrier and significantly increasing wet strength. This product has properties that offer great release properties and can be suitable as an emulsion for other coating agents.

PROTĒAN Grease Barrier
Ideal for products and packaging solutions that require a high level of oil and grease resistance with moderate water resistance. It is versatile and durable allowing us to apply it to almost all cellulose surfaces to create a barrier for oil and grease resistance. This product has properties that increase wet-strength while achieving a full spectrum of 3M kit oil and grease resistance.

Name: Tricel Incorporated
Description:
TRICEL Honeycomb: A Lightweight, High-Strength Solution

TRICEL Honeycomb is a revolutionary lightweight material that offers exceptional strength and rigidity. Its unique honeycomb structure, resembling the cross-section of corrugated cardboard, provides maximum open space and minimal weight. This design optimizes its strength-to-weight ratio, making it a cost-effective choice for various applications.

Key Benefits:

Superior Strength: TRICEL Honeycomb's I-beam-like structure effectively carries shear, bending, and compressive loads, ensuring durability and reliability.
Lightweight Design: With up to 95% open space, TRICEL Honeycomb is significantly lighter than traditional materials, reducing weight and improving efficiency.
Versatility: Customizable thickness, density, and facing materials allow TRICEL Honeycomb to be tailored to specific design requirements and applications.
Cost-Effective: Offering an excellent balance of strength and weight, TRICEL Honeycomb provides a cost-effective solution for various industries.
Applications:

TRICEL Honeycomb is widely used in a variety of sectors, including:

Automotive: Interior components, structural elements
Construction: Sandwich panels, insulation
Transportation: Aircraft, marine vessels
Office Furnishings: Partitions, workstations
Marine: Hull structures, buoyancy aids
Exhibits: Displays, signage
Packaging: Protective containers
Discover the TRICEL Honeycomb Advantage:

Whether you're looking to reduce weight, improve strength, or enhance your product's design, TRICEL Honeycomb offers a versatile and reliable solution. Contact us today to learn more and explore the possibilities.
