Name: NORDSTERN CERAMICS LLP
Description:
We were a Kraft Paper Manufacturing unit in India in business since 1979, situated near Delhi.
In 1995 we had decided to diversify and had established a Industrial Rolls Manufacturing unit which had now risen to great heights and was number one in India.
We have been in the industry long enough to see a lot possible services for the paper industry, and in the on going scenario of technological improvements, Ceramic is the most promising sector. 
In India and around all the paper machines have switched to use of CERAMIC VACUUM top covers for the wire parts and press parts, but inspite of growth in this market there is not a single company in Indian SUBCONTINENT who can provide servicing to the paper industry.
In the present scenario the Paper industry is forced to replace the old yet reusable Plastic, read Ceramic, vacuum tops with new ones. This is also a serious environmental hazard as the industry has no use for the old material and though usable they are not used as the accuracy and thus efficiency has been effected.
This is also a big expense on the pocket of the already struggling industry.
Why we, because we are an already established Paper mills unit since 1981 and since 1995 we are providing service to the paper industry by manufacturing and servicing rolls. So we already have a vast customer base all over India and surrounding countries. 
We have established, from green field, a new company which is providing the required technical services to the PAPER & Allied industry.
Our services should cover :-
Stage 1: REGRINDING OF VACUUM TOP COVERS:
•	Regrinding of VACUUM TOP COVERS of any material
•	Providing accurate profile of the Blades (each vacuum top).
•	Precision Grinding of Hydro Foils on the Wire Part.
•	To repair dewatering elements of all leading manufacturers from all over the world
•	Replacement and repair of cracked, broken pieces of vacuum covers.
 and ALSO REPAIR OF STAINLESS STEEL BOXES

Description:

Our standard paperboard grades are used in a variety of products like picture frame mats, cap closure sealing products, illustration and mounting boards, beverage coasters, retail gift boxes, high- end rigid boxes, folding cartons and numerous industrial packaging products.

We also offer custom specifications to meet specific properties such as anti-tarnish, hard sizing, custom colors, Dairyman Standard (microbiological) and many others. Our boards meet FDA requirements for many food grade applications. We are well equipped to develop customized, one-of-a-kind products to meet your specific needs.

Over 96% of the products we currently produce are made from 100% recycled fiber saving valuable natural resources and landfill space. We are utilizing clean energy alternatives such as hydro-electrical generation and cogeneration technologies.

To learn more about our current grade offerings or to discuss a specific product development need, please contact our Paperboard Sales Team for more information at 315-493-2120.

Description:
In the Fifties, all was social and cultural turmoil. Innovation was a fundamental element for those who wanted to stand out for their own identity.

Modern ways replaced old habits. Industrial design gave a new imprint to furniture. Aesthetics and functionality mingled together to improve life styles and made houses, furniture and structures more ductile and flexible.

The true history of the LIRI’s manufacturing of decorative laminates originates from this cultural and social background. The company is always in line with design and architecture evolutions, and knows how to capture style trends and evolution.

At present LIRI, with its production facility located in Pont Canavese, with 4 HPL presses with a warehouse. With the help of an effective network of sales agents they are able to serve the entire world.

LIRI is one of the main global competitors in the industry, with a very much widespread retail network. The company also has affiliated companies equipped with depots in France, Spain, and the United States. More globally it relies on a network of exclusive distributors and high fidelity customers.

Although the company has a clear international character and is constantly influenced by different cultures world-wide, still it has remained attached to the place where it was initially established.

Over the last 20 years, LIRI has created a heritage of product lines which can satisfy all laminates application needs.

LIRI laminates have been chosen to accomplish prestigious projects, and are now listed in many technical specifications of important architecture & design practices. A new material to shape that materialises new exciting ideas.

Disponiamo attualmente di quattro linee per la produzione di imballaggi ; recentemente abbiamo ampliato il parco macchine con l’ installazione di un plotter da taglio di ultima generazione ed una stampante digitale ad alta definizione per la realizzazione di prodotti tecnici ed in quantita’ limitata;
Tutte le linee sono state recentemente integrate in un sistema di produzione 4.0, per il quale abbiamo ottenuto relativa certificazione nel 2019, generando un processo di produzione e confezionamento completamente monitorati e perfettamente organizzati , al fine di azzerare i rischi di errore tecnico/produttivi ed ottimizzare la produttivita’ aziendale. ICIERRE PACK SRL e’ sempre stata particolarmente attenta all’ambiente ed alla sua tutela;e’ energeticamente autosufficiente attraverso l’utilizzo di pannelli fotovoltaici; i prototti sono realizzati utilizzando carte riciclate che non causano disboscamento. Nell’ottica di tala tutela abbiamo richiesto ed ottenuto la certificazione FSC garantendo e certificando la provenienza dei prodotti , con corrispondente etichettatura FSC, da foreste e da filiera di approvvigionamento, gestite in modo responsabile.
ICIERRE PACK SRL molto più che una scatola.

Name: SWM-Wood Ltd
Description:
SWM-Wood Ltd, Thermowood FOR PROFESSIONAL USE. 

SWM-Wood Ltd manufactures Thermowood for construction and carpentry industries, as well as for re-sellers at the global markets.

We are specialized in Finnish pine (Scots Pine, Pinus sylvestris), spruce (Norway Spruce, Picea abies) and knotless radiata pine. Our customers knows us from high-quality Thermowood products, our raw material being high quality, slowly grown Nordic timber, from good service level and from reliable delivery.

SWM-Wood Ltd was founded in Finland 1998. We are the 2nd largest manufacturer of Thermowood in Europe with the production capacity of 30 000 m3 / year Thermowood and annual turnover being 10 MEUR. Production plants and head office are located in Mikkeli, Eastern Finland. SWM-Wood Ltd employs total 20 professional in Finland and in sales office in Netherlands. 

ThermoWood is a wood material produced by using ONLY natural methods, high temperature and steam. NO chemicals are used in the treatment. Thermowood is an ecological alternative and fully recyclable product.

Thermowood is non-toxic, dimensionally stable, resistant to decay, resin free and it’s thermal insulation properties has improved. The wood is also colored throughout into a beautiful shade of brown. Thermowood can be used outdoors and indoors, in any climates. Due improved decay resistant properties Thermowood products are well suited to applications involving demanding weather conditions. Use in interior decoration is supported by the beautiful, hardwood-style look & feel and the dimensional stability of the product.

A large portion of our products are made for export. We are the first company in our industry which has been granted the KOMO product certificate. Our products have also been granted the PEFC certificate. We are a member of The International ThermoWood Association which entitles us to use the registered ThermoWood trademark and logo.

Name: C.A. SPENCER inc.
Description:
C.A. Spencer inc. is a leading Canadian producer and global supplier of North American hardwood lumber. Founded in 1908, the company still bears the name of its founder; Charles Alexander Spencer. C.A. Spencer produces and distributes a wide range of hardwood species sourced from their own sawmills located in eastern Canada. Specialty items include Hard Maple, Yellow Birch, Soft Maple and Northern Red Oak. Other species include Ash, Aspen, Basswood, Cherry and White Birch. All products vary from 4/4 (1’’) to 8/4 (2’’) thickness and are selectively graded using NHLA standard grading rules. Today, the Spencer group is proud to be entirely family owned all while operating their own sawmills, kilns, concentration yard, industrial division, and forestry department allowing the establishment to stand by quality & sustainability through all practices.

Through 5 family generations and over 115 years of experience, quality and service have branded the Spencer name in the hardwood industry. “We are proud to pursue a tradition of long-standing relationships with suppliers and customers based on trust, reliability and consistency. It is our promise to customers that they will continue benefiting from these standards, the same standards that have made our name a predominant leader in the hardwood industry”.

Name: bamboo bioproducts
Description:

Bamboo bioproducts will offer sustainably produced, high-quality bamboo pulp products, developing pulp grades in close cooperation with our customers to ensure they meet their requirements for fibre characteristics and specific paper properties. The Project Team includes renowned executives in the field of pulp and paper engineering, manufacturing and marketing supported by local shareholders.

The concept is to farm bamboo on a large scale, harvest on a managed and progressive basis, and then convert the raw material in bamboo bioproducts mills using the best available state-of-the-art technology.

The bamboo pulp will be sold to multinational corporations that produce consumer tissue and personal hygiene products.

Moreover, a renowned natural paper trader believe in constant up gradation in quality and collection that allow us to adhere with latest market trends. Our in-depth market understanding and highly skilled workforce have set us apart from other natural paper trader and supplier in India.

Name: Timberlands Pacific Pty Ltd
Description:
We have expertise in full service sustainable forest management and operations, from establishment through to sales and marketing on a significant scale. Our track record ensures that we manage cash returns and identify and implement forest management regimes to maximise value drivers for forest owners.

Timberlands Pacific have management systems that ensure data integrity for multiple clients, we are certified under the Australian Forestry Standard Responsible Wood AS4708-2013 and the Forest Stewardship Council (FSC) FSC-C115692, ensuring highest standard environmental, health safety and forest health outcomes.

Timberlands Pacific manages the Taswood Estate in Tasmania and the Penola Plantations in the region known as the Green Triangle, across the South Australian and Victorian borders. Both plantations are managed by TPPL, under contract with investment manager, New Forests.

The Taswood Estate comprises of 54,000 hectares of principally Radiata Pine, located in Northern Tasmania, sustainably yielding approximately 650,000 tonnes of forest products annually. 

The Penola Plantations Estate comprises of 47,000 hectares of principally Radiata Pine, located in the Green Triangle, sustainably yielding approximately 850,000 tonnes of forest products annually.

Name: Wigston Paper
Description:
We’re The Papermasters.  Fanatics, eccentrics, call us what you will; we never get tired of talking about paper!
Paper is one of the oldest man-made materials on Earth and yet there’s so much still to discover.  
With creativity and passion, the possibilities are infinite - and we’re excited to explore them with you.
Pushing the boundaries has been a part of Wigston’s heritage since the company was formed in 1932.  

An independent supplier, we strive to remain at the cutting edge of a dynamic and progressive industry.  As a Wigston partner, you’ll benefit from our experience, our passion, and our commitment to quality, innovation and value.

Explore more at www.wigstonpaper.com

#luxurypackaging #paper

Name: INTASA GROUP
Description:
Since its inception at the end of the 40s, the philosophy of the INTASA Business Group has been to create wealth using top quality products, while at the same time respecting nature. Today, this sustainable development has proven to be the right path towards growth, always with our mind set on forests, which are the heart of our work.
INTASA controls the entire production process vertically through its own specialised companies. This vertical structure allows us to adapt to market changes and to our clients’ demands.
The manufacturing process for our panels and floors, entirely produced in Spain, distinguishes us because of our quality, speed and flexibility.
The company uses a differential production system that is also technologically advanced and cutting-edge. The industrial processes are carried out with state-of-the-art machinery. The INTASA plants’ production capacity allows us to meet a high product demand.
With this technology and an intensive R&D&I process we have created unique and differentiated products which provide solutions for our clients’ needs.
A well done job has no boundaries, which is why exporting is part of the secret to our success. Our industrial processes are audited each year by AENOR, who grants us the ISO 9001 certification for quality management systems; the ISO 14001 certification for environmental management, and the ISO 166001 certification for R&D&I projects. The platform floors that we produce bear the Real Wood seal from the European Federation of the Parquet Industry that guarantees that the products are manufactured using solid wood.
The INTASA business group belongs to GADISA, one of Spain’s largest firms. We are present in a wide variety of sectors, such as energy, hotel, food supply and distribution, or wood, among others. With more than 7,000 employees and a turnover above 1,200 million Euros during the last year, we constantly advance towards new markets, sharing a unique philosophy.

Name: Domtar Distribution Group
Description:
The Domtar Distribution Group brings together under one roof five of the paper industry’s most trusted names. The result is an integrated organization with 26 locations across the U.S. and Canada offering tremendous product, logistics and knowledge resources.

Five highly respected merchants. One shared commitment to customer service excellence. The Domtar Distribution Group is North America’s premier source for high-quality paper and packaging products and innovative business solutions.

With corporate headquarters in Covington, Kentucky, the Domtar Distribution Group was created through the partnership of the following companies:

• RIS The Paper House, one of the largest paper distributors in the U.S. with 19 business units in the Eastern, Midwestern and Southwestern U.S.
•Buntin Reid The Paper House, a dominant force in Ontario’s graphic arts and business communities, with locations in Toronto, Ottawa and London.
•JBR La Maison du Papier, with a proud history of serving Québec from its locations in Montréal and Québec City.
•The Paper House, originally known as Schofield Paper and McFarlaneson, with facilities across Atlantic Canada.
•Publishing Solutions, specializing in high-quality papers for magazine, catalog and book publishing.

With strong regional presence in the Eastern, Midwestern and Southwestern U.S. and in Canada, we stay close to our customers. We understand the distinct needs of customers in our regions. And we meet them with specialized solutions and responsive delivery.

Extraordinary People
What really sets us apart are the people that make up the Domtar Distribution Group. From our sales and customer service professionals to our warehousing and delivery teams, everyone shares a commitment doing whatever it takes to meet our customers’ needs.

important in the present world. The PaperPine Trades strongly emphasizes on the usage of secondary fibers than natural raw material, thereby contributing in protecting the environment. We also have ISO
9001 certification in recognition of our service to our customers and our fullest efforts to minimize our environmental impact. We believe in quality and our company’s vision is to exceed the expectation of each and every client, provide them optimum solutions to
their needs and achieve long term relationship. Therefore, committing to client satisfaction is one of our main goal.

Name: AGEFLOR
Description:
A AGEFLOR - Associação Gaúcha de Empresas Florestais – é a entidade representativa das empresas da cadeia produtiva de base florestal do Rio Grande do Sul. É uma sociedade civil de direito privado, sem fins lucrativos e de duração ilimitada que foi fundada em 22 de setembro de 1970, inicialmente com a criação da Associação Sul Riograndense de Reflorestadores – ASRR, que posteriormente realizou uma fusão com a AFLOVEM – Associação de Reflorestadores e Transformadores Verticalizados de Madeira, em 1989 dando origem a atual denominação.

Reúne em seu quadro social empresas que atuam em diferentes segmentos da cadeia produtiva de base florestal, tais como: florestamento e reflorestamento; produção de madeira serrada para uso na construção civil e indústria moveleira; produção de chapas (MDF, MDP), compensados, aglomerados, laminados e faqueados; celulose e papel; movelaria; resinas (breu e terebintina); tanino; postes tratados; cavacos para produção de celulose; cavacos para geração de energia; mudas florestais; energia (lenha e carvão); máquinas e equipamentos; insumos e produtos químicos.

Name: Italnastri Srl
Description:
Una grande passione per i materiali autoadesivi. Un’esperienza produttiva che dura da oltre 40 anni. 
Dall’ottobre 2017 una nuova proprietà e un nuovo management hanno scommesso su Italnastri, infondendo nuova linfa vitale in una realtà che ha l’ambizione di configurarsi come un’eccellenza nel panorama globale dei materiali autoadesivi per etichette. 
La nostra offerta comprende un’ampia gamma di materiali dedicati a tutti i settori di riferimento per le etichette autoadesive: Alimenti e Bevande, Vino e Alcolici, Cosmesi e Detergenza, Farmaceutico, Sicurezza e Protezione marchi, Logistica e identificazione.
Flessibilità, affidabilità e altissima attenzione alla qualità sono i capisaldi del nostro lavoro. I nostri materiali sono selezionati secondo elevati standard qualitativi e concepiti per soddisfare le più sofisticate esigenze estetiche e di processo dell’industria grafica, garantendo altresì alte prestazioni  nei diversi settori di utilizzo. 
Il nostro reparto R&D ed il nostro Laboratorio lavorano in stretta sinergia per sviluppare soluzioni autoadesive innovative.
La nostra struttura flessibile ci permette di calibrare il nostro ciclo produttivo sulle esigenze dei clienti e rispondere con prontezza alle loro necessità.
La nostra continua ricerca di soluzioni alle sfide poste dal mercato ci ha portato a sviluppare brevetti che utilizzano e combinano caratteristiche di anticontraffazione e antimanomissione.
La conformità agli standard FSC, monitorata annualmente da enti indipendenti, ci permette di offrire ai nostri clienti una vasta gamma di prodotti certificati secondo i rigidi parametri del Forest Stewardship Council, marchio riconosciuto a livello globale e sinonimo di una gestione delle foreste etica e sostenibile.

Name: ExpandFibre
Description:
ExpandFibre is an R&D collaboration and an Ecosystem launched by Fortum and Metsä Group to accelerate the development of sustainable bioproducts. It focuses on upgrading pulp fibres, hemicellulose and lignin from renewable and sustainable sources of straw and northern wood into new bioproducts. Its ambition is to meet the growing demands for sustainable textile fibres and other added value biomaterials.

ExpandFibre aims to develop ground-breaking technologies and smart business concepts that are required to convert straw and pulp fibres into novel bioproducts, such as textile fibres. The joint mission of Fortum and Metsä Group is to provide selected markets with high-volume bioproducts that have a significantly lower carbon footprint compared to currently available fossil-based products.

Fortum and Metsä Group challenge other actors in the seven ExpandFibre themes to accelerate their efforts and together build a world-leading innovation ecosystem. Together we can enable new bioproducts and green businesses to reach commercial maturity.

ExpandFibre Programmes:

50 M€ R&D entity launched and implemented by Fortum & Metsä Group and co-funded by Business Finland. In the Programmes, Fortum and Metsä work together and separately in various projects that can link with Ecosystem members and projects.

ExpandFibre Ecosystem:

The Ecosystem consists of organisations and projects that join in the ExpandFibre Mission and work with ExpandFibre themes. Ecosystem projects apply their own public funding from e.g. Business Finland, EU or other funding agencies.

Name: Pulp & Paper Industry Division - PUPID
Description:
The Pulp & Paper Industry Division (PUPID) is dedicated to advancing the knowledge and skills of professionals in the pulp and paper and forest products industries including those employed in the manufacturing facilities as well as engineering and construction consultants. 

PUPID members' main concerns are the measurement, control, and optimization of processes in the pulp and paper and forest products industries; the acquisition and handling of raw materials whether virgin fiber or recycled paper products; supporting research and development programs and the sharing of applications insight and standards and practices for the entire paper process, from raw materials through finished product; fabrication and construction; processing and inspection required for finished pulp and paper and forest products production; improving product quality of the finished products and maintaining environmental quality through the optimum utilization of the best technology available.

Name: PPB Ltd
Description:
PPB is an family owned and operated distributor and converter of point of purchase materials and substrates to the Screen Print, Digital and Large Format markets and has now widened its product range to cover Sign Makers, Fabricators and Wide Format Digital Printers.

Our reputation has been built over 37 years, based upon the combined heritage of Proctors, Buchanan Paper & Board and A&R Board Sales. Through a carefully managed acquisition programme PPB has grown into a national £20million turnover business and at the same time has remained truly customer focused, with all members of staff priding themselves on a positive “can do attitude”. 

And PPB is still growing….:

From our origins as a paper and board stockist merchant, PPB has invested heavily to provide the widest range of Plastic, Paper & Board, Display materials and finishing services for the screen print and digital display markets. Additional investments in machinery and stock now allow us to provide a high value service to Sign Makers, Fabricators and Wide Format Digital markets.

Name: Peerless Saw Company
Description:
The Employee Owned Peerless Saw Company specializes in manufacturing custom made circular saw bodies ready for tipping in sizes from 4” to 40” in. diameter.
 
We also manufacture non-saw blade related parts from our high-quality alloy steel where we can add value with our laser cutting, heat-treatment, machining, surface grinding, and leveling capabilities.

To offer our customers a complete solution to their circular saw manufacturing needs, we also carry one of the largest inventories of carbide and cobalt alloy saw tips in North America.

The Peerless Saw Company opened its doors in 1931, with a factory located in German Village, Ohio.  Peerless started in business manufacturing bandsaw blades for the auto industry.  Over time they eventually started to manufacture circular saw bodies for wood and metal cutting applications.

Currently, Peerless is known in the market for producing one of the highest quality saw bodies available.  We rely on fast deliveries and our high quality product to maintain and grow our position in the market place.

There are several key components to our ability to make a high quality product in a very short time.
  
The first and most valuable to us is having good people in our company. Our workforce has a great deal of experience and knows what it takes to get the job done right.  The average tenure of our employees is well over 15 years.

The next major component to our business is our exclusive heat treating process.  The heat treating system at Peerless was designed specifically for our needs.  It is a one piece flow system that instills great flatness into the product from the very start of the hardening process.

In addition to our hardening, we rely on our precision laser cutting and grinding machines to give us the flexibility to process orders through our plant more efficiently than anyone in the industry.

Peerless Saw Company became employee owned (ESOP) in July 2016.

Email - pscsales@peerlesssaw.com

Phone - 1-800-973-3753

Name: Paper & Packaging Safety Association
Description:
Our Association has a long history dating back to World War II. In the beginning, we were known as the Southern Pulp & Paper Safety Association. This is when manpower was scarce and it was important to have all people at work as often as possible. The pulp and paper industry made its contribution in many ways, one of which was to become involved in an accident prevention program. This led to the creation of the Southern Pulp & Paper Safety Association. In May 1992, we became the Pulp & Paper Safety Association in response to a need for a national industry organization.

The Association has grown with member locations across the globe. We are still a non-commercial, non-profit and non-political organization. The Board of Directors consists of volunteers from some of our member companies and are voted to a one year term by the Association membership. These companies see the value in “Bringing the Industry Home Safe” and allow time and support to the Association.

Name: Pulp and Paper Safety Association
Description:
Our Association has a long history dating back to World War II. In the beginning, we were known as the Southern Pulp & Paper Safety Association. This is when manpower was scarce and it was important to have all people at work as often as possible. The pulp and paper industry made its contribution in many ways, one of which was to become involved in an accident prevention program. This led to the creation of the Southern Pulp & Paper Safety Association. In May 1992, we became the Pulp & Paper Safety Association in response to a need for a national industry organization.

The Association has grown with member locations across the globe. We are still a non-commercial, non-profit and non-political organization. The Board of Directors consists of volunteers from some of our member companies and are voted to a one year term by the Association membership. These companies see the value in “Bringing the Industry Home Safe” and allow time and support to the Association.


https://ppsa.memberclicks.net/assets/Membership/PPSA%20PowerPoint%20Presentation-2020.pdf

1970’li yıllarda bir atölye, 1990 yıllarda küçük bir işletme, 2000’li yıllarda ulusal pazarın önemli bir imalatçı kobi firması olan Teknik Masura; Edirne Kâğıt fabrikasının üretime alınması ile küresel pazarın ulusal bir kâğıt ve kâğıt ürünleri imalatçısı olma yolunda önemli bir adım atmıştır.

Based in Leuglay in Burgundy since 1860, Bordet produces ecological charcoal from sustainably managed local forest wood scraps. 

Its closed loop and innovative manufacturing process guarantees zero discharge and high efficiency 
Bordet is also the pioneer in cogeneration insuring self-sufficiency in heating and electricity.

First class industrials such as Vallourec, worldwide leader in seamless tubes, have chosen us to transfer our patented technology

Bordet charcoal is pure with a fixed carbon percentage higher than 90% allowing maximum performance and many industrial applications. 

Our charcoal is natural, renewable and has many assets for the future due to the excellent production conditions. 
It has maximum filter performance and a high calorific value. 

•	Its high carbon concentration and high calorific value enables:
o	Cooking food
- for population in emerging countries 
- for kitchen chefs and general public. 
o	In blast furnaces for sawnmill and aluminium industries.
•	When crushed our charcoal has depolluting virtues, very often used as a fertilizer on agricultural soils. 
•	Activated, it provides a natural absorbing and filtering ability, commonly used for cosmetics and for air or water filters. 


Bordet is classified by TFT (The Forest Trust) as part of the most performant in Europe among industrial carbonators.

Bordet is a French company with an international outreach and intends to become an essential actor in the sustainable development chain.

Heritage Envelopes is committed to minimising the effect our business activities have on the environment. We continuously strive to increase efficiency and reduce consumption of resources, materials, energy and water used in operating our premises. En este largo camino que en conjunto vamos construyendo, fuimos incorporando importantes conceptos y experiencias que nos formaron.
Esto nos permite contar con una seleccionada cartera de clientes, con la cual hemos consolidado relaciones. Entre ellas, empresas como Nevares, Amodil, Kraft Foods, Productos Trio, Tostadas Riera, Nobleza Piccardo y otras que más adelante citamos.
Estamos orgullosos de estar dentro del ranking de las 5 empresas líderes en el mercado.
Desde comienzos del año 2005 se han invertido importantes sumas de dinero en mejoras para obtener papeles de calidad superior en nuestra propia planta productora, para que esto se refleje en un producto final de alto nivel que satisfaga a nuestros clientes.
En el año 2010, en el mes de Noviembre, tuvimos el orgullo de poner en marcha la Corrugadora importada, lo que nos permite mejorar aun mas la terminación de las planchas de cartón corrugado, mayor productividad y mejor producto final.

Name: Swedspan International
Description:
The SWEDSPAN Group was formed as a spin-off from IKEA’s in-house furniture maker Swedwood in March 2008. SWEDSPAN’s main goal is to provide our customers with innovative, lightweight and environmentally friendly wood based panels.

The IKEA vision is to create a better everyday life for people – for consumers, co-workers and people producing the products. Consequently, low prices at IKEA must not be achieved at the expense of people or the environment. This is a precondition for IKEA for doing good business.

As member of the IKEA Group of Companies, SWEDSPAN takes sustainable production very seriously. Our ambition is not only to comply fully with existing laws and regulations on environmental protection and production standards; our goal is to set new standards and advance the concept that only sustainable business is good business.

We strive to implement production processes that minimize and filter the emissions caused during wood processing. Furthermore, we have almost effluent free production processes, our own bio-energy production, and we strive to run all SWEDSPAN buildings by renewable energy. Finally, we focus both our products and our material development activities on lightweight elements and low emissions – an important contribution to a sustainable business.

Name: Sugherificio Molinas
Description:
È passato più di un secolo da quando Pietro Molinas fondava, a Calangianus, la sua azienda per la lavorazione del sughero. Un’attività semplice basata sull’utilizzo di pochi ed elementari utensili con i quali si eseguivano tutte le fasi di lavorazione del sughero. Una condizione comune a molti altri piccoli artigiani della zona, ma dalla quale è iniziato il percorso che ha portato alla moderna realtà industriale di oggi. Un percorso lungo, durante il quale un ruolo fondamentale è stato quello di Peppino Molinas. Fu lui, infatti, a cavallo della Seconda Guerra Mondiale, ad imprimere una svolta decisiva alla trasformazione dell’azienda da artigiana ad industriale. Con lui arrivarono i primi operai e fu avviata la meccanizzazione di molte fasi di lavorazione.

Agli inizi degli anni ottanta del secolo scorso, quindi, è stata aperta una nuova struttura produttiva attorno alla quale si è sviluppato l’attuale complesso industriale. Contemporaneamente, si è formata una dinamica struttura manageriale che, oltre a gestire le molteplici attività legate al sugherificio, ha anche brillantemente portato avanti un’imponente diversificazione delle varie attività imprenditoriali di quello che è diventato un vero e proprio Gruppo Industriale. Una struttura manageriale che vede in prima linea i membri della famiglia Molinas, della quale fanno ormai parte i giovani della quarta generazione.

Name: DTE Dansk Træemballage A/S
Description:
Dansk Træemballage A/S (DTE) er Skandinaviens førende producent af træemballage. Vi er vokset ud af veldrevne lokale savværker landet over, så vi i dag kan kalde os landsdækkende – med solide lokale rødder.
Navnet Dansk Træemballage A/S fik vi i 1989, men rødderne går meget længere tilbage.

Det er vor målsætning at vor produktion og vore produkter er bæredygtige, hvilket for os betyder at vi tager ansvar for, hvordan vores aktiviteter påvirker det omgivende samfund, ikke kun set fra en økonomisk synsvinkel, men også̊ set ud fra en miljø– og social synsvinkel.

Hos DTE fremstiller vi den træemballage, du har brug for – i faste standardstørrelser eller efter helt individuelle mål. Her har vi stort set ingen grænser for, hvad vi kaster os ud i at emballere i træ. Takket være vores kompromisløse trækvalitet, er der utallige muligheder for at skabe den rette emballage til dit formål.
Mange emballager – for eksempel paller – har vi klar i standardstørrelser, og du kan bestille fra dag til dag.
Er din vare for stor til en almindelig emballage, fremstiller vi en specialemballage eller kan foretage pakning/emballering på stedet.

Vi modtager hvert år omkring 400.000 kubikmeter råtræ på vores savværk, og derudover bearbejder vi 70.000 kubikmeter opskåret trælast på vores 6 produktionssteder. Så vi ved, hvad træ kan bruges til, og hvordan det tjener dig bedst. Det må du endelig benytte dig af. 

Kontakt os gerne allerede i dag, enten på telefon eller mail, så hjælper vi dig hurtigt videre. 
Det uanset om du har brug for:
•	Paller, standard- eller specialmål
•	Transportkasser
•	Specialemballager efter mål – store og små
•	Større pakkeopgaver (projektpakning)
•	Frugtkasser
•	Andre forespørgsler og specialopgaver

DTE producerer også certificerede træpiller under navnet stampemøllen.dk
I dag beskæftiger vi i alt ca. 400 medarbejdere i Danmark og ca. 125 medarbejder i Norge og Sverige, DTE-koncernen omsætter for over 1 mia. kroner om året.

Name: Ondulor S.r.l.
Description:
Ondulor è un’azienda cartotecnica, specializzata nella progettazione e nella realizzazione di scatole e imballaggi per il settore agroalimentare e industriale.

Attiva dal 1973, nasce come compagnia produttrice di cartone ondulato “integrato”: fonde la produzione e la trasformazione del cartone in scatole americane o fustellate.

Nel corso dei decenni ha consolidato la sua presenza nel mercato sardo, e si è affermata anche fuori dal proprio territorio, partendo dalla Corsica e successivamente estendendo il suo mercato nel Sud Italia, dove eccelle nel mercato degli imballaggi ortofrutticoli.

Nel tempo, l’azienda ha investito importanti risorse per essere sempre all’avanguardia, e offrire prodotti personalizzati, sempre più vicini alle esigenze dei clienti. Ciò ha comportato l’implementazione costante di macchinari sempre più sofisticati, accompagnata dalla gestione completamente informatizzata del processo produttivo.

Ondulor si distingue nel mercato del packaging, perché:

• L’intero processo di produzione e di gestione aziendale è computerizzato

• Il numero importante di linee di trasformazione rende facile progettare e realizzare tutti i tipi di scatola

• La linea di confezionamento, reggiatura e filmatura è completamente automatizzata

• Gli imballi destinati all’ortofrutta sono prodotti secondo le norme indicate dal Consorzio Bestack, importante realtà che garantisce gli standard di produzione del cartone per l’ortofrutta.

Il team è formato da circa 110 dipendenti, e in tutti i reparti si fondono le competenze  e le abilità dei più esperti, con la freschezza e il dinamismo dei più giovani.

Description:
Gould Publication Papers are independent paper suppliers who specialise in supplying paper and providing paper management services direct to the print and publishing industry, including the magazine, catalogue, travel, direct mail and retail publishing sectors.

We operate as the UK Publication Papers division of Japan Pulp & Paper, the world’s largest independent paper and pulp distributor. Our global business supplies paper to businesses in 28 countries across the globe.

Gould’s status as independent suppliers enables us to source paper from all of the major mill manufacturers, providing you with unparalleled freedom of choice. 

To ensure our service to you remains consistently reliable, Gould work closely with your elected printers and 
the manufacturer of your preferred paper grade, liaising with them often to ensure efficient communication at all times.

Based in Leatherhead, Surrey, Gould’s dedicated team have a wealth of experience in paper, print and production, currently managing over 600 publications. Gould Publication Papers take the time to understand your printing and/or paper management needs and tailor our service to suit your particular business.

Nashua is dedicated to creating opportunity, value and growth for its customers, shareholders and employees. Our primary objective is to respond to customer needs by providing exceptional products and services.

As a direct thermal paper manufacturer and coater, Nashua is the only vertically integrated supplier of direct thermal labels, tickets and small roll products.  This gives us the ability to perfectly match our direct thermal material to your specific application, printer, environment and expectations.  Every label and roll product from Nashua is backed by sound technical expertise, first class service and over 80 years of manufacturing experience.

Description:

With over 80 years of industry expertise, we take pride in our ability to produce custom glulam beams for a wide range of projects, from custom homes to large commercial structures.

At Zip-O-Laminators, we believe in operating between the improbable and the impossible. Our state-of-the-art facilities, including our own kilns, allow us to control the quality and moisture content of our raw materials, ensuring that every product meets the highest standards of excellence. Whether it's for an iconic bridge restoration or a school gymnasium, our glulam beams are engineered to perform.

Our dedication to innovation sets us apart. We tackle projects that other companies can't or won't do, consistently pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in the industry.

Det vil si næringsaktører fra de trebaserte verdikjedene med samarbeidspartnerne fra forsknings- og kunnskapsmiljøene, forvaltning og øvrig støtteapparat. Kontakt er godt etablert med andre nasjonale og internasjonale miljø.

– Bidrar til å skape et bærekraftig samfunn

Name: Київський картонно-паперовий комбінат/Kyiv Cardboard and Paper Mill
Description:
PJSC Kyiv Cardboard and Paper Mill is one of the biggest enterprises in Europe on cardboard and paper production, is part of the Austrian Pulp Mill Holding. 
The share of the Mill makes about 30% in the general output of pulp and paper production in Ukraine. 
The main raw material used for cardboard and paper production is recycled paper. Waste paper processing capacity is more than 1500 tons per day. The Mill is located in Obukhiv city in Kiev region and covers an area of about 99 hectares, number of employees is about 2200 people.
Products of leading Ukrainian brands and transnational companies are packed into corrugated cardboard packaging of Kyiv CPM. Cardboard, produced by the Mill, is used for manufacturing of consumer packaging and printed goods. High-quality tissue paper is appreciated by many manufacturers of products for sanitary and household goods, and tissue products under the brand Divo, Obukhivska, became popular along with a well-known brand of toilet paper Obukhiv 65.

Name: VALPEL - Comércio e Transformação de Papel, Lda.
Description:
A Valpel é uma empresa que orienta os seus esforços na satisfação dos clientes, no sector de transformação de papel, desde 1979.

Vocacionados para o ramo dos artigos consumidos fora de casa (AfH - Away from Home), trabalhamos especialmente para os setores de Hotelaria, Restauração, Higiene e Limpeza Institucional, Industrial e Automóvel, e temos vindo a alargar a nossa oferta, de forma a poder responder às necessidades de um cada vez maior número de fornecedores desses ramos, disponibilizando um serviço de distribuição que cobre toda a Península Ibérica.

Fabricamos e comercializamos variadíssimos produtos de papel, a partir de fibras virgens e/ou recicladas, tais como Toalhas de Mão, Toalhas de Mesa, Papéis Higiénicos Industriais, Papéis de Limpeza, Rolos de Marquesa, Guardanapos, Saquetas, Papéis para Embalagem (Alimentar e Não Alimentar), entre outros.

Os nossos produtos chegam ao mercado através dos nossos clientes: Armazenistas, Revendedores, Grossistas, Cash&Carry, Importadores, Empresas de Manutenção e Fabricantes de produtos complementares.

Name: SAFFCO
Description:
Somos una compañía chilena dedicada a la producción y venta de productos forestales, avellanos europeos y cerezas, todos de la más alta calidad.

La Región de Los Ríos, especialmente Paillaco, nos brinda las mejores condiciones para el cultivo y producción de tres variedades de Eucaliptus Nitens, con el que elaboramos principalmente Madera clear, Madera con nudos, Trozos nudosos y libres de nudos, Metro ruma para celulosa y Leña certificada. Hemos desarrollado un Protocolo de procesamiento y calidad para nuestra madera, que nos permite cumplir con escuadrías exactas y los más altos estándares de calidad. 

En SAFFCO es fundamental el respeto por nuestro entorno ambiental y social. Por eso, nuestras más de 800 hectáreas de bosques cuentan con la certificación internacional FSC. Además somos socios miembros de la Promotora de Certificación Forestal PROCER.

En el área frutícola, nuestro principal cultivo es el Avellano Europeo. Actualmente contamos con una superficie creciente de 300 hectáreas de avellanos, de las variedades Barcelona and Giffoni, cuya producción está sobre las 660 toneladas.

We are a renowned and respected wholesaler and distributor for office supplies and packaging consumables in Kuwait since 1993. We supply companies all over Kuwait with products of the highest quality. At Salhiya Tower we never compromise on the quality or the efficiency of our products and services.

These formed the basis of our good reputation in the market today and are proven by our excellent track record since the last 20 years. This is also the primary reason for why a company started with only $50 has now grown to have yearly revenue of nearly $5 million in sales. 

Our quick growth and strong stand in the market is also due to our ability to deliver the best quality at the most reasonable price. All our products are sold under our registered brand name “YAKUT”. The products page should give a better understanding of the type of products held in our inventory and for a quote of prices, please send us an enquiry. Alternatively, you can directly contact us by email through sales@salhiyatower.com. Please note that we cater to the needs of small companies looking to sell quality products as well as large multinational corporations, all over Kuwait; so do not hesitate to send us an enquiry whatever your demand may be. We have large and organised network of warehousing, logistics and manpower to meet demands of our clients in time. 

To find out more about our company and the products we deal in, please visit www.salhiyatower.com

Description: Milltex established in 1987 began business with the rebuilding of equipment for the paper industry increasing the quality and the quantity of the production.. Using the experience the founding partners acquired in engineering and construction of special machines, gradually shifted to operating area to offer the current range of converting machinery for paper and cardboard in paper mills and converters . Particularly Milltex is able to construct and deliver the following machines: - Syncro sheeters - Syncro sheeters - Slitters rewinders - Embossing – wrapping - Unwinding - Transport and handling paper rolls - Accessories for the paper industry

Name: Escolofi
Description:
Escolofi, empresa familiar creada en 1948, fabrica desde sus orígenes una cuidada línea de cuadernos. Disponemos de diferentes líneas de producto, según sean para escolares, universitarios, oficinas o simplemente para los que nos gusta escribir nuestros pensamientos, proyectos o ilusiones.

La escuela es un mundo lleno de retos, aventuras, juegos, amistad, y también aprendizaje. Cada instante en la vida de un niño se presenta como un momento mágico, una hoja en blanco que será rellenada con todo aquello que vaya experimentando. Queremos para cada uno de ellos un acompañamiento respetuoso, cariñoso y sólido. Queremos que expresen sus dones, su creatividad, su libertad y su capacidad de absorber conocimientos que nutrirán su intelecto y también sus emociones. Y como no, queremos que dispongan del material idóneo en el que puedan plasmar sus experiencias, todo lo que aprenden y todo lo que quieren comunicar. En Escolofi cultivamos la pasión por aprender!

Cada alumno es un mundo y cada área de conocimiento es una nueva aventura. Por ello ofrecemos un completísimo surtido de 30 modelos de rayados, más 8 de música, que cubren todas las necesidades según la etapa de aprendizaje y la materia. Nuestro compromiso con la educación está siempre presente y nos hace investigar y proponer nuevas herramientas en papel que añadan valor al maravilloso proceso de pensar y aprender. 

Escolofi y el Medio Ambiente: 
Recurrimos a materias primas que provengan de plantaciones gestionadas de una forma responsable a nivel Medioambiental, social y económico, tal y como lo certifica la entidad independiente Forest Stewardship Council  (FSC). Te garantizamos que los procesos de fabricación que realizamos tienen su origen en bosques de árboles cultivados con el fin de producir papel. Bosques que, a su vez, tienen un impacto positivo en el medio ambiente, ya que contribuyen a fijar el CO2 presente en la atmósfera mitigando así los efectos del cambio climático.

Name: SKIKO TISSUE PAPER CONVERTING
Description:
SKIKO is a rapidly developing paper processing company established in Herakleion, Crete, in 1960 by Konstantinos Skyrianos.
Focus on quality and the lowest possible cost quickly led to the transfer of the company to the wider area of Athens.
Despite the harsh economic conditions of recent years and thanks to sound management and technological development, SKIKO still continues developing in its privately-owned premises that cover an area of 3,000 m2 in Aspropyrgos, Attica, Greece. The company has 20 workers.
In our premises you can find state-of-the-art production machines, which we constantly upgrade so that we can successfully manage the increasingly growing demand that comes mainly from abroad.
As for the Greek market, thanks to our privately-owned fleet of trucks, we can instantly serve our customers in Attica, while all of our customers all over the country enjoy the same promptitude thanks to the competitive contracts we have signed and still maintain for several decades now with the greatest transportation companies.

SKIKO produces and can instantly provide you with the following products through wholesale transactions.

Toilet tissue paper rolls – Kitchen tissue paper rolls
Paper napkins of all types and dimensions
Hand paper towels of all types: Mfold, Cfold and Zfold
Professional packages
All types of paper napkins can be printed
Our company is the only one in Greece that produces and exports Espresso paper napkins (17×17).
Therefore, we can now meet the needs of our customers for products designed for maximum economy, such as:
Autocut paper towel dispenser or photocell dispenser
Toilet paper dispensers
Liquid soap dispensers

Name: JP "Srbijašume"
Description:
The name of "Srbijašume", traditionally and symbolically, represents the bond between two great goods - the Republic of Serbia and its forests. Serbia's nature is rich and almost the third of its territory, around 2,5 million ha, is covered by deciduous and coniferous forest treasure.

The care of Serbian forests dates back to the year of 1835 when it became constitutionally guaranteed. With the Act from 1861 the division of forests according to ownership type was defined for the first time, and the first Forest Law passed in 1891.

SE for Forest Management "Srbijašume" was established in 1991 in the spirit of the genuine Serbian host, it looks after ca. 1 million ha of forests and parks in Serbia and performs professional work in private forests on an area of similar size.

Today SE "Srbijašume" consists of 17 forest estates and 67 forest administrations, employing a workforce of 3,200 including 493 forest engineers and around 1,000 forest technicians who carry through the protection and enhancement of existing forests and the raising of new ones.

The annual increment in forests managed by SE "Srbijašume" amounts to ca. 3 million cubic metres of timber volume, and only 1.1 million is exploited, which makes approximately the third of increment. Thus forest richness is increased, and through regular tending measures forest quality is enhanced.

In 44 hunting grounds in the system of SE "Srbijašume" there are 9,500 big game animals and around 80,000 small game animals. 

The Republic of Serbia has entrusted SE "Srbijašume" with managing a part of Serbia's fishing waters and, freely said, its employees have been given the task to take care of a big part of this country's nature.

To what extent Serbia will be an ecologically healthy environment, and how much healthy and high-quality food our state will be able to produce, primarily depends on our work and commitment.

pin, sapin, mélèze, Douglas.

Produits & applications

• Bois de charpente et ossature
• Parquets, lames de terrasse et plinthes
• Volets et éléments d’aménagement

Un engagement durable

TRAVAILLER LE BOIS, C’EST RESPECTER LA FORÊT.

Zéro déchet : chaque mètre cube de bois est optimisé et valorisé.

Name: SOTOMOB
Description:
Présente à Aubigny-sur-Nère dans le Cher (18) depuis 1950, SOTOMOB est une menuiserie industrielle occupant un site couvert de 5 000 m² environ, spécialisée dans la fabrication de mobiliers, de PLV lourdes, d'éléments d'agencement et d'ameublement, pour tous les usages professionnels : bureaux, points de vente, bibliothèques, accueils, collectivités... 

SOTOMOB répond à des demandes de pièces unitaires, comme pour la fabrication de banque d'accueil sur-mesure ou de table de conférence, jusqu'à la production en série, grâce à un parc machines moderne.

 SOTOMOB  met ainsi son usine et son bureau d'études au service de donneurs d'ordre professionnels comme les enseignes, les agenceurs, les architectes d'intérieur, les designers, les entreprises de menuiserie, les aménageurs de bureaux ou de magasins, les collectivités locales ou les marques de mobilier vendues ensuite à des particuliers.

SOTOMOB propose des solutions depuis la phase études, grâce à son bureau d'études intégré, jusqu'à la phase expédition, en passant par la découpe, le plaquage, l'usinage, la finition (atelier de vernis et teinte intégré) et les opérations de montage/pré-montage en atelier. 

L'usine travaille les panneaux de particules (plaqués essence fine, mélaminés ou stratifiés) ou médium et transforme quotidiennement du bois massif résineux (épicéa). Pour répondre aux demandes de ses clients, les équipes de SOTOMOB prennent en charge l'intégration de vitrines, de serrurerie et d'éclairage pour livrer des produits finis.

SOTOMOB est dotée d'un parc d'une vingtaine de machines récentes pour l'usinage, d'un atelier de montage, d'un atelier de finition de 900 m² et d'une zone dédiée à la logistique (stockage, emballage, préparation de commandes, expédition).

Name: Vale do Cedro
Description:
A Vale do Cedro é uma empresa familiar que nasce do desejo de aperfeiçoar técnicas de plantio, cultivo e produção de madeira.
 
A Partir do reflorestamento reintroduzimos uma espécie nobre no mercado brasileiro através de um modelo de produção sustentável obtendo assim um material renovável de alta qualidade.
 
Sua capacidade de ser renovável é extremamente compatível com as necessidades de nossa sociedade contemporânea e por isso procuramos incorporar o ciclo de vida da madeira na sua estrutura de negócio.
 
A Vale do Cedro atua desde 2006 na seleção cuidadosa de sementes e no plantio de mudas em uma área total de mais 2.500 hectares, localizadas nas regiões do Vale da Ribeira e de Ribeirão Branco, no interior do Estado de São Paulo.
Hoje com aproximadamente um milhão de árvores, das espécies: Acrocarpus Fraxinifoliun, Toona Ciliata, Pinus Teada e Eucalypto, contamos com Serraria e duas Usinas de Preservação de Madeira em uma área de 33.764 m2 .
 
Plantamos e transformamos árvores respeitando a legislação ambiental, capacitando trabalhadores e fornecendo a nossos clientes e parceiros soluções em madeira.


* TERMO TRATAMENTO DE MADEIRAS 
No Brasil a Vale do Cedro é uma das empresas pioneiras na aplicação da técnica de termo tratamento em diversas madeiras. O procedimento é uma técnica originaria da Europa que traz diferenciais positivos para o material.

O Termo tratamento é uma técnica que consiste em aquecer a madeira a uma temperatura de pelo menos 140 graus Celsius enquanto o material é protegido com vapor de água para não perder as suas caraterísticas, além de fornecer proteção. Como resultado do processo a madeira se torna com algumas outras propriedades físicas e químicas e continua sendo um produto amigo do ambiente agora com múltiplas utilidades.

Name: Lamb AB
Description:
LAMB is a part of an international group of companies with tradition dating back almost 100 years.

The market in Europe is covered by Lamb AB, Karlstad, Sweden.

Brief history
In 1906 the Hoquiam Machine Works was founded in the north west of the USA in extensive woods near the coast of the Pacific Ocean. In 1912 the company’s name was changed to Lamb Machine Co.

From 1935 onwards, LAMB concentrated on the pulp and paper industry and specialized in the areas of engineering and manufacture. The company took over pioneer function in the development of automatic handling and wrapping systems for paper rolls and pulp. In 1938 for example, the first pulp cutter was delivered to a customer.

Name: Prima Paper Services Ltd
Description:
Outline of Prima Paper Services Ltd
Grant Mahoney established Prima in 1990 as a paper recycling company that specialises in servicing the print trade  Prima offers a bespoke service to maximise our customer's return on their waste paper and to add value in other areas. The printing industry has undergone many transformations since 1990 and likewise in the paper recycling industry we have seen companies merge or totally vanish. Prima continues to flourish in a shrinking printing industry and this is because of our values and business ethics.

We believe in a transparent partnership with the suppliers of our raw materials and  produce a bespoke service to all of our customers. Prima provides a traceable system ensuring customers are paid for the full and correct amount of waste paper leaving their site. Prima has a unique full management information that allows us to provide our customers with useful data for whatever professional standard or accreditation they are working with.

Prima is located in Ashford and look to recycle locally with most of the paper being recycled in Kent. Even Prima's plastics are recycled as local as possible using a granulator in Suffolk rather than the Far East!  Prima works with their customers to ensure that their carbon footprint is minimised.

Name: Huella Verde Energía
Description:
Los pellets y briquetas de Huella Verde son productos de la más alta calidad fabricados con el mayor compromiso de sostenibilidad y cuidado del medioambiente.

Nuestros pellets y briquetas proceden de bosques gestionados de forma sostenible y fuentes controladas con la certificación de PEFC, el organismo que trabaja para asegurar una sostenibilidad forestal con perspectiva local que genere beneficios para todos.
Además, la certificación ENPlus A1 garantiza que nuestros productos son de la mayor calidad y que están elaborados con madera virgen y residuos forestales sin tratar químicamente, con bajos contenidos en cenizas, nitrógeno y cloro.
Nuestro compromiso medioambiental nos lleva también a producir cerca de los lugares de consumo, minimizando la distancia de nuestros transportes, reduciendo sensiblemente la huella de carbono y a utilizar sacos fabricados, al menos, con un 60% de material reciclado. 

Por todos esto, al utilizar productos Huella Verde, estás colaborando en la conservación del hábitat de abejas, búhos, quebrantahuesos, ciervos, muflones y otras muchas especies amenazadas.

Cambia de combustible y no tendrás que cambiar de planeta.

Name: BuilderGrowth
Description:
A marketing and consulting agency serving the urban lumber, sawmill, tree service, and hardwood flooring industry. 

After years of helping my father in law with his small portable sawmill business with branding and marketing advice, I noticed that the field is grossly underserved. As I looked around my house, I noticed that my bed, my dining room table, my children's bunk bed were made with trees planted over 50 years ago by my wife's grandfather on their property and created into furniture by her own father. Those pieces will be in my family for generations. That's an amazing story that I wanted to share with the general public. That is only possible through the work of wood professionals. 

After talking with over 50 businesses, they all said that they wanted more awareness. The first thing I created was an Instagram account, then a podcast, and I started building a community of urban lumber, sawmill, and woodworking companies. Right now there are over 68,000 followers. If you're a woodworker, tree service, hardwood flooring, and sawmill professional you're an extremely passionate person and care about good quality products. Acres of Timber does branding, lead generation, facebook ads, consulting, speaking, and workshops to empower brands to build a community and following to increase profits.

Since we've started we've worked with a handful of clients such as the largest sawmill company in the world, the largest chainsaw accessory company, and lead the first ever Urban Lumber Summit.

 We Rely on Skilled Individuals and Experienced Color Specialists

Our company relies on some of the most knowledgeable individuals and companies in the color business. We work with multiple dyes, colored pigment, and OBA suppliers; dye pump manufacturers and manufacturer associations; optical brightener manufacturers and dye delivery system vendors to provide you with the best options. 

 We have expertise in process and product quality

Crable Engineering has been involved in process control with AccuRay/ABB and our years of experience in direct product quality management has helped us build a solid background that includes manufacturing procedures, equipment, training, and testing. 

We have worked with certified quality engineers, product engineers, systems engineers, control/process optimization engineers, project managers, technical support and troubleshooting experts. Crable Engineering has helped ISO-9000 implementations, facilitated Kaizen events, and overseen product testing laboratories including instrument evaluation and selection.

 Why choose us

With our decades of experience in process solutions and color (which is quite complex), we are committed to offering nothing but the best to our clients. We assist you in defining the problem, find the right resources, and work with you until you achieve what you need to maximize your profits. 

Our reputation as a quality color and process solution provider is our strongest asset, and we look to maintain long-lasting relationships with our clients.

Name: BDR SA
Description:
Bdr-Sa est une société d’usinage bois spécialisée dans la découpe de panneaux bois et autres matières.


Grâce à notre centre d’usinage numérique 3D, nous sommes en mesure de fournir des panneaux et des plaques de différentes matières découpés avec une haute précision.

L’usinage CNC (Commande Numérique par Calculateur) permet de réaliser la prise de dimensions, le fraisage, le perçage, le lamage, le découpage, le rainurage selon un programme informatique qui ne laisse place à aucune imperfection. Le processus de découpage est complètement numérisé grâce un programme traité par un logiciel CAM (Computer Numerical Control) qui convertit le fichier CAD (Computer Aided Design).

Aussi, grâce à la numérisation et à la qualité de nos outils, nous garantissons un façonnage de haute qualité et des finitions impeccables dans les trois dimensions (usinage 3D).


Nous accompagnons nos clients dans leurs projets depuis la conception jusqu’à la livraison du produit fini. Grâce à notre réactivité, notre centre d’usinage CNC et notre savoir-faire, nous travaillons avec de grandes industries sur le territoire français et sur les marchés internationaux.

Dans le domaine des transports, nous travaillons pour différents secteurs : ferroviaire, aéronautique, aménagement de véhicules, construction navale.

Dans le domaine de la construction de bâtiments, nous usinons des panneaux pour l’habillage extérieur et intérieur des murs, plafonds, toits, planchers. Nous fournissons ainsi :
Panneaux isolants extérieurs,
Panneaux isolants intérieurs,
Panneaux acoustiques,
Cloisons intérieures,
Panneaux de façade.

Nous découpons des panneaux pour l’aménagement sur mesure et la menuiserie intérieure :
Aménagement de magasins et commerces,
Aménagement de bureaux ou lieux collectifs,
Agencement de cuisines,
Agencement sur mesure : étagères, meubles de rangement, surfaces d’exposition, cloisons, panneaux décoratifs, etc.

Name: Paper Solutions Inc.
Description:
Founded in 2003, Paper Solutions Inc. (PSI) is a privately-held company started as a paper converter using years’ of experience in paper buying and print industry.

The process of converting rolls into sheets augmented our knowledge on the importance of paper characteristics, most notably, roughness, formation, moisture and other paper properties. As print runs started getting shorter, we divested converting and diversified into distribution of prime-quality printing and writing fine papers.

Our converting experience during formative years taught us two valuable lessons: 'pure consistent performance' and 'focused low cost'.

Technological advances in faster printing equipment and high customer expectations demand superior quality. No printer wants press downtime or excessive spoilage due to non-uniformity in the sheet. But paper characteristics cannot be judged with the naked eyes. We use stringent testing methods to test paper properties and then conduct numerous trial runs on printing equipment before sourcing. As a result, we supply papers with outstanding quality consistent with every order. 

Printing is notoriously competitive and low-margin. Printers need aggressive pricing to win jobs. The first thing we do is constantly analyze our supply chain and streamline operations to improve efficiencies driving down costs. While our volume leveraging helps us to achieve cost reductions. This allows us to pass on savings to customers in the form of a lower price than the industry average.

Despite the challenging competing conditions, print is finding confidence again. Paper is still one of the significant costs - general assumption is 25% - of the value of a printing job. Re-think paper and you may find lots of room to improve metrics. We can provide you custom-tailor solutions to match your exact paper needs.

Name: La Semaine des sciences forestières
Description:
La Semaine des sciences forestières (SSF) est à la fois, comme son nom l’indique, une semaine où le domaine forestier est mis à l’avant-plan, mais également le nom de l’organisation qui s’occupe de mettre en oeuvre cette semaine toute spéciale. Depuis ses débuts, l’événement est entièrement organisé bénévolement par les étudiants en foresterie de l’Université Laval, et jusqu’à tout récemment également par les étudiants en environnement. Cette initiative étudiante se veut autant un média de vulgarisation et d’information pour le grand public afin de faire connaître certaines facettes méconnues de la foresterie québécoise que l’occasion de fraterniser entre étudiants de tous niveaux, professionnels et gens du grand public.

À ses balbutiements, il y a déjà 50 ans, la Semaine des sciences forestières tournait en grande partie autour d’un symposium organisé par les étudiants de la Faculté de foresterie.  Cet événement est devenu une véritable tradition au sein de la faculté, certains enseignants levant même leur journée de cours pour permettre aux étudiants d’y participer. Puis au fil des années, plusieurs activités se sont ajoutées à cette semaine. Le Salon de la forêt qui a vu le jour il y a 40 ans est incontestablement devenu l’activité majeure de notre comité. Cette dernière activité marquant depuis plusieurs années le début de la Semaine des sciences forestières. De sorte que depuis plusieurs années, cet événement est de loin le plus promu de cette semaine.

En somme, la Semaine des sciences forestières, en plus d’être un regroupement d’étudiants bénévoles motivés, est une semaine tenue annuellement dans le but de souligner l’importance de la foresterie et de l’environnement forestier.

Name: Arelan Group
Description:
We live in the most advanced time in our history. The level of technology available today is mind blowing. Neural bypass and robot assisted surgery are shaping the future of medicine. Blockchain is changing the way we do transactions. Autonomous vehicles are waiting behind the corner to alter the way we move people and goods from point A to point B. Yet, something important is missing.

According to statistics, we spend 90% of our time indoors. Children today spend half the time their parents did playing outside. Chemical products are increasingly replacing natural materials found in wood, metal, and leather. Over the past fifty years, the chemicals production in the world has increased more than fifty times and many of the products we use every day contain and emit chemicals, some causing problems such as allergies and others having unknown long-term effects. Our ancestors lived in a world where most human needs were met through wood, metals, and other resources that were extracted from the natural environment. Today, we live in a very different world, where nearly everything in a typical room is in some way derived from industrial chemicals.

We are losing something that has been with us for thousands of years of our human history. Something that is intergral to our very human existence. Our connection to the natural world around us. At ARELAN, we want to restore this lost connection. We want to bring a piece of nature to every house. We want to live in a world where one can fall asleep and wake up surrounded by nature not only on the weekend, but every day. 

Floors, walls, ceilings, doors, windows, moldings, tables, chairs, kitchens, stairs, shelves... In a typical built environment, most of these items are usually made of artificial materials. However, they can be made out of natural materials, such as wood. At ARELAN, we offer only 100% natural wood solutions for the built environment, manufactured at our own plants in Saint Petersburg, Russia, using sustainably harvested local wood.

Name: Railway Wooden Sleepers
Description:
Agrícola y Comercial Mardones y Compañía Limitada (Mardones), since 1978 has been largely the most relevant railway sleeper supplier in Chile. Understanding its key role in the railroad and forestry industries, in 1998 Mardones decided to build a creosote wood impregnating plant considerably extending the sleeper service life.

Creosote vacuum pressure timber impregnation is a proven process widely used in North America, Europe, Africa and Asia to waterproof and immunize wood against environment natural degradation, increasing the wooden sleeper life cycle several times.

With the abovementioned purpose, Mardones created a joint venture along with the American company The Burke-Parsons-Bowlby Corporation (BPB), by that time a major railway sleeper producer in the USA, thus founding Mardones BPB Creosote Treaters S.A., a Chilean enterprise that invested more than 4 million US dollars in this plant’s infrastructure and sleeper inventories. Nowadays Mardones – BPB serves all the Chilean railways and has also exported oak creosoted treated sleepers to Egypt, Saudi Arabia, New Zealand, South Africa, South Korea, Colombia, Costa Rica and Peru, having annual sales up to 10 million dollars, equivalent to more than 200 thousand sleepers sold per annum, producing in the last 20 years the quantity of 3.4 million of sleepers valued in 138 million dollars.

공장인 오산에서 라이너지 및 강화골심지등 양품의 제품을 공급하여 국내에서는 일하게 

원지에서부터 골판지원단, 상자에 이르기 까지 일괄 생산체제의 기업으로 자리잡고 있습니다.

저희 한국수출포장은 최첨단의 자동화 공장으로써 수주에서 납품까지 모든 공정을 Monitoring하여

최고의 고객 만족을 구현하고 있습니다. 또한 경영혁신 STEP(건실,신뢰,팽창,전진)이라는 

슬로건 아래 끊임없는 개선과 사업장간 벤치마킹으로 인재를 발굴하고 양성하여 고부가가치 

있는 기업활동으로 기술과 노하우를 발전시켜 나가고 있습니다.

또한 업계최초로 품질(ISO9001), 환경(ISO14001), 안전보건(OHSAS18001)에 

대한 국제인증서를 모두 취득 함으로서 통합경영시스템의 구축 및 명실공히 21세기 초일류 

회사로서의 국제적 품질경쟁력을 갖추었고 향후 해외 바이어에 통합경영시스템 인증에 대한 

적극적 홍보를 통하여 제품 수출증대에 기여하도록 할것입니다.

한국수출포장공업은 언제나 신용과 전통을 바탕으로 최고의 품질과 정확한 납기로 고객 

여러분의 생산성 및 원가 절감에도 기여할 수 있는 믿음직한 동반자가 되도록 혼신의 

노력을 다 할 것을 약속 드립니다.

Name: Dřevozpracující družstvo, Lukavec
Description:
DDL je česká středně velká firma se stabilními vlastníky, kteří se aktivně podílejí na řízení a provozu firmy. DDL je významným výrobcem řeziva a deskových materiálů na bázi dřeva s 60letou tradicí.

Rozvoj a inovace

Specializujeme se na výrobu širokého sortimentu nábytkových dílců, především z laminovaných dřevotřískových a MDF desek, různých kvalit (standardní nábytkářská, speciální pro lakování, frézování atd.).
Od roku 2005 vyrábíme spolu s naší dceřinou společností DH Dekor, s.r.o. nábytkové dílce. Výrobní technologie, které používáme, jsou špičkové a odpovídají nejmodernějším trendům v nábytkářském oboru. Zároveň vyrábíme a dodáváme dřevotřískové a MDF desky, včetně povrchově upravených přírodní dýhou nebo laminováním. Svým zákazníkům nabízíme také jehličnaté stavební řezivo. Jsme taktéž významným výrobcem hoblovaných profilů ze smrku a sibiřského modřínu.

Spolehlivost

Díky značným investicím do výroby poskytujeme našim zákazníkům ideální spojení výrobce dřevotřískových desek a MDF společně s laminací a vlastní impregnací, velkokapacitními nářezovými centry a výrobou nábytkových dílců. Právě v oblasti nábytkových dílců je takové spojení velkým benefitem a konkurenční výhodou pro našeho zákazníka.

Kvalita

Přibližně 60 % naší celkové produkce exportujeme do více než dvou desítek evropských států. Jsme držitelem mnoha certifikátů a splňujeme požadavky normy ISO 9001:2008. Dokážeme se přizpůsobit potřebám zákazníka a nechat se certifikovat podle jeho potřeb. Příkladem je i certifikace IWAY pro firmu IKEA.


Rychlé a spolehlivé dodávky, ověřená kvalita, vysoká flexibilita, individuální přístup ke každému zákazníkovi, schopnost vyrábět malé série a pestrá nabídka exkluzivních dekorů. To jsou naše hlavní přednosti, které zákazníci oceňují již desítky let.

Description:
CUSTOM, HANDMADE FLOORING. WORLDWIDE!

LONDON | TORONTO | MOSCOW | ST. PETERSBURG | MONACO | VILNIUS

For over 20 years, Bonum Wood has been custom-crafting luxury hardwood flooring that endows homes and businesses with their own unique ambience. The company can offer unparalleled value to its global customers because of its custom manufacturing and support services from start to finish…and beyond. Our clients are prestigious architectural firms, design studios and real estate developers, as well as individual architects and interior designers.


WHAT MAKES US EXCEPTIONAL?

•	Our Products Are Custom-Made…One At A Time
Each Bonum Wood product is unique – because each is made to order. Every one of our fine wood floors is designed specifically for only one customer, because every one of our customers has their own unique vision of how their or their client's home should look.   

•	If You Can Dream It, We Can Create It 
We don't have “standard” products, colors, measurements or patterns. The only limits are what you can dream!

•	We Have A Reputation For Quality
We use only the best products, the most advanced technology, and the finest craftspeople…and we create flooring of impeccable quality. We’re so confident of our quality, in fact, that we guarantee it for a lifetime. 

•	We Don’t Use “Distributors” or “Reps.” You Work Only With Us.  
When you work with Bonum Wood…you work only with Bonum Wood! We control the entire process, from manufacturing and (direct-to-you) sales to installation and ongoing support. Our goal is simple - to provide you with the best products, service and value.

Name: msquared GmbH
Description:
msquared has recently become part of the Jäger group of companies. (www.jaeger-gmbh.com). The Jäger group offers the industry problem solving solutions, corrective actions and specialized components for the optimization of paper and tissue machines. msquared services include all Measurement, Inspection and Consultation Services for drying systems to the paper industry on a worldwide basis. 

msquared GmbH offers these services using innovative and unique measuring techniques to the highest possible quality standards. Another unique feature of m² is our ability to work as an unbiased, independent and highly qualified consulting firm, not affiliated with any OEM, supplier or service company. „Our allegiance is to the integrity of the data!”

The services offered can be separated into three aspects of condition monitoring:

Condition Assessment Production (CAP): To optimize the runability of the Yankee in the overall tissue machine system. Diagnostic tools are „On-the-Run Topography-TNG” and „IRSense – Infrared Temperature Mapping”. These services are targeted to mill production staffs.

Condition Assessment Maintenance (CAM): To predict necessary maintenance actions and intervals for re-conditioning the Yankee. Diagnostic tools are „LMS - Laser Surface Mapping”. These services are targeted to mill maintenance staffs.

Condition Assessment Safety (CAS): To conduct necessary routine and non-routine vessel inspections according to TAPPI guidelines (technical association pulp & paper industry), local statutory and or insurance requirements. Diagnostic tools are standard NDT equipment. These services are targeted to mill safety engineers.

The ability to offer and to conduct the complete package „CAP + CAM + CAS” backed up using state of the art specialized diagnostic tools, together with many years of experience to recommend corrective actions, make this service unique.

Core Business:

The core business is processing all sorts of waste paper to shredded bales which are subsequently transported to paper and paperboard mills spread in the domestic market. Collection is made at companies or organizations while private dealers and traders can deliver their waste paper to company main location as well. Before collected paper is processed, any possible dirt, sand or dust or foreign particles like plastics, metal… etc. are removed, after which it is sorted by quality and then gets shredded, pressed into bales with fixed and uniform dimensions for easy handling.

However small, the perfect balance of a structure and its proportion, soothing us mentally in its tranquil vision. This gives us a feeling of serenity. This is my mission to bring beauty to our every day products. 

This lead me establish my company in 2008 in Italy.  We now have offices and distribution in United States, Italy and a 40,000 square foot plant in India. We manufacture and ship to any destination in the world.

We continue to expand and grow. In these last years, we have now established  in-house  Designing, color harmonizing and processing to final production, using the finest artist, machines and technology. 

It was my vision to fuse the unique art of India and its artisans, to modern technology. That was the vision that lead to Alka Pandey Packaging Private Ltd. An ISO 9001 company.

“Being Environmentally responsible” is something I have made my personal mission. Our Oceans, lakes and rivers waters are polluted. There is plastic in drinking water. Humans have made 8.3 billion metric tons of plastics since 1950’s and there is no stopping it. I have created, designed and produced products for floral, wedding and packaging industry to REPLACE plastics. I believe that it is not about being shocked what pollution is doing to our Earth, it is about acting on it. Come join me in using “plastic free” products. 

My commitment to my people, is something that lead me to ensure my company is SA8000 certified.
