Name: Association Avenir Papèterie de Bègles
Description:
a Papèterie de Bègles, qu’est-ce que c’est ?

Implantée depuis 1929 à Bègles, aux portes de Bordeaux, la Papèterie de Bègles est composée d’une centaine de salariés, et produit du papier qui, à travers l’histoire, à été utilisé pour la confection de sacs, de papier stratifié, et finalement du papier pour plaques de plâtre.

La Papèterie de Bègles a une capacité de production de plus de 80.000 tonnes de papiers par an, et tout ça intégralement à partir de papiers et cartons pour recyclage.

Tout ce savoir faire en fait un acteur majeur, que ce soit dans le recyclage, ou dans l’économie et l’emploi régional.

Quelle est la problématique ?

Le groupe belge Etex, à qui appartient la Papèterie de Bègles, a décidé de liquider cette usine, tout simplement car elle ne rentre pas dans la stratégie financière du groupe.

Le site a été contraint de fermer ses portes le 31 mars 2021, et les salariés ont reçu leurs lettres de licenciement de la part d’Etex.

Parallèlement, le groupe Global Hygiène a signé un accord exclusif avec Etex pour la cession du site de la Papèterie de Bègles, et a pour projet une usine de fabrication d’essuie-tout, qui ne verrait le jour au mieux que dans plusieurs années, qui imposerait de démanteler une grande partie du site en vu d’en reconstruire certaines. Ce projet ne permettrait pas de réintégrer les 92 salariés de la Papèterie de Bègles.

Quelle est la solution ?

Malgré cette situation difficile, un groupe composé de salariés, d’ex-dirigeants, de syndicalistes, et autres bénévoles, a décidé de se battre pour l’avenir de la Papèterie et de ses salariés, en répondant à l’appel d’offre de reprise face à Global Hygiène.

C’est ensemble qu’ils ont donné naissance à l’association Avenir Papèterie de Bègles, dont l’objectif est de développer un projet pour la pérennisation et la modernisation de cette activité historique afin de maintenir l’emploi, développer une filière de valorisation régionale.

Name: Policarta Pescara
Description:
Tanti marchi, un solo nome
Il termine Poli- significa letteralmente “molteplicità e abbondanza”, sedici anni fa lo abbiamo unito alla parola carta per sintetizzare l’essenza della nostra azienda. La molteplicità è infatti la caratteristica del nostro catalogo, una selezione dei migliori marchi e dei supporti per la comunicazione più efficienti presenti sul mercato. L’abbondanza è la prerogativa del nostro magazzino, fornito di un’ampia gamma di supporti, materiali e macchinari necessari ai professionisti della stampa.

Supportiamo i vostri progetti di comunicazione
La nostra azienda è storicamente specializzata nella distribuzione di carta per tutti i tipi di stampa, nella fornitura di buste commerciali e prodotti per cartotecnica. Negli anni abbiamo approfondito la nostra passione per la comunicazione visuale e deciso di fornire un’ampia gamma di supporti per la stampa a grande formato. Dopo aver sviluppato un catalogo così ampio, abbiamo inserito nella nostra offerta anche tutti gli accessori e gli strumenti necessari ai professionisti della stampa. Per offrire un servizio completo ai nostri partner commerciali, abbiamo inoltre realizzato un’esposizione di macchinari per il dopo – stampa, utili a trasformare i nostri supporti in progetti di comunicazione vincenti.

Name: Gem Chain Bar Inc.
Description:
Gem Chain Bar was established in 1989 in Kooskia, ID by former loggers who envisioned products that would make timber harvesting more efficient.  Understanding how expensive down time is, we continually strive to increase product quality, performance and durability for the end user depending on it.

In 2005, GEM began incorporating new technology into our manufacturing process and moved our shop to a larger facility in Grangeville, ID. We utilize automation and robotics to continually increase production capacity, quality and consistency. GEM is focused on a future that employs technology, innovation and extensive field testing to manufacture Made in the USA products that continue to lead the harvester industry.

GEM manufactures harvester products for companies around the world. Creating an effective, efficient and high-quality product is critical for our success and the success of our customers. At the end of every cutting system is the sprocket, chain and bar. Increased profitability for our customers comes through ensuring longer, higher quality run times before changing those products.  Gem employs both technology and field testing to create products that not only appeal to engineering but perform and last for the skilled worker in the field.

“A lot of past and present employees comment on our business culture. We’re not a huge corporation. We empower our employees to be part of the product design and manufacturing process. We come to a decision as a group about the best course of action. We work together as a company and a true team. We strive to foster that collaboration with both our internal (employees) and external customers.” - Company President Kim Peterson

Name: EcoMasterBoards.com
Description:
Thank you for considering display panels from MasterBoards LLC. Also known as sample boards, tile boards, MDF boards, or handle boards, ours are manufactured with over 30 years of expertise and quality craftsmanship. Designed to professionally display ceramic tile, travertine, pavers, stone veneers, cabinet hardware, wood flooring and more.

Each display panel is produced to exacting standards, using environmentally friendly recycled materials and water-soluble adhesives. Unlike MDF boards, which typically contain highly toxic formaldehyde and are mostly imported, EcoMasterBoards are made in the USA and can be safely discarded, recycled or even repurposed. When dropped, MDF panels chip and split. Ours are a rigid, pasted chip paperboard product. The corners will mushroom if dropped and can be pressed back to almost original flattened shape.

All six stock sizes are available in white or black and have a 1” x 3.75” hand hole conveniently notched for hanging display. Under normal circumstances, orders are shipped within 48 hours. We guarantee all EcoMasterBoards to be free of manufacturing defects.

Name: Enrico Toniolo srl
Description:
Il 23 Aprile 1908 l’Ing. Enrico Toniolo si impegna ad acquistare la Ditta Luigi Zuanelli di Milano, già attiva nel settore cartario, divenendone proprietario il 28 Dicembre 1910.

Scopo dell’Azienda è quello di operare nel medesimo settore per la vendita di macchinari, materie prime, strumentazione di controllo, impianti diversi, consulenze.

Il 1° Novembre 1912 l’Ing. Enrico Toniolo acquista la rivista “L’Industria della Carta”, ancora viva ed attiva nel 2019, anche se da lui ceduta successivamente ad altri responsabili.

Un incidente ferroviario del Novembre 1944 arresta purtroppo la sua grande attività di imprenditore capace e generoso.

Il figlio Cesare Toniolo Augier, già attivo nell’Azienda paterna, prosegue nel medesimo settore e viene poi affiancato negli anni 1950 dai suoi figli.

Negli anni 1950/1960 la Enrico Toniolo Srl inizia anche l’attività di progettazione e costruzione di strumenti da laboratorio seguendo attentamente l’evoluzione delle normative internazionali, espandendo la propria attività con forniture in Europa e nel resto del mondo.

Dal 1990, entra a fare parte dell’azienda anche il nipote Filippo Toniolo Augier.

Ad oggi vanta più di 1000 clienti e collaborazioni con i più grossi Gruppi Cartari presenti sul mercato italiano ed internazionale ed è rappresentata da Agenti in diverse aree del mondo.

Name: Happy Planner Land
Description:
Handmade planner company designed to help you organize your life in an old fashioned yet still chick and extravagant way. It makes you feel happy by making others happy along the way. 
 
Happy Plan is designed to fit all your needs, tasks and dreams, but is also not overwhelmingly big, not making you stressful for not filling all the empty space. It is designed for all the ladies that love pretty things and like to get also some use from it. It is chic and girly, but also sophisticated and clean. It is on the mission to help you be in control of your life and make you feel happy.
Since always, I enjoyed helping people in any way. I believe my parents and my upbringing had a lot to do with it. They always thought me to be a better person, to give a hand to anybody in need.  The most important thing for me was to become my own person, doing something that I love doing, and if I could help somebody along my way, even better. Always trying new things, searching for my passion and at the end, searching for myself.
Keep track of daily tasks, not forgetting little details and still enjoy quilt free quality time with your family and friends, you need a plan, more exactly a paper planner, the old-fashioned way, that helps you stay more organized and on top of everything. You can very easily get caught in the repeatable pattern, not living your life to the fullest. I have always struggled finding the right planner to fit all my needs, so I had to create one by myself and I would like to share it with you.
Happy Plan is an extremely effective tool for keeping all your ducks in a row, helping you plan your day, your week, your month or even your wedding, keep track of your goals, habits and wishes. This little book will help you keep your life in check by making more intentional choices in your life that will feel more creative and fun.

Name: Verhoeven's Zagerij en Houthandel | Harskamp
Description:
Verhoeven’s Zagerij en houthandel is een grote industriële zagerij in Nederland en is gevestigd te Harskamp (gemeente Ede). Al meer dan één generatie legt de zagerij zich toe op het produceren van gezaagde houtproducten, voornamelijk ten behoeve van de palletindustrie. 

Jaarlijks wordt afhankelijk van kwaliteit en sterkte, tussen de 120.000 en 150.000 m3 voornamelijk naaldhout verwerkt. Dit rondhout wordt verzorgd door ons zusterbedrijf HTL (Harskamp Timber Logistics) en betrokken van houtproducenten – waaronder Staatsbosbeheer – en houthandelaren in de Benelux en Duitsland. 

De zagerij is ingericht met een drietal volautomatische zaaglijnen inclusief sorteereenheden, die het mogelijk maakt een grote variëteit aan houtproducten te leveren aan uiteenlopende klanten. Gegarandeerde kwaliteit, flexibel en ‘just in time’ zijn de kernwoorden voor de bedrijfsvoering. 

Naast de gezaagde houtproducten neemt de zagerij een positie in met levering van chips aan zowel de biomassa – als de spaanplaatindustrie en is zij in staat alle producten onder FSC keurmerk te leveren.

Name: Bag It Mw
Description:
Who We Are:
Bag It is a Malawian-based packaging brand dedicated to offering eco-friendly, customizable, and cost-effective packaging solutions. We specialize in the manufacturing of high-quality packaging solutions and are driven by a strong commitment to sustainability, innovation, and empowering businesses with alternatives to plastic packaging.

Our Journey:
Bag It began with a simple moment of realization, the kind that reveals an overlooked problem and sparks a solution.

What started as a curiosity about improving the quality and appearance of locally available packaging quickly turned into a deeper exploration of branding, sustainability, and purpose.

As we studied the impact of plastic waste on our environment, we saw an opportunity to offer better; eco-friendly, well-designed, and accessible packaging that meets the rising demand for sustainable alternatives. This passion grew into a business, grounded in the belief that packaging can do more than just contain, it can communicate, protect the planet, and inspire change.

Today, Bag It stands as a symbol of progress, constantly evolving, innovating, and expanding our reach across industries, all while staying rooted in our mission to reduce environmental harm and elevate the standards of packaging in Malawi and beyond.

What We Stand For:
We are more than just a packaging company, We are advocates for a cleaner and greener future. We believe that every business and individual has a role to play in protecting the environment. Our values are rooted in integrity, sustainability, quality, innovation, and customer-centered service. We aim to make sustainable packaging both accessible and desirable, helping clients feel proud of the positive impact their packaging choices make.

Name: Eco Farm Asia Ltd.
Description:
We are founded on these principles. More than just words to us, they define our identify and guide our work with  partners. It defines the nature of our business.

Protecting the environment is our main business. We believe that by doing so, our work and local communities will benefit. By putting the environment first, our business will progress.

Our aim is to promote sustainable teak farming, protect the environment and provide local employment. Our goal is to plant at least 3 million teak and local trees and generate profit for the company, our partners and local communities.

Ecology

We promote the use of lumber from managed plantations. By doing so we help ease pressures on the remaining forests. We promote best farming practices such as use of hedges, micro plantations, inter-cropping, use of organic fertilisers and limited tillage. We construct structure that use local materials such as bamboo to limit our carbon footprint.

Equity

We provide local employment in the Philippines. We believe in treating people fairly. These are not new innovations, these are decent and legal requirements. We will share the profits of our plantations with our workers. The amount will be based on year of service and nature of work. Our aims are: to give workers a stake in the project and enough resources after 11 years to buy their own farms and work with us as partners. We will put aside a minimum 10% of our profit for sharing with our staff. 

Sustainability

We are committed to more sustainable development. We ensure that our work enhance food security. We improve the land we buy and develop. Are plans are to enhance water management by the construction of reservoirs and development of water sheds that will benefit our own farmlands and those of our neighbours. Central to our strategy is micro plantation development. We avoid mono cropping and do not cut existing tree. Our micro plantations are inside, beside and surrounded by woodlands.

Name: WestcoastMDF
Description:
Lush forest in the heart of British Columbia, will be the source of our premium raw materials. We feel fortunate to be in one of the few places in the world with ideal growing conditions for softwood. 
We are committed to social and environmental responsibility. We will use only softwood with the optimum moisture levels for our products. Most of our wood supply would come from the cut-offs of other local forestry companies: we take pride in planning to make something useful out of wood that would otherwise go to waste. 

We will be using the latest German and Canadian technology to ensure the least amount of harmful emissions released in the environment making us one of the most environmentally sustainable companies.
Our 500,000 square foot production facility will house state-of-the-art equipment designed by German industry leaders. Their cutting-edge design and technologies results in more efficient production, lower emissions, and savings from energy re-use. 

This marriage of a premium Canadian resource with leading German engineering and technology will result in top-tier MDF and HDF products for our customers.

Name: EFF J.FOUILLET
Description:
EFF J.FOUILLET est spécialisé dans la fabrication de piquets en Châtaignier/Acacia et dans le treillage (ganivelle). Notre production est issue de forêts françaises et transformée uniquement sur notre site situé sur la commune d’Aizecq, au Nord de la Charente. 

Nos piquets sont fabriqués et commercialisés dans plusieurs longueurs et différents calibres, ronds ou fendus, écorcés. 

Le treillage en bois de Châtaignier, fabriqué en échalas fendus ou lattes sciés, nous permet de répondre aux différentes demandes sur mesure.

Nous proposons aussi le paillage, un produit issu des opérations d’écorçage qui peut être utilisé dans les jardins, espaces publiques, entre autres. 

EFF J.FOUILLET a la volonté de promouvoir le développement durable des forêts. C’est pourquoi nous avons adhéré en 2012 au système de développement durable PEFC (Programme de Reconnaissance des Certifications Forestières). Cela nous permet de garantir à nos clients que le bois coupé, façonné et transporté est issu de forêts gérées durablement.

Pour plus d'informations, nous vous invitons à connaître notre site web: www.eff-piquets-charente.fr

Name: FF Soucy WB L.P.
Description: In 1973, Rivière-du-Loup installations were acquired by Brant-Allen Industries a firm from Greenwich, Connecticut. The joint partnership between an American publishing company "Dow Jones" and a Quebec Government company "Rexfor" brought the implantation of a second paper machine on the site. Since then, large investments were made to upgrade the Mill production to more than 750 metric tons per day. Its two paper machines are classified amongst the best ten (10) in the world. The Rivière-du-Loup mill is also a leader in environmental matters. The mill received the Ecogest prize in 2003 for its contribution to greenhouse gas reduction. The mill is also recognized as being one of the best in North America in controlling its water consumption per ton of paper produced. F.F. Soucy is proud to be the first pulp and paper mill to have obtained its ISO-9002 certification in North America. Our mill chose its pulp & paper producing technology to maximize the usage of its natural ressources while minimizing liquid, solid and gas rejects in the environment. Recently, the mill obtained its PFEC and FSC certification to supply our clients with a product that respects the traceability standards.

Description:
●● Company's Mission and Vision:

• "Boota" also known as "Boota Online" was established in 2019, by two LUMS Business majors Khawaja Talha Muhammad and Talha Munir with the mission of working for the Green Revolution and vision of planting a billion trees by 2030. In Latin, the word Boota symbolizes small plants. 

●● Who We Are?

• Being the leading marketplace for online plants, Boota provides an online platform that sells quality plants at reasonable prices and delivers them to all over Pakistan, We are a Lahore based privately owned company that claims to solve the problems of deforestation and climate change by its innovative offers which are open to the general public. 

●● Why Boota?

• Boota specializes in quality indoor as well as outdoor plants, bails & creepers, fruit and flower trees, gardening accessories pots, and containers for homes and offices. We carry a wide range including Bonsai, orchids, cacti, and succulents. Moreover, Boota is spreading awareness and educating civilians regarding plants, their importance, uses, and long-term benefits.

●● Keys to Success

• Sell products of the highest quality with excellent customer service and support.
• Retain customers to generate repeat purchases and make referrals.
• Continue to expand daily sales by adding to the variety of plants we sell.
• Communicate with our customers through creative advertising.

Description:
Can you imagine Christmas or New Year Eve without a Christmas tree? More and more families, however, are opting for artificial Christmas trees to replace the traditional fir in their homes.

Yet some of us, who are more inclined towards care for the environment and protection of nature, have second thoughts in both cases, whether we choose a natural or permanent tree. Artificial firs are usually made of troublesome plastic, and the natural trees mean that they were cut for no other reason than to indulge our respect for the traditional ways.

And yet we just can't picture the holidays without the unique magic of the Christmas tree!

There is a solution: Xmas3, sustainable tree that gives fir trees chances to get tall.

Name: HERTCO KITCHENS, L.L.C.
Description: Where does that peculiar name come from? Well for starters, at the time we applied to register our company name, we were informed that all of our choices were ineligible. Therefore, the four founding partners Harald and Erika Lincke and Tom and Connie Shorter decide that an acronym would have to do the job. The company was started in a rented warehouse in Langley, BC Canada with a bank loan and a lot of determination and ambition. A handful of dealers immediately sign up, as they were not happy with their big local manufacturer and like the fact that Hertco is willing to do what it takes to make the customer happy. Our first generation product is a dadoed particle board cabinet with a paper print base finish. Initial door styles are limited to Laminate and Oak selections. A new factory is built in Ferndale, Washington, USA. The 50,000 sq ft. building is fully equipped with the most modern woodworking machinery. We specialize in the production of customized cabinetry which is becoming ever more popular with the remodelers and custom home builders. We completed a 12,000 sq. ft. addition to our Ferndale factory, gaining more space for manufacturing flexibility and providing a home to a 2,500 sq. ft. “dealer only” factory resource center, displaying our newest and most progressive products. Our dealer network has grown to approximately 250 dealers throughout the Pacific Rim, including the states of Alaska, Arizona, California, Colorado, Hawaii, Idaho, Montana, Nevada, New Mexico, Oregon, Utah, Washington, as well as our original grass roots in British Columbia and Alberta, Canada. Some of our original dealers and employees have now been with us for 26 years. Our focus remains in delighting our customers by maintaining stability in our pricing, our production and delivery schedules.

Name: Delav Company
Description:
Delav Company is a worldwide wholesale lumber supplier.
Our main goal is to build long-term relationships all over the globe by helping individuals, communities, organizations, and companies, making their dreams into reality — from remodeling to massive constructions.

Our approach. You — are the person, not just a customer.
When we started Delav Company, we never wanted to be just like everybody else with their "programmed" way of doing business with people. We do not stand for that. We provide an entirely individual approach because we know that there are never two identical cases and two identical people.

Our way of communicating. In the world of progress and high technologies, where bots are replacing people and communication are automatizing, we care about natural human contact. We listen to our Customers' problems first. Then we talk through it. And in the end, we offer the solution with step-by-step guiding.

Our standards. We are putting our name on the line. For more than 21 years, we have been mastering the art of growing, maintaining, healing, and developing soil and forest stands. All our trees grow on the world's most fertile soil — Ukrainian Chernozem.
We proudly say that our lumber is incomparable when it comes to its properties and quality.

Our values and principles. We believe that if a person does not have values and principles, the person does not have himself. That is the foundation of the world and us as personalities.
Our principles: truth despite everything, trust is priceless, discipline is the bridge between goals and accomplishments, helping is the key, the greatest or nothing, the learning never ends, always strive to understand, give first, build for generations.
We value: time above all, the ability to negotiate the opposing view, respect, responsibility, reliability, work ethic, money, perseverance, goals, vision, open-mindedness, hard work, positivity, courage, honor, enthusiasm, and failure because through it we learn and rise.

Name: 390 Paper Co
Description:
OUR PRODUCTS

Environmentally Responsible
Now, we know that the words "paper company" don't exactly scream environmentally friendly, but we’re all about ECO! We aim to produce as little waste as possible while creating our products and to provide you with the most environmentally responsible paper products possible. Just because we want to be kind to the earth, doesn't mean we want to sacrifice the joy of receiving snail mail!

We’ve sourced 100% recycled card stock, envelopes, and packing materials, and we hope that you will recycle these items when you’re done with them. We’re also happy to report that the "plastic" sleeve we use is made from plant-based materials and is totally compostable! So, we hope you’ll make sure it ends up in the green bin.

Inclusive
We know that the same shoe doesn’t fit everyone. Plus, life would be pretty boring if we were all wearing the same shoes! We aim to create items that are appropriate for everyone (or many) and applicable for multiple occasions. We’re always open to ways we can do better at this, so if you have any suggestions - please get in touch!

Handmade
Our products are born out of love and a genuine desire to make people happy. Each item is hand lettered/drawn and then digitized for printing. Because our products are handmade and printed on recycled card stock, there is a chance that your item might not look exactly like the picture you see online, as colours and the speckle of the paper may differ slightly. We hope you’ll understand and that you’ll embrace the uniqueness of our products.

Name: GOZDika, posek in izvlek lesa ter druge gozdarske storitve
Description:
POSEK DREVJA

Posek drevja izvedemo glede na gozdno-gospodarski načrt, ki ste ga določili z revirnim gozdarjem, bodisi zaradi pridobivanja lesa bodisi zaradi škode, ki je na drevju nastala (podlubniki, naravne ujme).
Dela opravljamo tudi na zahevnih terenih in v izrednih situacijah, ki so nastale kot posledica žledoloma, vetroloma, snegoloma in drugih dejavnikov.
Po poseku teren očistimo (obelimo panje, zložimo vejevje in očistimo vlake), v skladu s predpisi (gozdni red) in željami naročnika.

SPRAVILO LESA

Po poseku drevja, hlodovino spravimo do nakladnalne rampe oziroma do dogovorjenega odlagališča. Spravilo običajno poteka po obstoječih vlakah in poteh, kjer je to le mogoče.
Uporabljamo gozdarski zgibni traktor Iwafuji T41, ki je namenjen izključno spravilu lesa iz gozda, na različnih terenih. Pri spravilu še posebej pazimo, da čim manj poškodujemo podrast, mladovje in drevje, ki ni namenjeno poseku.

NEGA GOZDA

S pravočasno in z redno nego gozd krepimo in uravnavamo njegovo namembnost. Nego gozda opravimo v vseh razvojnih fazah sestojev. Poleg rahljanja, čiščenja, redčenja, uravnavanja zmesi in obžetve, poskrbimo tudi za varovalne ukrepe pred divjadjo in sajenje.
V vašem gozdu obdelamo in izvlečemo tudi drevje na tleh, padlo zaradi različnih dejavnikov.

UREDITEV OKOLICE

V kolikor se je v okolici vaše hiše ali posesti razrazslo neželeno grmovje in robidevje, vam le-to očistimo in odvozimo.
Prav tako vam odstranimo drevje, ki kaže, da bi se lahko, zaradi starosti ali drugih dejavnikov, podrlo in s tem povzročilo gmotno škodo ali celo ogrozilo človeško zdravje ali življenje. Kadar je potrebno oziroma je to edino mogoče, poseg opravimo z dvižno košaro.

Name: Legatoria Balsarri snc
Description:
La Legatoria Balsarri nasce dall’esperienza del padre fondatore, Emilio Balsarri che, dopo 10 anni di lavoro nel campo della cartotecnica artigiana, decide nel 1977 di mettersi in proprio. Da un piccolo laboratorio, situato sulle sponde occidentali del Lago Maggiore, allarga in pochi anni le proprie dimensioni, fino a costruire nel 1991 un nuovo stabilimento intermante dedicato alla fase di rifinitura e rilegatura per articoli di vario genere. L’obiettivo fu quello di esplorare nuovi orizzonti, verso nuove tecnologie di processo e una continua innovazione. La profonda conoscenza dei materiali, unita alla grande esperienza ed al lavoro di collaboratori specializzati, portano l’azienda ad una progressiva specializzazione, alla ricerca di nuove soluzioni modulabili in funzione delle differenti richieste della clientela.

La successiva entrata dei figli in azienda ha portato null’altro che valore aggiunto: il padre si è posto come guida nei percorsi formativi, facendo crescere in loro la passione per il lavoro e, puntando sulle capacità specifiche, ha favorito la loro crescita professionale, e, con essa, le performance aziendali. Nel corso degli anni, i soci-collaboratori dell’azienda, hanno saputo dare forma a nuove conoscenze, dirigendosi verso nuove tecniche e metodi di processo, in grado di garantire una facile e tempestiva risposta alle richieste della clientela, proveniente da diverse regioni d’Italia e dall’estero. La loro progressiva spinta alla ricerca e sviluppo nei materiali e al progresso delle tecnologie, assicurano ancora oggi elevati standard qualitativi per tutte le lavorazioni effettuate. La cultura e i valori di famiglia e impresa si sono tramandate alle generazioni successive, intrecciandosi in un bagaglio di conoscenze e competenze, metodi e nuove tecniche, mantenendo vive nel tempo le caratteristiche di qualità, disponibilità, affidabilità, esperienza, ancora proprie del primo giorno.

Name: Carbon Capital
Description:
CARBON CAPITAL is an investment company founded in Latvia that develops forest and agricultural land assets. The company's development in 2021 was taken over by a team of Latvian investors and experienced management in the forest and financial sector. When making day-to-day decisions, we consider the balance of CO2 emissions from our operations to be one of the most important factors, ensuring greater absorption of greenhouse gases than emissions.

Carbon Capital is an investment company with a focus on green investments that have the potential to reduce CO2 concentrations in the atmosphere. Therefore, today, the company chooses forest and agricultural land as the primary investment tool, as these assets have the greatest CO2 absorption potential.

When developing properties, their potential CO2 capture is assessed, as well as the installation of wind and solar energy infrastructure, which provides additional future cash flow.

In addition to the acquisition of properties, the company develops cooperation projects in wind and solar energy generation projects with landowners, providing a full cycle from appraisal to building permit and project implementation.

Curlybirchwood is an Estonian local family business. We are the owners of a curly birch plantation and members of Estonian curly birch society. The curiosity and need to find a market for our first thinned out trees led us to the establishment of CBWOOD OY. Our company is the first and for now the only one which is processing and trading Curly birch wood in Estonia.

Currently we process and sell mainly our own plantation’s wood. In cases of large demand or customized needs, we can find needed solutions in a collaboration with more than 100 plantation-owners and craftsmen all around Estonia. Our unique advantage is also a cooperation with local universities to find the innovative ways of processing curly birch wood.  All this gives us opportunity to provide and manufacture the wood according to our B2B customer’s needs. 
As we have a very good accessibility to curly birch wood resources, we are able to provide very large range of different curly birch wood. The selection of curly birch wood starts from growing curly birch trees and raw logs to turning them into veneer. We also provide processed wood such as dried and stabilized wood for companies producing knives and knife handles. All curly birch wood and products of curly birch visible in our B2C shop are available in needed quantities for B2B wholesale.

Please contact us directly and we will do our best to find suitable customized solutions for your business.

https://curlybirchwood.com/contact/

While many versions of recycled paper have made their appearance till date, issues of texture, thickness, print-ability and more importantly pricing made these avatars nonviable and they remained an academic interest only. Name: Burns Forest Products LLC
Description:
Burns Forest Products LLC has been in the forest products and land management business for over 53 years. Founded in 1963 by Joe D. Burns, President, the company is now managed by John A. Russo, Chief Operations Officer. BFP and affiliates own and/or manage over 35,000 acres for clients and friends. The Company produces and markets forest products: sawlogs, poles, pulpwood, wood chips, and biomass from owned and managed lands. BFP also purchases timber on the open market to fulfill it's contracts with major wood consuming industries in North Louisiana. Open market sealed bid sales are conducted to obtain the best price for the landowner on certain high value tracts.

Our staff of certified, professional foresters also perform land and timber appraisals, cost basis determinations, and damage appraisals of pipelines and well sites. Federal and state program cost share applications are filed to secure funding for tree planting, site preparation, and all regeneration projects.

Let us help you manage your land for maximum timber production and value, wildlife enhancement, and recreational opportunities.

Name: HAWA DDS
Description:
HAWA DDS is a project funded by the FAO-EU FLEGT Programme from FLEGT Direct Assistant budget to develop a voluntary Due Diligent System platform at the association level to prove legality of timber sources used for woodworking production in Vietnam. HAWA DDS is developed by the Handicraft and Wood Industry Association of HCM city (HAWA), accepted by VNFOREST before receiving approval from the FAO-EU FLEGT Programme with a total budget of approximately 500.000 USD.
The project is implemented in 2 phases, started from 2017 and shall finish by the end of 06/2021 with the objective to provide an efficient and appropriate due diligence solution for Vietnamese woodworking manufacturers to export their products to EU and developed markets within the transitional context when VPA negotiation has been completed and the FLEGT licensing system of Vietnam shall be applied in near future.
The 1st phase of the project was conducted in 5 months, from 01 March to 31 August 2017, with the mission to develop a thorough project plan of HAWA Due Diligent System, which expected to be suitable with both situations: before and after the deployment of FLEGT Vietnam.
The 2nd phase of the project shall be carried out in 30 months, from May 2018 until June 2021 with the overall objective is: “To develop and roll out a Due Diligence System (DDS) to help HAWA members and non-members respond to international market requirements and facilitate compliance with VNTLAS/OCS requirements.”
